  • 0–4 years of catering sales and event management experience.

  • Ability to manage and support catering accounts and events.

  • Strong negotiation and communication skills.

  • Knowledge of hospitality CRM and catering systems.

  • Assist in preparing proposals, contracts, and event orders.

  • Good organizational and time management skills.

  • Ability to build and maintain client relationships.

  • Event coordination and on-site support.

ad.title: Personal Driver
ad.description:
Responsibilities

  • Chauffeurs CEO and his family in a comfortable, safe and efficient manner.
  • Be aware of road and traffic conditions and suggest alternative routes when neccessary
  • Ensures that car is clean and well-maintained at all times
  • Ensures timely vehicle maintenance, either directly or indirectly through third party service providers
  • Be punctual and safety conscious at all times
  • Carry out other duties assigned from time to time

Requirements

  • Possess valid Class 3 license with clean and safe driving record
  • Minimum 3 years of relevant experience with continental cars
  • Good grooming and personal hygiene
  • Able to start work at 7.30am and work overtime; including weekends and Public Holidays where necessary
  • Upholds strict level of confidentiality
  • IT savvy (E.g knowledge of using GPS for navigation/ Google Maps, Whatsapp or any other mobile applications)

ad.title: Assistant Manager, Finance (Maternity Cover)
ad.description:
About Us


Far East Organization is a Christian Enterprise, which develops real estate and operates businesses by serving with grace, love, integrity and honesty. Together with its Hong Kong-based sister company Sino Group, they are one of Asia’s largest real estate groups, with operations in Singapore, Malaysia, Australia, Japan, China (Mainland and Hong Kong) and USA. 

Far East Organization is the largest private property developer in Singapore, having developed over 780 developments across all segments of real estate including 55,000 private homes in Singapore since its establishment in 1960. Far East Organization includes three listed entities: Far East Orchard Limited, Far East Hospitality Trust and Yeo Hiap Seng Limited.




Far East Organization is the winner of 14 FIABCI World Prix d’Excellence awards, the highest honour in international real estate. In 2022, Far East Organization is listed as top 50 of The Straits Time’s Singapore Best Employers Study. We believe in taking care of the total well-being of our people as they grow with us. We nurture a community where talent is developed and recognised, innovative ideas are encouraged, and achievements celebrated.

Our health and well-being benefits provide physical, mental and spiritual support to our people and their families. In addition to annual leave, performance bonus, medical and insurance coverage, you can anticipate the provision of birthday leave, birthday benefits, care leave, flexible benefits, staff rebates at F&B outlets, and special rates at our hotels, both locally and overseas. We empower you in your engagement with the wider community by providing varied activities to experience different opportunities to serve and contribute to the community.


Responsibilities

  • Manage full spectrum of accounting and financial functions including statutory and Monetary Authority of Singapore reporting, month-end, quarterly and year-end closing process.
  • Manage daily accounting tasks including prepare and post journal entries (accruals, prepayments, adjustments, intercompany), accounts payable/receivable and invoices processing.
  • Maintain the general ledger and ensure accuracy of financial data.
  • Perform month-end and year-end closing activities.
  • Reconcile bank accounts, balance sheet accounts, and sub-ledgers.
  • Ensure timely preparation of monthly financial and management reports, analyse and highlight variances against prior periods, budget and KPIs.
  • Responsible for annual tax filing, quarterly GST returns, manage and liaison with the tax agents on tax-related matters.
  • Responsible for quarterly and annual returns to MAS for asset management company.
  • Responsible for cash flow planning and projection.
  • Coordinate and prepare annual budget and forecast.
  • Liaising with external auditor to ensure timely preparation of audited financial statements with relevant disclosures in compliance with accounting standards and other relevant legislation.
  • Supervise and review the work of finance staff and outsourced providers

Requirements

  • Degree in Accounting/Finance or ACCA
  • Minimum 4 - 5 years of working experience, out of which at least 2 years in external audit
  • Self-directed, hands-on, motivated with high degree of commitment to meeting deadlines, targets and objectives
  • Strong analytical, people management, communication and organizational skills
  • Good powerpoint and excel skills
  • Proficient in spoken and written English, with the ability to communicate clearly and professionally
  • Collaborative team player who can build relationships cross-functionally and contribute to team’s goals
  • Candidates with relevant experience in the Hospitality or REIT Industry will have an advantage

ad.title: Senior Sales Manager (Oasia Cluster)
ad.description:

ad.title: Regional AI Video Content Manager
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

The Social Commerce Team is a fast-growing team leading the way in livestream selling, short video content, and affiliate marketing across Southeast Asia. We work with top brands, combining creativity, data, and platform expertise to drive real commercial results. As part of Intrepid’s end-to-end eCommerce ecosystem, we gain broad exposure across operations, collaborate with cross-functional experts, and play a key role in shaping how brands connect with digital shoppers in real time.


The part you will play

Intrepid Asia is seeking a forward-thinking Regional AI Video Content Manager to lead the transformation of video production through artificial intelligence, agentic AI, and automation.

This role blends creative storytelling with machine learning capabilities to accelerate end-to-end video production across Southeast Asia. You will drive AI adoption within the regional video team, standardize workflows, and enable scalable, high-quality content creation for eCommerce and social commerce brands.


You are not just a video expert. You are a systems thinker who sees AI as a multiplier — improving speed, consistency, insights, and creative performance.


As a Regional AI Video Content Manager, you will take charge of:

AI-Led Video Production Strategy

  • Leverage artificial intelligence tools, agentic AI systems, and automation to accelerate video production workflows
  • Integrate creative storytelling with AI-driven processes to enhance both efficiency and output quality
  • Support the Regional Head of Video Content in implementing AI-powered strategies across Southeast Asian markets


Productivity Optimization & Operational Excellence

  • Identify bottlenecks in current video production processes and redesign workflows using AI and automation to reduce turnaround time and manual effort
  • Increase video production capacity and content output without proportional growth in headcount or cost by embedding AI tools into daily operations
  • Establish clear productivity KPIs (e.g., turnaround time, revision cycles, output volume, cost efficiency) and continuously refine systems to ensure sustainable, measurable gains across regional markets


Tool Identification & Evaluation

  • Identify and evaluate relevant AI tools for end-to-end video production, including:
    • Content ideation and scripting
    • AI-generated video production
    • Editing and post-production automation
    • Localization and adaptation
    • Performance analytics and optimization
  • Run structured testing of new tools and document learnings for regional adoption


Workflow Design & Standardization

  • Establish standardized workflows for AI-led video production across markets
  • Develop guidelines, SOPs, and best practices for AI-generated and AI-assisted video content
  • Ensure consistency in quality, compliance, and brand alignment while scaling output


Regional Implementation & Enablement

  • Partner with local market teams across SEA to implement AI-driven video production frameworks
  • Train and upskill video producers and content teams on emerging AI tools and workflows
  • Drive adoption of automation systems to improve turnaround time and reduce manual inefficiencies


Innovation & Continuous Improvement

  • Stay ahead of emerging AI technologies in video, generative media, automation, and analytics
  • Experiment with new AI models and tools to enhance video quality, personalization, and performance
  • Translate innovation into scalable, repeatable systems that deliver measurable impact


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • 5+ years of experience in video production, creative operations, or content innovation (eCommerce or social commerce preferred)
  • Strong hands-on experience with AI-powered creative tools (e.g., generative AI, AI video tools, automation platforms)
  • Proven ability to design and optimize production workflows at scale
  • Experience working across multiple Southeast Asian markets is a strong advantage
  • Strong understanding of performance-driven content and data-informed creative optimization
  • Excellent communication skills and ability to influence cross-functional and regional stakeholders
  • Analytical mindset with the ability to translate experimentation into scalable frameworks


In return, you will be getting

  • You will work with our portfolio of leading international brands, delivering engaging livestreams and video content to the highest standards. This role offers exposure and experience that can open many opportunities in the industry. Many of our livestream hosts have gone on to become key brand ambassadors or built followings of millions while at Intrepid — the world is truly your oyster!
  • We believe in an end to end omni-channel and full funnel approach to ensure seamless and consistent consumer journeys, and intrepid is one of the very few players who offer that full array of services under one roof. Brands love this model as it's streamlined and delivers strong performance, hence we are rapidly growing. This offers you wide exposure and exciting growth opportunities
  • We believe in the combined power of creative genius and a data-driven approach. Whether it is live streaming, video or affiliates, you will have the data and knowledge how to analyze & optimize at your fingertips, so you can add that spark of creative brilliance to create magic. With your talent and our training, we deliver high performance.
  • We are international, we know how to scale, and we are stable. Content is local, but what resonates and best practices apply across countries. Our regional exposure and teams allow us to learn faster and organize ourselves in the best way possible. You are joining a proven international company with a strong track record, but we move fast with a lot of freedom, a collaborative culture and no politics. The best of both worlds.


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.title: Affiliate Associate/Senior Associate
ad.description:
The Team You Will Be Part Of

The Social Commerce Team is a fast-growing team leading the way in livestream selling, short video content, and affiliate marketing across Southeast Asia. We work with top brands, combining creativity, data, and platform expertise to drive real commercial results.

As part of Intrepid’s end-to-end eCommerce ecosystem, we gain broad exposure across operations, collaborate with cross-functional experts, and play a key role in shaping how brands connect with digital shoppers in real time.

As an Affiliate Associate/Senior Associate You Will Take Charge Of

Responsibilities:

  • Develop and execute affiliate marketing strategies to drive brand awareness, engagement, and sales on TikTok.



  • Identify and recruit TikTok influencers and content creators to join our affiliate program.



  • Build and maintain strong relationships with affiliate partners, providing support, guidance, and incentives to drive performance.



  • Create and optimize TikTok content in collaboration with affiliates to align with brand messaging and objectives.



  • Monitor and analyze TikTok campaigns, tracking key metrics and performance indicators to optimize results.

  • Stay up-to-date with TikTok trends, algorithms, and best practices to maximize visibility and reach.

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including marketing, sales, and product development, to ensure alignment and coherence in brand messaging and strategy.

What We Are Looking For - The Ideal Profile

  • Education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.

  • Experience: Proven experience in affiliate marketing, influencer relations, or digital marketing, with a focus on TikTok.

  • Platform Knowledge: Strong understanding of TikTok's platform, features, trends, and algorithms.

  • Communication: Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build and maintain relationships with influencers and partners.

  • Creativity: Creative mindset with a keen eye for engaging content and storytelling.

  • Analytical Skills: Analytical mindset, with the ability to track and analyze campaign performance metrics to drive optimization.

  • Mindset: Self-motivated and results-driven, with the ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.

In Return, You Will Be Getting


  • High-Level Exposure: You will work with our portfolio of leading international brands, delivering engaging livestreams and video content to the highest standards. Many of our team members have gone on to become key brand ambassadors—the world is truly your oyster!

  • End-to-End Expertise: We believe in an omni-channel and full-funnel approach. Intrepid is one of the few players offering a full array of services under one roof, providing you with wide exposure and exciting growth opportunities.

  • Data-Driven Creativity: We combine creative genius with a data-driven approach. You will have the data and knowledge to analyze and optimize at your fingertips, allowing you to add that spark of creative brilliance to create magic.

  • International Stability: We are a proven international company with a strong track record. You will benefit from regional exposure and best practices while working in a fast-moving, collaborative culture with no politics.

ad.title: Regional Lead, Marketplaces and Ecommerce Excellence
ad.description:
The team you will be part of

The Digital Marketing Team is the engine behind data-driven growth for our brand partners across Southeast Asia’s eCommerce landscape. Specializing in performance marketing across marketplaces like Shopee, Lazada & TikTok, we focus on the entire 360-degree customer journey and build better digital experiences at each stage of the funnel. From media planning to real-time optimization and analytics on Meta, Google & Programmatic, the team partners closely with clients to unlock the full potential of eCommerce marketing—turning insights into action, and clicks into conversions.


The part you will play

Intrepid Asia is seeking a dynamic and strategic Regional Lead, Marketplaces and Ecommerce Excellence to join the regional team. The role will be involved in working with 6 markets across the SEA region.


As a Regional Lead, Marketplaces and Ecommerce Excellence you will take charge of 

  • Develop and advise on eCommerce marketing & campaign strategies for key regional accounts across the marketplaces, platforms, and properties, in accordance with their brand goals and current trends.
  • Drive platform excellence through data analysis, performance tracking, and implementation of best practices
  • Provide end-to-end client servicing, acting as the main point of contact for key regional accounts/
  • Work closely with the teams and platform SPOCs to ensure a comprehensive approach
  • Drive regionally for our in house retail media ad tech proprietary adoption across markets and brands, conduct audits and advise on strategies.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • 8–12 years of experience in eCommerce performance marketing
  • Background from an eCommerce enabler, agency commerce team 
  • Strong understanding of the SEA eCommerce and marketplace ecosystem
  • Hands-on expertise on-site and off-site media, with a strong focus on Shopee and Lazada
  • Clear ownership and understanding of commercial targets (GMV, ROI, efficiency, growth)

ad.title: Junior Key Account Manager (E-commerce)
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

The Brand Management Team is the trusted partner for leading brands across Southeast Asia in strategic planning and driving sustainable online business growth. By analyzing performance, identifying opportunities, and aligning with our clients' commercial objectives, the team develops and executes data-backed strategies that maximize conversion and revenue. With a strong grasp of category dynamics and platform trends, and driving collaboration and coordination across other functions internally, Brand Management plays a key role in shaping long-term brand success in the digital commerce space.


The part you will play

A Junior Key Account Manager will be responsible to support small to medium sized accounts that may or may not be directly assigned to a KAM. Jr. KAM will be expected to handle operational tasks, storefront maintenance and most of the internal cross functional tasks with: Content, Customer Service and/or Fulfillment if applicable. 


As a Junior Key Account Manager, you will take charge of 

  • Support the execution of promotion plans and campaign coordination.
  • Responsible for product listings and pricing submission.
  • Manage inventory efficiently to avoid stock-out.
  • Work closely with cross-functional teams (KAM, Content, Customer Service)
  • Other ad-hoc projects related to online sales.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • University degree
  • Good command of English (reading/writing/speaking/listening)
  • Strong problem-solving skills, willingness to learn and drive to optimize
  • Good analytical skills, proficiency with Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint
  • Ability to interact with a broad set of businesses and stakeholders and presenting both over the phone and in person.
  • Tenacity to develop ideas independently and thrive in a fast-paced start-up environment
  • Previous Ecommerce experience is a strong plus.



In return, you will be getting

  • We work with the most ambitious leading brands in ecommerce across South East Asia and the brand management team is the key interface between brands and our different in-house teams. In this role, you will have the most holistic overview of all facets of driving a successful e-commerce business    
  • From Junior KAM to KAM to Senior KAM to Cluster Manager and beyond, this team offers a lot of opportunities for career progression and personal development, with increasing commercial and team management responsibilities
  • Advanced systems and tools support you in running the stores of our clients, so you can focus your time on analyses, planning and initiatives that have the highest impact
  • Brand Management is a very diverse discipline, from honing your analytical and commercial skills to communication, stakeholder management and negotiation, you will get to do it all and learn from a collaborative and supportive team of experts.


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.description:

The team you will be part of

The Social Commerce Team is a fast-growing team leading the way in livestream selling, short video content, and affiliate marketing across Southeast Asia. We work with top brands, combining creativity, data, and platform expertise to drive real commercial results. As part of Intrepid’s end-to-end eCommerce ecosystem, we gain broad exposure across operations, collaborate with cross-functional experts, and play a key role in shaping how brands connect with digital shoppers in real time.


The part you will play

We are looking for a results-driven Senior Affiliate Executive to manage and grow our affiliate marketing initiatives, with a strong focus on TikTok Shop campaigns. The ideal candidate has 3-4 years of proven experience in affiliate marketing, influencer management, or e-commerce, particularly in TikTok Shop live selling, campaigns, and performance optimization. You will be responsible for building relationships with affiliates, optimizing performance, and ensuring campaigns meet KPIs while aligning with the brand's marketing objectives.


As a Senior Affiliate Executive, you will take charge of 

  • Develop and execute affiliate marketing strategies to drive brand awareness, engagement, and sales on TikTok.
  • Identify and recruit TikTok influencers and content creators to join our affiliate program.
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with affiliate partners, providing support, guidance, and incentives to drive performance.
  • Create and optimize TikTok content in collaboration with affiliates to align with brand messaging and objectives.
  • Monitor and analyze TikTok campaigns, tracking key metrics and performance indicators to optimize results.
  • Stay up-to-date with TikTok trends, algorithms, and best practices to maximize visibility and reach.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including marketing, sales, and product development, to ensure alignment and coherence in brand messaging and strategy.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • 3-4 years of proven experience in affiliate marketing, influencer management, or e-commerce, particularly in TikTok Shop live selling, campaigns, and performance optimization.
  • Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related field.
  • Proven experience in affiliate marketing, influencer relations, or digital marketing, with a focus on TikTok.
  • Strong understanding of TikTok's platform, features, trends, and algorithms.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build and maintain relationships with influencers and partners.
  • Creative mindset with a keen eye for engaging content and storytelling.
  • Analytical mindset, with the ability to track and analyze campaign performance metrics to drive optimization.
  • Self-motivated and results-driven, with the ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.


In return, you will be getting

  • You will work with our portfolio of leading international brands, delivering engaging livestreams and video content to the highest standards. This role offers exposure and experience that can open many opportunities in the industry. Many of our livestream hosts have gone on to become key brand ambassadors or built followings of millions while at Intrepid — the world is truly your oyster!
  • We believe in an end to end omni-channel and full funnel approach to ensure seamless and consistent consumer journeys, and intrepid is one of the very few players who offer that full array of services under one roof. Brands love this model as it's streamlined and delivers strong performance, hence we are rapidly growing. This offers you wide exposure and exciting growth opportunities
  • We believe in the combined power of creative genius and a data-driven approach. Whether it is live streaming, video or affiliates, you will have the data and knowledge how to analyze & optimize at your fingertips, so you can add that spark of creative brilliance to create magic. With your talent and our training, we deliver high performance.
  • We are international, we know how to scale, and we are stable. Content is local, but what resonates and best practices apply across countries. Our regional exposure and teams allow us to learn faster and organize ourselves in the best way possible. You are joining a proven international company with a strong track record, but we move fast with a lot of freedom, a collaborative culture and no politics. The best of both worlds.


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.


Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.


Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.


Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.title: Learning & Development Associate (6-Month Contract)
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. The team you will be part of

Our Talent & People Team is the heartbeat of our organization - championing a culture where people thrive and potential is unlocked. From attracting top talent and shaping employee experiences to driving development, engagement, and retention, the team plays a strategic role in building and maintaining a high-performing, empowered workforce. We are here to grow with the business and for the people behind it.


The part you will play

This role shall work under the supervision of the Regional Learning & Development Specialist. The candidate shall also work under the guidance of Contractual Employees in the Philippines, spanning into an initial contract of 6 months, with the premise of possible extension or conversion into a regular permanent position.


As a Learning & Development Associate, you will take charge of

  • Assist in developing digital and instructor-led training modules.
  • Collaborate with Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) to translate technical knowledge into engaging learning experiences.
  • Collaborate in producing courses weekly using SCORM authoring tools for external clients.
  • Act as a Project Team B member, supporting the production and revision of course outputs for clients.
  • Manage content uploads, updates, and organization in the LMS.
  • Assist the L&D Specialist in the rollout of courses and in mapping onboarding journeys.
  • Track training activities, collect feedback, and prepare basic reports.
  • Provide logistical support for training rollouts.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • 2-5 years of relevant work experience in training, education, HR, or related fields.
  • Proficiency in using Articulate as a SCORM authoring tool (e.g., Storyline, Rise).
  • Highly resourceful in creating engaging and effective learning materials.
  • Strong understanding of learning principles, including instructional design best practices.
  • Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.
  • Proficiency in MS Office/Google Workspace; familiarity with e-learning tools is a plus.
  • Good communication skills, with the ability to support training delivery and engage with learners.


In return, you will be getting

  • Tackling the sophisticated people's challenges in the rapidly evolving e-commerce landscape with data insights and innovative solutions.    
  • You will be joining an all-star People Team that consistently raises the bar by combining the systems and processes of a small multinational with the collaborative, innovative, and agile spirit of a startup in an ever-evolving world.
  • With our team’s rapid growth and the People Team launching new initiatives to enhance both employee experience and performance, you will benefit from a wide range of opportunities for development. Our structured learning programs covering both functional skills and broader growth are designed to support you at every stage of your journey
  • Our supportive culture and close collaboration between regional and local teams create a close-knit work environment which many in our team love and thrive in


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

ad.title: Graphic Designer (E-commerce)
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

Our Merchandising & Creative Team brings brands and products to life through compelling visuals and on-brand storytelling. From graphic design and content creation to product presentation and campaign assets, the team crafts experiences that captivate and convert. With a keen eye for aesthetics and a strong understanding of digital commerce, we transform ideas into visuals that drive engagement, elevate brands, and enhance the online shopping journey.


The part you will play

The Graphic Designer will create engaging visual assets for e-commerce, social media, and digital marketing campaigns. This role works closely with Marketing, Merchandising, and Content teams to produce banners, artworks, and animations optimized for different online platforms. The ideal candidate has strong design skills, knowledge of Adobe tools, and the ability to work in a fast-paced environment.


As a Graphic Designer, you will take charge of:

  • Design creative assets for digital and e-commerce platforms. Create banners, artworks, and visual materials for online channels including e-commerce platforms, social media, and marketing campaigns, ensuring all designs meet platform specifications and brand guidelines.
  • Produce engaging visuals and animations. Develop static and animated creatives using Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and After Effects to support campaigns, promotions, and content across platforms such as TikTok, Shopee, Lazada, and other social channels.
  • Ensure correct dimensions and platform optimization. Prepare and adapt creatives based on required sizes and formats for different social media and e-commerce platforms, ensuring high quality and consistency across all outputs.
  • Support campaign and content execution. Work closely with the Marketing, Merchandising, and Content teams to translate briefs into effective visual designs that drive engagement and conversions.
  • Maintain brand consistency and visual quality. Follow brand guidelines while also contributing creative ideas to improve visual storytelling and overall campaign impact.
  • Stay updated with design trends and tools. Keep up with the latest trends in graphic design, animation, social media content, and e-commerce creatives to continuously improve output quality.
  • Manage multiple projects in a fast-paced environment. Handle multiple design requests at the same time while meeting deadlines and maintaining attention to detail.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • 1–2 years of experience in Graphic Design, preferably for digital, social media, or e-commerce channels
  • Proficient in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and After Effects
  • Experience in designing banners, artworks, and creatives for online platforms
  • Knowledge of animation / motion graphics is required
  • Familiar with dimensions and formatting for different social media and e-commerce platforms
  • E-commerce experience is preferred but not required
  • Creative, proactive, and eager to learn new tools and techniques
  • Strong eye for layout, typography, and visual hierarchy
  • Ability to follow brand guidelines while contributing creative ideas
  • Able to work in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple projects simultaneously
  • Good communication and collaboration skills when working with cross-functional teams


In return, you will be getting

  • We pride ourselves on creating visuals that both inspire and perform. At Intrepid, design is part art and part science — we’ll help you elevate your creative talent through our strong merchandising and e-commerce expertise, complemented by ongoing design and AI training to help you create work that truly makes an impact.
  • You will see your work - for some of the leading brands in the world - featured across marketplaces and social platforms
  • We offer hybrid working to strike the right balance between being 'in the zone' delivering great work undisturbed, and spending time with your colleagues to bond and learn together
  • We provide you with the best designer tools (PC/laptop/MacBook and Adobe suite) you need


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.


Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.


Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.


Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.title: Content Strategist Intern
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

The Social Commerce Team is a fast-growing team leading the way in livestream selling, short video content, and affiliate marketing across Southeast Asia. We work with top brands, combining creativity, data, and platform expertise to drive real commercial results. As part of Intrepid’s end-to-end eCommerce ecosystem, we gain broad exposure across operations, collaborate with cross-functional experts, and play a key role in shaping how brands connect with digital shoppers in real time.


The part you will play

We’re looking for a highly creative and motivated Content Strategist Intern to join our growing content team. In this role, you will support the team in developing engaging content ideas, writing scripts and captions, and researching trends to help keep our content fresh, relevant, and effective.


As a Content Strategist Intern, you will:

  • Assist in writing clear and engaging scripts and simple storyboards for short-form video content, including product showcases and campaign materials.
  • Support the Video Content Lead and Content Strategists in brainstorming and developing creative ideas aligned with brand voice and marketing goals.
  • Help craft engaging, on-brand captions for social media and eCommerce content.
  • Conduct basic trend research and competitor checks to identify content ideas and creative opportunities.
  • Work closely with video editors, creators, and strategists to ensure content messaging stays consistent and aligned with the campaign direction.
  • Participate in brainstorming sessions and share ideas confidently while learning how creative concepts are developed.
  • Assist in organizing content plans, references, and materials needed for shoots and campaign preparation.


What we are looking for – the ideal profile

  • Currently pursuing a Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Journalism, Multimedia Arts, or any related field
  • Must be enrolled in a university program that requires a mandatory internship/OJT/ practicum
  • Good written and verbal communication skills in English
  • Strong interest in social media, short-form video content, and digital trends (TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts, etc.)
  • Creative, organized, and willing to learn in a fast-paced environment
  • Able to work collaboratively with a team and follow creative direction
  • Can manage tasks responsibly and meet deadlines


Nice to have:

  • Experience in writing, content creation, or social media (school projects are acceptable)
  • Familiarity with basic editing or content tools such as Canva, CapCut, Google Workspace, or similar
  • Interest in pop culture, lifestyle, fashion, or eCommerce content


In return, you will be getting

  • You will work with our portfolio of leading international brands, delivering engaging livestreams and video content to the highest standards. This role offers exposure and experience that can open many opportunities in the industry. Many of our livestream hosts have gone on to become key brand ambassadors or built followings of millions while at Intrepid — the world is truly your oyster!
  • We believe in an end to end omni-channel and full funnel approach to ensure seamless and consistent consumer journeys, and intrepid is one of the very few players who offer that full array of services under one roof. Brands love this model as it's streamlined and delivers strong performance, hence we are rapidly growing. This offers you wide exposure and exciting growth opportunities
  • We believe in the combined power of creative genius and a data-driven approach. Whether it is live streaming, video or affiliates, you will have the data and knowledge how to analyze & optimize at your fingertips, so you can add that spark of creative brilliance to create magic. With your talent and our training, we deliver high performance.
  • We are international, we know how to scale, and we are stable. Content is local, but what resonates and best practices apply across countries. Our regional exposure and teams allow us to learn faster and organize ourselves in the best way possible. You are joining a proven international company with a strong track record, but we move fast with a lot of freedom, a collaborative culture and no politics. The best of both worlds.


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.


Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.


Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.


Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

The part you will play

We are looking for a results-driven Affiliate Executive to manage and grow our affiliate marketing initiatives, with a strong focus on TikTok Shop campaigns. The ideal candidate has 1–2 years of proven experience in affiliate marketing, influencer management, or e-commerce, particularly in TikTok Shop live selling, campaigns, and performance optimization. You will be responsible for building relationships with affiliates, optimizing performance, and ensuring campaigns meet KPIs while aligning with the brand's marketing objectives.


As an Affiliate Executive, you will take charge of 

  • Manage day-to-day operations of the affiliate program, primarily on Shopee & TikTok Shop, from recruitment to campaign execution.
  • Build a strategic plan on how to optimize and leverage affiliate business in Shopee & TikTok Shop.
  • Creating a strategic plan on how to nurture until sustaining affiliate communities.
  • Identify, onboard, and nurture relationships with affiliates, creators, and live streamers to promote brand products.
  • Coordinate with content creators and external stakeholders to ensure brand messaging and visuals are aligned with campaign goals.
  • Monitor affiliate performance, analyze data, and prepare regular reports to track ROI and sales growth.
  • Negotiate commission structures and special incentives to maximize affiliate engagement.
  • Collaborate with marketing, e-commerce, and creative teams to develop strategies that drive traffic and conversions.
  • Stay updated on Shopee & TikTok Shop trends, algorithm changes, and competitive landscape to keep campaigns optimized.
  • Assist in planning and executing promotional campaigns for e-commerce sales events (e.g., 8.8, 9.9, 11.11).
  • Ensure all affiliate activities comply with brand guidelines and platform policies.
  • Explore and test new affiliate platforms and marketing opportunities for expansion.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Strong understanding of Shopee & TikTok Shop affiliate tools and campaign mechanics.
  • Excellent communication and relationship management skills.
  • Data-driven mindset with the ability to analyze metrics and make strategic decisions.
  • Basic knowledge of online sales funnels, performance marketing, and social media engagement.
  • Self-motivated and proactive with a problem-solving attitude.
  • Able to work under pressure and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
  • Creative thinker who can adapt to trends quickly.
  • Experience managing multi-category products (e.g., fashion, beauty, FMCG).
  • Knowledge of other affiliate platforms or influencer marketing tools.
  • Background in live selling or campaign project management.
  • Have an experience working in the affiliates industry is a plus

ad.title: Livestream Quality Control Specialist
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

The Social Commerce Team is a fast-growing team leading the way in livestream selling, short video content, and affiliate marketing across Southeast Asia. We work with top brands, combining creativity, data, and platform expertise to drive real commercial results. As part of Intrepid’s end-to-end eCommerce ecosystem, we gain broad exposure across operations, collaborate with cross-functional experts, and play a key role in shaping how brands connect with digital shoppers in real time.


The part you will play

We are looking for a Livestream Quality Control specialist to join our team. This role ensures the quality and performance of live commerce broadcasts on platforms such as TikTok and Shopee. The position monitors host delivery, content compliance, and audience engagement in real time, provides feedback to optimize live sessions, manages the live chat experience, and prepares post-live performance reports while ensuring hosts communicate product USPs and brand messaging accurately.


As an Livestream QC Specialist, you will take charge of 

  • Host & Content Quality Monitoring: Evaluate live broadcasts for communication clarity, intonation, and energy levels. Ensure that all content adheres to platform community guidelines (TikTok, Shopee.) to prevent shadowbans or penalties.
  • Real-Time Performance Optimization: Act as a "Live Director" by providing instant feedback to hosts via back-channel communication. You will correct product misinformation and suggest pivots if engagement metrics begin to dip.
  • Community Moderation & CX Management: Monitor the live chat environment to enhance the customer experience. This includes filtering spam, addressing critical product inquiries in real-time, and maintaining a positive, brand-safe atmosphere.
  • Post-Live Analytical Reporting: Develop comprehensive daily reports detailing host performance, identifying friction points in the customer journey, and documenting any technical or content anomalies.
  • Product Knowledge & USP Audit: Conduct pre-live and mid-live audits to ensure hosts have a mastery of the Unique Selling Points (USP) and brand voice according to the provided campaign briefs.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Education: Minimum of a Bachelor’s Degree (S1). Degrees in Communications, Marketing, or Management are preferred.
  • Experience: Proven experience in Quality Control (QC), Customer Experience (CX), or Digital Content Production. An understanding of the live-commerce ecosystem is a significant advantage.
  • Location: Must be based in Yogyakarta or willing to relocate. Physical presence is required for periodic team synchronization and strategic workshops.
  • Analytical Proficiency: Ability to interpret live data (viewership, CTR, and engagement patterns) and translate them into actionable coaching for hosts.
  • Exceptional Attention to Detail: A keen eye for nuances in verbal delivery, body language, and strict adherence to Standard Operating Procedures (SOP).
  • Professional Communication: Ability to provide firm, objective, and constructive feedback to host.


In return, you will be getting

  • You will work with our portfolio of leading international brands, delivering engaging livestreams and video content to the highest standards. This role offers exposure and experience that can open many opportunities in the industry. Many of our livestream hosts have gone on to become key brand ambassadors or built followings of millions while at Intrepid — the world is truly your oyster!
  • We believe in an end to end omni-channel and full funnel approach to ensure seamless and consistent consumer journeys, and intrepid is one of the very few players who offer that full array of services under one roof. Brands love this model as it's streamlined and delivers strong performance, hence we are rapidly growing. This offers you wide exposure and exciting growth opportunities
  • We believe in the combined power of creative genius and a data-driven approach. Whether it is live streaming, video or affiliates, you will have the data and knowledge how to analyze & optimize at your fingertips, so you can add that spark of creative brilliance to create magic. With your talent and our training, we deliver high performance.
  • We are international, we know how to scale, and we are stable. Content is local, but what resonates and best practices apply across countries. Our regional exposure and teams allow us to learn faster and organize ourselves in the best way possible. You are joining a proven international company with a strong track record, but we move fast with a lot of freedom, a collaborative culture and no politics. The best of both worlds.


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.title: Livestream Production Team Lead
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities.

We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.

The team you will be part of

The Social Commerce Team is a fast-growing team leading the way in livestream selling, short video content, and affiliate marketing across Southeast Asia. We work with top brands, combining creativity, data, and platform expertise to drive real commercial results. As part of Intrepid’s end-to-end eCommerce ecosystem, we gain broad exposure across operations, collaborate with cross-functional experts, and play a key role in shaping how brands connect with digital shoppers in real time.

The part you will play

The Livestream Production Team Lead will oversee the technical and operational aspects of Intrepid Malaysia’s livestream production and studio operations, ensuring high-quality livestream execution across multiple brand accounts.

This role requires strong hands-on technical expertise in livestream production, studio setup, and troubleshooting within a fast-paced e-commerce livestream environment. The Production Lead will also supervise production managers, maintain studio readiness, and continuously optimize livestream production standards across platforms.

Beyond technical execution, the role supports livestream campaigns aligned with platform promotions and brand objectives, contributing to key performance metrics such as viewer engagement, traffic, and conversion.

As the Livestream Production Team Lead, you will take charge of:

Livestream Technical Production & Supervision

  • Lead the technical setup and execution of livestream sessions across multiple brand accounts on platforms such as TikTok Shop, Shopee Live.
  • Ensure high-quality livestream production through proper camera operation, lighting setup, audio management, and scene transitions.
  • Manage livestream production workflows including OBS/vMix scene management, camera switching, overlays, and sound balancing.
  • Monitor livestream sessions in real time and provide immediate troubleshooting to maintain smooth broadcast continuity.
  • Standardize livestream production quality across brands by implementing consistent technical configurations and setups.
  • Work closely with hosts and Social Commerce Account Managers to deliver engaging and seamless livestream experiences.

Studio & Equipment Management

  • Maintain full studio readiness, including equipment organization, cleanliness, and functional setup for livestream sessions.
  • Manage studio inventory including cameras, lighting equipment, audio systems, props, and product samples.
  • Track equipment usage and conduct routine maintenance to ensure all production equipment remains in optimal working condition.
  • Plan and supervise equipment upgrades or purchases to support evolving livestream production needs.
  • Conduct daily and weekly technical checks to minimize last-minute issues before livestream sessions.

Livestream Quality Optimization

  • Identify recurring technical issues during livestream sessions and implement preventive solutions to reduce disruptions.
  • Monitor production quality across livestream sessions and recommend improvements aligned with market standards.
  • Develop and maintain standard operating procedures (SOPs) for livestream technical setup, studio operations, and troubleshooting.
  • Document best practices for livestream production, equipment configuration, and technical workflows.
  • Support the team in improving livestream production efficiency and scalability across multiple brands.

Team Supervision & Development

  • Supervise and mentor Production Assistants to maintain consistent livestream production standards.
  • Assign tasks and coordinate production schedules to support multiple brand livestream campaigns.
  • Train team members on studio equipment, livestream tools, and operational best practices.
  • Ensure adherence to production standards, technical workflows, and studio operational procedures.

Cross-Functional Collaboration

  • Work closely with Social Commerce Account Managers, hosts, and marketing teams to ensure livestream production aligns with brand campaign objectives.
  • Support commercial teams in delivering high-impact livestream sessions during platform campaigns and promotional events.
  • Collaborate with internal teams to maintain consistent production quality across different brands and livestream formats.
  • Contribute insights on production improvements based on livestream execution experience.

Who We Look For – The Ideal Profile

Experience & Competencies

  • 3+ years of experience in livestream production, studio operations, or video production within ecommerce, social commerce, or digital media.
  • Strong hands-on knowledge of livestream production tools such as OBS, vMix, or similar streaming systems.
  • Practical experience with camera operations, lighting setup, and audio engineering.
  • Familiarity with social commerce livestream platforms such as TikTok Shop, Shopee Live
  • Experience managing studio equipment and maintaining production inventory systems.
  • Prior experience supervising production assistants or technical teams is a plus.
  • Strong troubleshooting skills and ability to resolve technical issues under time pressure.

Personal Attributes

  • Highly adaptable and comfortable working in fast-paced livestream environments.
  • Detail-oriented, organized, and proactive in maintaining studio readiness.
  • Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to react quickly during live sessions.
  • Collaborative team player able to coordinate across multiple teams and stakeholders.
  • Reliable with strong ownership of production quality and operational execution.
  • Fluent in English.

In return, you will be getting

  • You will work with our portfolio of leading international brands, delivering engaging livestreams and video content to the highest standards. This role offers exposure and experience that can open many opportunities in the industry. Many of our livestream hosts have gone on to become key brand ambassadors or built followings of millions while at Intrepid — the world is truly your oyster!
  • We believe in an end to end omni-channel and full funnel approach to ensure seamless and consistent consumer journeys, and intrepid is one of the very few players who offer that full array of services under one roof. Brands love this model as it's streamlined and delivers strong performance, hence we are rapidly growing. This offers you wide exposure and exciting growth opportunities
  • We believe in the combined power of creative genius and a data-driven approach. Whether it is live streaming, video or affiliates, you will have the data and knowledge how to analyze & optimize at your fingertips, so you can add that spark of creative brilliance to create magic. With your talent and our training, we deliver high performance.
  • We are international, we know how to scale, and we are stable. Content is local, but what resonates and best practices apply across countries. Our regional exposure and teams allow us to learn faster and organize ourselves in the best way possible. You are joining a proven international company with a strong track record, but we move fast with a lot of freedom, a collaborative culture and no politics. The best of both worlds.

We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. ad.title: Junior Graphic Designer
ad.description:
About Us

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, a wide range of Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 

 

We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end to end.


The Role:

The Junior Graphic Designer must assume responsibility for the creative output of Intrepid Indonesia, maintaining standards for all communications and the Intrepid brand integrity through effective management of our design team.


You responsibilities will include:

  • Assist in designing digital assets such as banners, ads, social media post
  • Collaborate with senior designers to ensure creative consistency across all designs
  • Adapt and update existing designs based on feedback and brand guidelines
  • Help maintain a visual library for the brands you work with, ensuring organized files and updated assets
  • Support the team with the idea creation of design assets
  • Stay updated with design trends and e-commerce design standards


Who we look for – the ideal profile:

  • Bachelor's degree or diploma in Graphic Design or a related field
  • Basic knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, XD - After Effect is a plus)
  • Basic understanding of e-commerce platforms and their design needs
  • Strong attention to detail and the ability to follow brand guidelines
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
  • Good communication skills and ability to work well in a team
  • Willingness to learn and adapt to new challenges and feedback
  • Have an agile attitude


What we offer:

  • Competitive compensation package and career progression opportunities, reflective of the candidate’s credentials and contributions.
  • Professional and open international working environment – culturally integrating the best of all cultures to take the best of each and ensure we build an energetic, commercial, and fun working atmosphere. 
  • You are one of the pioneers of a new and cutting-edge Intrepid product underpinned by strong tech. You have a key position in the Intrepid Insights team working on a unique product solving complex data challenges.
  • Ample opportunities for personal and professional development, both on the job and through regular training (e-commerce topics, technical skills, soft skills, and leadership training) made available on our proprietary learning platform Intrepid University
  • You will work with many brilliant co-workers who are movers and shakers of the industry, as well as with leading brand and ecosystem partners across all categories to shape their presence across all e-commerce platforms in the years to come, and will have a broad view of the latest developments in the South East Asian e-commerce ecosystem

The part you will play

The Affiliate Lead plays a strategic leadership role in driving Intrepid’s affiliate and creator/KOL marketing ecosystem to deliver sustainable GMV growth across key social commerce and e-Commerce platforms for brands’ affiliate marketing activities.


This position will lead and develop the Affiliate  sub-teams, ensuring exceptional and consistent performance while streamlining collaboration across teams and departments. The main focus will be on scaling Intrepid’s Affiliate capabilities and driving performance growth, delivering brand and business objectives through strong strategic planning, expert stakeholder and people management, and a commitment to data-driven insights and decision making.


As an Affiliates Lead, you will take charge of 

  • Strategic Leadership & Planning
    • Develop and implement the Affiliate and creator/ KOL growth strategy, aligned with overall social commerce and commercial objectives.
    • Be able to build sustainable performance models, including commission tiers, incentive frameworks, and ROI optimization plans.
    • Translate business goals into clear execution roadmaps and action plans for both affiliate and creator/KOL sub-teams.
  • Affiliate Ecosystem & Partnership Development
    • Establish and nurture relationships with MCNs, creators/KOLs (especially top-tier ones), and the platforms.
    • Negotiate and co-create strategic partnership programs, ensuring Intrepid’s participation in all Affiliate projects with relevant parties.
    • Analyze market and competitor trends to predict shifts and identify growth and collaboration opportunities.
    • Ensure quality control in selecting creators, KOLs, MCNs, and evaluating their performance.
  • Team Management & Capability Building
    • Lead, coach, and empower Affiliate team members. Foster growth, accountability, and team motivation.
    • Build and optimize SOPs, best-practice frameworks, and planning and campaign review systems to drive consistent learning and capability building for the team.
    • Cultivate a culture of data-driven performance, proactive problem-solving, and cross-team collaboration.
    • Oversee the entire Affiliate team’s campaign planning and execution, and provide and guide team members with actionable insights for optimization.
  • Budget Management & Optimization
    • Manage campaign budgets, commission payouts, booking fees, and incentive programs effectively to ensure optimal ROI for brands.
    • Manage affiliate activities in accordance with brand guidelines and platform policies.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Experience & Competencies
  • 4 years of experience in affiliate marketing, creator/KOL affiliate marketing, or social commerce, including at least 1 years in team leadership.
  • Proven ability to build and manage partnerships with creators/ KOLs, MCNs, and affiliate marketing networks.
  • Strong understanding of affiliate activities on e-Commerce and social platforms, MCN, and creator/KOL operations. 
  • Proven success in managing teams and building team capacity. Excellent people management skills - able to develop, motivate, and retain talent.
  • Personal Attributes
  • Strategic thinker with strong analytical and commercial acumen.
  • Data-driven and results-oriented, motivated by measurable growth and performance outcomes.
  • Exceptional communication and stakeholder management abilities.
  • Proactive, adaptable, and comfortable operating in a fast-paced environment.
  • Strong project management, prioritization, and cross-department coordination skills.
  • Fluent in English.


In return, you will be getting

  • You will work with our portfolio of leading international brands, delivering engaging livestreams and video content to the highest standards. This role offers exposure and experience that can open many opportunities in the industry. Many of our livestream hosts have gone on to become key brand ambassadors or built followings of millions while at Intrepid — the world is truly your oyster!
