The team you will be part of

The Brand Management Team is the trusted partner for leading brands across Southeast Asia in strategic planning and driving sustainable online business growth. By analyzing performance, identifying opportunities, and aligning with our clients' commercial objectives, the team develops and executes data-backed strategies that maximize conversion and revenue. With a strong grasp of category dynamics and platform trends, and driving collaboration and coordination across other functions internally, Brand Management plays a key role in shaping long-term brand success in the digital commerce space.


The part you will play

A Key Account Manager is the liaison officer between Intrepid, its clients, and the platforms the client is selling on. He/She oversees the Intrepid-client relationship, determines opportunities, and identifies process improvements to grow their online sales revenue and to ensure Intrepid delivers the service level agreement.


As a Key Account Manager you will take charge of 

  • Deliver & perform  on the following KPIs for brand/seller partners, through internal & external coordination with concerned departments:
    • Content management & optimization
    • Campaign strategies & execution
    • Chat response representation of the brand/seller
    • Operations capacity and process implementation
    • Progressive revenue trend and overall online sales performance
  • Foster client relationships; work with sales and marketing teams and other support teams available
  • Design  sales growth proposals; handle client communications and prepare client reports; and communicate client agendas to other staff members
  • Ensure clients’ needs are met and their voices are heard while coordinating with others and fulfilling the contractual day-to-day duties
  • Positive client NPS


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Fluent in English
  • Experience with business fundamentals
  • eCommerce background from a brand/platforms/enablers is a plus
  • Proactive self-starter who understands Intrepid vision & mission and can be the company’s best service ambassador
  • Excellent negotiation skills
  • Strong interpersonal skills (empathy & flexibility)
  • Proficient in Excel and PowerPoint


In return, you will be getting

  • We work with the most ambitious leading brands in ecommerce across South East Asia and the brand management team is the key interface between brands and our different in-house teams. In this role, you will have the most holistic overview of all facets of driving a successful e-commerce business    
  • From Junior KAM to KAM to Senior KAM to Cluster Manager and beyond, this team offers a lot of opportunities for career progression and personal development, with increasing commercial and team management responsibilities
  • Advanced systems and tools support you in running the stores of our clients, so you can focus your time on analyses, planning and initiatives that have the highest impact
  • Brand Management is a very diverse discipline, from honing your analytical and commercial skills to communication, stakeholder management and negotiation, you will get to do it all and learn from a collaborative and supportive team of experts


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

Our Talent & People Team is the heartbeat of our organization - championing a culture where people thrive and potential is unlocked. From attracting top talent and shaping employee experiences to driving development, engagement, and retention, the team plays a strategic role in building and maintaining a high-performing, empowered workforce. We are here to grow with the business and for the people behind it.


The part you will play

Reporting to the Senior Regional HR Manager, the HR Business Partner will be a key player who supports business growth and builds a unique and strong people-oriented culture in our local office. As an advocate of our group’s HR initiatives, you will enjoy the benefits and satisfaction of supporting a wide range of functional teams through their growth and drive their evolution as the business scales up. You will champion Intrepid’s corporate culture in your business partnering practices and delivery of HR initiatives through our people managers in a timely, accurate, and compliant manner.


As a People Business Partner, you will take charge of 

  • Build trustful and credible working relationships with the business stakeholders through regular catch-ups, timely interactions, and proactive participation in on-going people and business discussions to deliver impact against priorities that will benefit both the business and employees
  •  Provides direction and coaching on HR programs, policies and processes, including and not limited to performance management, compensation, talent retention, learning and development, and career development roadmap
  •  Respond to employee relations issues, such as employee complaints, harassment allegations, and civil rights complaints
  • Create and drive change management and thoughtful learning programs to further enhance organisational health
  • Manage succession planning by administering accurate talent evaluation information through talent management.
  • Foster a company culture of open, transparent communications, and high standards of behaviour and ethical conduct throughout the organization.
  • Facilitate setup of Employee Engagement activities, including but not limited to Company and Country Townhalls, games nights, AMAs etc
  • Manage staffing plans and manpower deployment in assigned business unit Handle onboarding, offboarding and transfer administration for all people movements (e.g. new hires, promotions, transfers, re-designation, resignations/terminations etc
  • Support new joiners’ onboarding and offboarding process, including collating staff movement announcements, planning and executing teams orientation and other engagement programs such as office welcome tour, interns community program
  • Generate and analyse HR reports to improve efficiency and effectiveness of people decisions


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • University graduate with a minimum of 5 years of experience in Human Resources, with exposure to and demonstrated competence in all functional areas, and ideally some experience in high-growth companies and/or transformation projects
  • Demonstrated ability both to engage with stakeholders on strategic conversations, and to coach new managers on HR topics, especially in hybrid set-up
  • Strong service mentality and able to effectively and quickly build relationships and establish trust, respect, competence, and confidence
  • Solutions-focused, able to sort through information and develop concise and clear solutions quickly
  • Familiar with the local employment regulations and HR practices in the local country
  • Detail oriented with a logical and methodological approach to problem solving
  • Comfortable to work in fast-paced environment with high degree of autonomy
  • Excellent written & verbal communication skills in English


In return, you will be getting

  • Tackling the sophisticated people's challenges in the rapidly evolving e-commerce landscape with data insights and innovative solutions.    
  • You will be joining an all-star People Team that consistently raises the bar by combining the systems and processes of a small multinational with the collaborative, innovative, and agile spirit of a startup in an ever-evolving world.
  • With our team’s rapid growth and the People Team launching new initiatives to enhance both employee experience and performance, you willl benefit from a wide range of opportunities for development. Our structured learning programs covering both functional skills and broader growth are designed to support you at every stage of your journey
  • Our supportive culture and close collaboration between regional and local teams create a close-knit work environment which many in our team love and thrive in


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.title: Junior Key Account Manager
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

The Brand Management Team is the trusted partner for leading brands across Southeast Asia in strategic planning and driving sustainable online business growth. By analyzing performance, identifying opportunities, and aligning with our clients' commercial objectives, the team develops and executes data-backed strategies that maximize conversion and revenue. With a strong grasp of category dynamics and platform trends, and driving collaboration and coordination across other functions internally, Brand Management plays a key role in shaping long-term brand success in the digital commerce space.


The part you will play

The Online Trade Activation Executive supports the execution of e-commerce campaigns and daily online operations across marketplaces. This role ensures product listings, promotions, and online assets are accurate, conversion-ready, and aligned with brand guidelines. It is suited for candidates who want to grow into an Online Brand / E- commerce Manager role.


As an Online Trade Activation Executive, you will take charge of

  • Execute and support e-commerce campaigns, promotions, and trade mechanics across platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, website), with understanding of the commercial objective behind each activation.
  • Create, update, and maintain product listings, ensuring accuracy in pricing, content, and visuals, and flag potential issues that may impact conversion or customer experience.
  • Ensure product pages follow brand guidelines and are optimized for conversion (keywords, visuals, cross-selling).
  • Support adaptation of online assets (banners, posters, basic ad visuals) to meet platform requirements.
  • Coordinate with agencies and internal teams to fix listing or campaign issues, taking ownership to ensure issues are resolved promptly.
  • Monitor stock availability, campaign readiness, and basic performance signals during key campaigns, and escalate risks early.
  • Support customer review monitoring and escalate service or product issues when needed.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • 1–3 years experience in e-commerce, marketplace operations, or online trade execution.
  • Strong attention to detail and execution discipline.
  • Good understanding of the online customer journey and conversion drivers.
  • Proficient in English and Bahasa Malaysia for basic copywriting and keyword optimization.
  • Good visual judgement and ability to adapt assets for online platforms.
  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced e-commerce environment and being on standby during peak campaigns.
  • Curious, proactive, and eager to learn beyond task execution.


Nice to Have

  • Experience in beauty, FMCG, or digital commerce.
  • Familiarity with Shopee, Lazada, or TikTok Shop backends.
  • Basic knowledge of SEO or marketplace search behavior.


In return, you will be getting

  • We work with the most ambitious leading brands in ecommerce across South East Asia and the brand management team is the key interface between brands and our different in-house teams. In this role, you will have the most holistic overview of all facets of driving a successful e-commerce business    
  • From Junior KAM to KAM to Senior KAM to Cluster Manager and beyond, this team offers a lot of opportunities for career progression and personal development, with increasing commercial and team management responsibilities
  • Advanced systems and tools support you in running the stores of our clients, so you can focus your time on analyses, planning and initiatives that have the highest impact
  • Brand Management is a very diverse discipline, from honing your analytical and commercial skills to communication, stakeholder management and negotiation, you will get to do it all and learn from a collaborative and supportive team of experts

We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

The team you will be part of

The Digital Marketing Team is the engine behind data-driven growth for our brand partners across Southeast Asia’s eCommerce landscape. Specializing in performance marketing across marketplaces like Shopee, Lazada & TikTok, we focus on the entire 360-degree customer journey and build better digital experiences at each stage of the funnel. From media planning to real-time optimization and analytics on Meta, Google & Programmatic, the team partners closely with clients to unlock the full potential of eCommerce marketing—turning insights into action, and clicks into conversions.


The part you will play

Intrepid Asia is seeking a dynamic and strategic Regional Lead, Marketplaces and Ecommerce Excellence to join the regional team. The role will be involved in working with 6 markets across the SEA region.


As a Regional Lead, Marketplaces and Ecommerce Excellence you will take charge of 

  • Develop and advise on eCommerce marketing & campaign strategies for key regional accounts across the marketplaces, platforms, and properties, in accordance with their brand goals and current trends.
  • Drive platform excellence through data analysis, performance tracking, and implementation of best practices
  • Provide end-to-end client servicing, acting as the main point of contact for key regional accounts/
  • Work closely with the teams and platform SPOCs to ensure a comprehensive approach
  • Drive regionally for our in house retail media ad tech proprietary adoption across markets and brands, conduct audits and advise on strategies.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • 8–12 years of experience in eCommerce performance marketing
  • Background from an eCommerce enabler, agency commerce team 
  • Strong understanding of the SEA eCommerce and marketplace ecosystem
  • Hands-on expertise on-site and off-site media, with a strong focus on Shopee and Lazada
  • Clear ownership and understanding of commercial targets (GMV, ROI, efficiency, growth)


In return, you will be getting

  • We are consistently ranked as a top-3 retail media expert across South East Asia, managing adds across all ecommerce channels for many of the leading international brands
  • Our state-of-the-art in-house MarTech automates a lot of manual work and allows you to run and optimize campaigns in more sophisticated ways, delivering superior results, with amazing reporting capabilities to easily oversee all campaigns across all channels
  • You will join an ambitious, entrepreneurial and rapidly growing (and fun!) Marketing team, where everyone is keen to hone their skills and capabilities and expand our business across verticals.
  • We rapidly expand our full funnel services offerings to our clients, both TikTok-centered and in general, providing an integrated and impactful solution


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

ad.title: Livestream Host
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. The team you will be part of

The Social Commerce Team is a fast-growing team leading the way in livestream selling, short video content, and affiliate marketing across Southeast Asia. We work with top brands, combining creativity, data, and platform expertise to drive real commercial results. As part of Intrepid’s end-to-end eCommerce ecosystem, we gain broad exposure across operations, collaborate with cross-functional experts, and play a key role in shaping how brands connect with digital shoppers in real time.


As a Live Host, you will take charge of 

  • Responsible for conducting LIVE Streaming as a Host on various online platforms (not limited to TikTok, Lazada & Shopee) on a daily basis, including weekends.
  • To introduce, promote and demonstrate various brand products such as during LIVE Streaming within guidelines provided.
  • To interact and engage with online audiences in a professional manner and respond to enquiries during LIVE Streaming.
  • Proactively encourage online audiences to find out, explore and browse the brand products and subsequently proceed to make an online purchase during LIVE Streaming.
  • Encourage audience participation by presenting interactive activities, challenges and giveaways during LIVE Streaming.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Prior experience in hosting live social media events
  • The host should have prior hosting experience and demonstrate strong product understanding in one or more categories.
  • The host must be fluent in both Bahasa Malaysia and English (must have).
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills with the ability to captivate audiences
  • Fluent English and Bahasa Malaysia speaking is a requirement for this role.
  • The ideal candidate should possess a fun, energetic, and confident personality.


In return, you will be getting

  • You will work with our portfolio of leading international brands, delivering engaging livestreams and video content to the highest standards. This role offers exposure and experience that can open many opportunities in the industry. Many of our livestream hosts have gone on to become key brand ambassadors or built followings of millions while at Intrepid — the world is truly your oyster!
  • We believe in an end to end omni-channel and full funnel approach to ensure seamless and consistent consumer journeys, and intrepid is one of the very few players who offer that full array of services under one roof. Brands love this model as it's streamlined and delivers strong performance, hence we are rapidly growing. This offers you wide exposure and exciting growth opportunities
  • We believe in the combined power of creative genius and a data-driven approach. Whether it is live streaming, video or affiliates, you will have the data and knowledge how to analyze & optimize at your fingertips, so you can add that spark of creative brilliance to create magic. With your talent and our training, we deliver high performance.
  • We are international, we know how to scale, and we are stable. Content is local, but what resonates and best practices apply across countries. Our regional exposure and teams allow us to learn faster and organize ourselves in the best way possible. You are joining a proven international company with a strong track record, but we move fast with a lot of freedom, a collaborative culture and no politics. The best of both worlds.

We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. ad.title: Ecommerce Performance Marketing Manager (Shopee/Lazada/TikTokshop)
ad.description:
Who we are
Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of
The Digital Marketing Team is the engine behind data-driven growth for our brand partners across Southeast Asia’s eCommerce landscape. Specializing in performance marketing across marketplaces like Shopee, Lazada & TikTok, we focus on the entire 360-degree customer journey and build better digital experiences at each stage of the funnel. From media planning to real-time optimization and analytics on Meta, Google & Programmatic, the team partners closely with clients to unlock the full potential of eCommerce marketing—turning insights into action, and clicks into conversions.


The part you will play

We are looking for a Ecommerce Performance Marketing Manager, who can drive forward our marketing services as a critical part of Intrepid’s overall business. This person will own the relationships with a variety of our leading Brand partners, manage best-in-class digital marketing and execute campaigns that are aligned with our clients’ objectives and help them seize the full potential of ecommerce-driven digital marketing.


As a Ecommerce Performance Marketing Manager, you will take charge of

  • Work as lead on regional account/cluster with executive/executives reporting to you
  • Act as the go to person for market leads on the account cluster
  • Lead client management, ensuring strong relationships and smooth execution.
  • Oversee campaign setup, strategic direction, and optimisation to achieve key KPI metrics across eCommerce marketplaces (Shopee/Lazada/Tiktok), SEM (Google Shopping), and social media (Collaborative/CPAS).
  • Work closely with client teams to develop marketing plans and KPIs, as well as ongoing reporting
  • Manage revenue delivery and budget spending, including daily optimization and providing real-time targeting recommendations
  • Create A/B testing frameworks and implementation to ensure consistent growth
  • Manage Analytics and performance report sharing with clients, advising them on optimization potential and insights


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Media, Business, or any related fields
  • 4+ years (digital) marketing/e-commerce marketing experience, either working with e-commerce platforms or a marketing role in a media agency/e-commerce enabler/distributor
  • Must know ecommerce Marketplace marketing – (i.e. Lazada, Shopee, Tiktok) 
  • Experience in client management is essential
  • Experience in Facebook Ads is a good to have
  • Experienced in media planning, setting, and managing budgets, optimizing ad performance, and negotiating with 3rd parties
  • Experience in tracking (e-commerce tracking, Google analytics, Google tag manager,  Facebook Pixel tracking, UTM, 3rd Party Ad Serving (Campaign Manager))
  • Strong understanding of major advertising success metrics
  • Familiar with measurement platforms like Google Analytics and Google Marketing Platform
  • Strong analytical skills with an excellent sense of data and numbers
  • Able to quickly adapt and thrive in a fast-paced start-up and e-commerce environment
  • Fluent in English
  • Digital Marketing Certification on Meta (Facebook) and Google Ads and e-commerce, e.g. Shopee/Lazada/Tiktok, Marketing Solutions background is a plus.


In return, you will be getting
We are consistently ranked as a top-3 retail media expert across South East Asia, managing adds across all ecommerce channels for many of the leading international brands
Our state-of-the-art in-house MarTech automates a lot of manual work and allows you to run and optimize campaigns in more sophisticated ways, delivering superior results, with amazing reporting capabilities to easily oversee all campaigns across all channels
You will join an ambitious, entrepreneurial and rapidly growing (and fun!) Marketing team, where everyone is keen to hone their skills and capabilities and expand our business across verticals.
We rapidly expand our full funnel services offerings to our clients, both TikTok-centered and in general, providing an integrated and impactful solution



We also offer
Best of Both Worlds
We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

Culture that Brings Out the Best
At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Grow Without Limits
Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

Rewarding You Right
We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.title: Affiliate Manager
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

The Social Commerce Team is a fast-growing team leading the way in livestream selling, short video content, and affiliate marketing across Southeast Asia. We work with top brands, combining creativity, data, and platform expertise to drive real commercial results. As part of Intrepid’s end-to-end eCommerce ecosystem, we gain broad exposure across operations, collaborate with cross-functional experts, and play a key role in shaping how brands connect with digital shoppers in real time.


The part you will play

As the Affiliate and KOL Manager at Intrepid, you will play a key role in driving revenue and customer acquisition through performance-based partnerships. You will be responsible for building, managing, and scaling affiliate marketing and KOL programs to support Intrepid’s eCommerce growth objectives.


You will oversee the end-to-end strategy, execution, and optimization of campaigns.

This includes recruiting new partners, managing ongoing relationships, tracking performance metrics, and ensuring alignment with business goals.


You will collaborate closely with internal teams across marketing, commercial, product, and analytics, as well as with external partners and influencers, to launch high-impact initiatives that drive traffic, conversions, and brand visibility.


As an Affiliate Manager, you will take charge of 

  • Program Leadership: Lead and manage the Affiliate and KOL marketing programs, including strategy development, execution, and continuous optimization.
  • Team Management: Supervise and mentor a team of 3-5 members, providing guidance, feedback, and support to ensure high performance and development.
  • Recruit Affiliates / Partners: Identify, recruit, and build relationships with high-potential affiliates and KOLs to drive brand visibility and conversions, Negotiate commission rates and partnership terms.
  • Campaign Optimization: Monitor, analyze, and optimize both affiliate and KOL campaigns to meet traffic, conversion, and revenue KPIs.
  • Relationship Building: Develop and maintain strong relationships with affiliates, KOLs, influencers, and networks, fostering collaboration and long-term partnerships.
  • Collaboration: Work closely with the marketing, sales, and content teams to align campaigns with overall brand and business goals.
  • Budget & Resource Management: Manage the affiliate and KOL marketing budgets efficiently to ensure the best return on investment (ROI).
  • Performance Reporting: Provide regular performance reports with data-driven insights and recommendations for improvements.
  • Compliance & Quality Assurance: Ensure affiliate and KOL practices comply with company policies, industry regulations, and brand standards.
  • Collaborate Cross- Functionally: Work with marketing, content, and product teams to sync affiliate promotions with overall eCommerce campaigns.

What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Experience: 3-5 years of experience in affiliate marketing, influencer marketing, or digital marketing, with at least 1-2 years of team management experience.
  • Leadership Skills: Proven ability to manage and motivate a small team to achieve targets and perform optimally.
  • Affiliate & KOL Expertise: Strong knowledge of affiliate marketing networks, influencer management tools, and content creation strategies.
  • Analytical Skills: Ability to use data and analytics to track performance, identify trends, and make informed decisions.
  • Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills in both English and Malay, with a knack for building relationships and negotiating terms.
  • Results-Oriented: A proactive, self-motivated approach with a strong focus on achieving measurable outcomes.


In return, you will be getting

  • You will work with our portfolio of leading international brands, delivering engaging livestreams and video content to the highest standards. This role offers exposure and experience that can open many opportunities in the industry. Many of our livestream hosts have gone on to become key brand ambassadors or built followings of millions while at Intrepid — the world is truly your oyster!
  • We believe in an end to end omni-channel and full funnel approach to ensure seamless and consistent consumer journeys, and intrepid is one of the very few players who offer that full array of services under one roof. Brands love this model as it's streamlined and delivers strong performance, hence we are rapidly growing. This offers you wide exposure and exciting growth opportunities
  • We believe in the combined power of creative genius and a data-driven approach. Whether it is live streaming, video or affiliates, you will have the data and knowledge how to analyze & optimize at your fingertips, so you can add that spark of creative brilliance to create magic. With your talent and our training, we deliver high performance.
  • We are international, we know how to scale, and we are stable. Content is local, but what resonates and best practices apply across countries. Our regional exposure and teams allow us to learn faster and organize ourselves in the best way possible. You are joining a proven international company with a strong track record, but we move fast with a lot of freedom, a collaborative culture and no politics. The best of both worlds.

We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

Livestream Planning & Coordination:

  • Oversee the end-to-end planning and execution of livestream events.
  • Coordinate schedules, resources to ensure livestreams run smoothly.
  • Work with the brand to understand the event’s goals and ensure alignment with overall production plans.

Technical Management:

  • Ensure all technical aspects of the livestream (audio, video, lighting, equipment setup) are operational and optimized.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve any technical issues during live broadcasts.
  • Collaborate with the technical crew to set up livestream platforms, including video streaming software and hardware.

Communication & Team Collaboration:

  • Communicate with external vendors, partners, and stakeholders to coordinate livestream sessions.
  • Ensure clear communication before, during, and after the livestream event to all involved parties.

Content & Audience Engagement:

  • Assist in creating engaging content and promote interactive elements (chat, polls, Q&A) to increase audience participation.
  • Monitor live chat and interactions, responding to viewer questions and concerns in real-time.
  • Analyze performance metrics and gather feedback to optimize future livestreams.

Post-Livestream Activities:

  • Assist in post-event analysis, including reviewing event performance, feedback, and audience engagement data.
  • Coordinate the editing and publishing of recorded livestreams on appropriate platforms.
  • Help prepare post-event reports for internal and external stakeholders.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Communications, Media Production, or a related field (preferred).
  • Proven experience in livestream coordination or event production.
  • Strong understanding of livestream platforms (e.g., YouTube, Facebook Live, Twitch) and technical tools used for streaming.
  • Excellent organizational, multitasking, and problem-solving skills.
  • Ability to work under pressure and handle unexpected challenges during live events.
  • Strong communication skills and ability to work effectively in a team environment.
  • Basic knowledge of video production and editing tools (preferred).


Preferred Skills:

  • Experience with video streaming software (e.g., OBS, Streamlabs, Wirecast).
  • Familiarity with social media platforms and engagement strategies.
  • Passion for live broadcasting and online content creation.

Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful e-commerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

Our Operations Team ensures that everything runs like clockwork behind the scenes—managing warehouse activities, inventory flow, and fulfilment with precision and efficiency. From stock accuracy to timely dispatch, the team plays a crucial role in delivering a seamless end-to-end eCommerce experience. With a strong focus on process, coordination, and control, Operations keeps our promises to customers and clients every single day.


The part you will play

The Junior Operations Executive is responsible for the monitoring of order process flow from receiving of order from Seller center to Customer(s) doorstep. He/she will also need to provide insights on the day-to-day activities to ensure that operations will run smoothly.


As the Junior Operations Executive you will take charge of 

  • Review current supply chain operations to document product, service, and information flow using project management tools
  • Handle returns and exchanges, which may involve processing customer returns or exchanges, updating inventory records, and restocking items as necessary
  • Liaise with internal teams and external stakeholders to conduct accurate and timely monthly stock reconciliation for assigned brands, ensuring alignment on inventory records, resolving discrepancies, and supporting smooth end-of-month reporting and settlement processes.
  • Assist with shipping and receiving, which may include preparing orders for shipment, verifying that orders are complete and accurate, and processing incoming deliveries
  • Analyze customer information and needs to improve customer relationships.
  • Evaluate risk factors that impact efficiency.
  • Evaluate all weekly metrics and analyze all continuous improvement project and prepare reports for all requests.
  • Monitor lapses in delivery of logistics services to customers.
  • Optimize use of allocated resources within business activities.
  • Plan delivery of logistics services that meet customer requirements.
  • Support development of sales proposals or tender documents.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • With at least 6 months’ experience in warehouse operations
  • Knowledgeable in Warehouse, ecommerce and logistics.
  • Must be able to work as part of the team in a fast paced and pressured environment
  • Intermediate proficiency in MS Office, Excel & Outlook.
  • Strong organizational skills with an analytical mind
  • Strong time management skills. 


In return, you will be getting

  • Operations in e-commerce is an incredibly dynamic field—marked by rapid replenishment cycles, tight fulfilment timelines, and major demand spikes during campaigns. It’s fast-paced, challenging, and comes with an undeniable adrenaline rush!
  • Intrepid partners with leading international brands across categories such as FMCG, fashion, and electronics—each with its own unique operational needs. With multi-warehouse and omni-channel fulfilment solutions, we create the ultimate operations playground. It’s a complex, fast-paced environment with plenty to learn and tremendous satisfaction once mastered—offering strong potential for career growth and development.
  • You don't have to manage everything in Excel, we run a lot of processes on our advanced inhouse systems and automate where we can. Many of our warehouses are fully API integrated. Of course, being precise and good with numbers will help in any system.
  • As we are an international company, you will work with colleagues in country who 'own' running the daily operations and driving local improvement, supported by the senior expertise of our regional team to drive system innovation and process optimizations across countries, which creates a fantastic learning environment


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.title: Affiliate Executive
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

The Social Commerce Team is a fast-growing team leading the way in livestream selling, short video content, and affiliate marketing across Southeast Asia. We work with top brands, combining creativity, data, and platform expertise to drive real commercial results. As part of Intrepid’s end-to-end eCommerce ecosystem, we gain broad exposure across operations, collaborate with cross-functional experts, and play a key role in shaping how brands connect with digital shoppers in real time.


The part you will play

We are looking for a results-driven Affiliate Executive to manage and grow our affiliate marketing initiatives, with a strong focus on TikTok Shop campaigns. The ideal candidate has 1–2 years of proven experience in affiliate marketing, influencer management, or e-commerce, particularly in TikTok Shop live selling, campaigns, and performance optimization. You will be responsible for building relationships with affiliates, optimizing performance, and ensuring campaigns meet KPIs while aligning with the brand's marketing objectives.


As an Affiliate Executive, you will take charge of 

  • Manage day-to-day operations of the affiliate program, primarily on TikTok Shop, from recruitment to campaign execution.
  • Identify, onboard, and nurture relationships with affiliates, creators, and live streamers to promote brand products.
  • Coordinate with content creators to ensure brand messaging and visuals are aligned with campaign goals.
  • Monitor affiliate performance, analyze data, and prepare regular reports to track ROI and sales growth.
  • Negotiate commission structures and special incentives to maximize affiliate engagement.
  • Collaborate with marketing, e-commerce, and creative teams to develop strategies that drive traffic and conversions.
  • Stay updated on TikTok Shop trends, algorithm changes, and competitive landscape to keep campaigns optimized.
  • Assist in planning and executing promotional campaigns for e-commerce sales events (e.g., 8.8, 9.9, 11.11).
  • Ensure all affiliate activities comply with brand guidelines and platform policies.
  • Explore and test new affiliate platforms and marketing opportunities for expansion.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Strong understanding of TikTok Shop affiliate tools and campaign mechanics.
  • Excellent communication and relationship management skills.
  • Data-driven mindset with the ability to analyze metrics and make strategic decisions.
  • Basic knowledge of online sales funnels, performance marketing, and social media engagement.
  • Self-motivated and proactive with a problem-solving attitude.
  • Able to work under pressure and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
  • Creative thinker who can adapt to trends quickly.
  • Experience managing multi-category products (e.g., fashion, beauty, FMCG).
  • Knowledge of other affiliate platforms or influencer marketing tools.
  • Background in live selling or campaign project management.


In return, you will be getting

  • You will work with our portfolio of leading international brands, delivering engaging livestreams and video content to the highest standards. This role offers exposure and experience that can open many opportunities in the industry. Many of our livestream hosts have gone on to become key brand ambassadors or built followings of millions while at Intrepid — the world is truly your oyster!
  • We believe in an end to end omni-channel and full funnel approach to ensure seamless and consistent consumer journeys, and intrepid is one of the very few players who offer that full array of services under one roof. Brands love this model as it's streamlined and delivers strong performance, hence we are rapidly growing. This offers you wide exposure and exciting growth opportunities
  • We believe in the combined power of creative genius and a data-driven approach. Whether it is live streaming, video or affiliates, you will have the data and knowledge how to analyze & optimize at your fingertips, so you can add that spark of creative brilliance to create magic. With your talent and our training, we deliver high performance.
  • We are international, we know how to scale, and we are stable. Content is local, but what resonates and best practices apply across countries. Our regional exposure and teams allow us to learn faster and organize ourselves in the best way possible. You are joining a proven international company with a strong track record, but we move fast with a lot of freedom, a collaborative culture and no politics. The best of both worlds.


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.


Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.title: Ecommerce Senior Performance Marketing Executive (Shopee/Lazada)
ad.description:
Who we are

The team you will be part of

The Digital Marketing Team is the engine behind data-driven growth for our brand partners across Southeast Asia’s eCommerce landscape. Specializing in performance marketing across marketplaces like Shopee, Lazada & TikTok, we focus on the entire 360-degree customer journey and build better digital experiences at each stage of the funnel. From media planning to real-time optimization and analytics on Meta, Google & Programmatic, the team partners closely with clients to unlock the full potential of eCommerce marketing—turning insights into action, and clicks into conversions.


The part you will play

We are looking for a Senior Performance Marketing Executive to be based in Indonesia, who can drive forward our marketing services as a critical part of Intrepid’s overall business. This person will own the relationships with a variety of our leading Brand partners, manage best-in-class digital marketing and execute campaigns that are aligned with our client’s objectives and help them seize the full potential of e-commerce-driven digital marketing. 


Marketing Services include paid performance marketing, e-commerce platform ads, and social commerce for our clients.


As a Senior Performance Marketing Executive, you will take charge of 

  • Setting up, managing, and optimizing campaigns to drive key KPI metrics across ecomm marketplaces (Shopee and Lazada), SEM (Google Shopping), and social media (Collaborative/CPAS).
  • Work closely with client teams to develop marketing plans and KPIs, as well as ongoing reporting
  • Manage revenue delivery and budget spending, including daily optimization and providing real-time targeting recommendations
  • Create A/B testing frameworks and implementation to ensure consistent growth
  • Manage Analytics and performance report sharing with clients, advising them on optimization potential and insights


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Media, Business, or any related fields
  • 2+ years (digital) marketing/e-commerce marketing experience, either working with e-commerce platforms or a marketing role in a media agency/e-commerce enabler/distributor
  • Extensive knowledge of Google Ads OR eCommerce Marketplace Search Ads essential (i.e. Lazada, Shopee)
  • Experience in Facebook and TikTok  Ads is a plus
  • Experienced in media planning, setting, and managing budgets, optimizing ad performance, and negotiating with 3rd parties
  • Experience in tracking (e-commerce tracking, Google analytics, Google tag manager,  Facebook Pixel tracking, UTM, 3rd Party Ad Serving (Campaign Manager))
  • Strong understanding of major advertising success metrics
  • Familiar with measurement platforms like Google Analytics and Google Marketing Platform
  • Strong analytical skills with an excellent sense of data and numbers
  • Able to quickly adapt and thrive in a fast-paced start-up and e-commerce environment
  • Fluent in English
  • Digital Marketing Certification on Meta (Facebook) and Google Ads and e-commerce, e.g. Shopee and Lazada, Marketing Solutions background is a plus


In return, you will be getting

  • We are consistently ranked as a top-3 retail media expert across South East Asia, managing ads across all ecommerce channels for many of the leading international brands
  • Our state-of-the-art in-house MarTech automates a lot of manual work and allows you to run and optimize campaigns in more sophisticated ways, delivering superior results, with amazing reporting capabilities to easily oversee all campaigns across all channels
  • You will join an ambitious, entrepreneurial and rapidly growing (and fun!) Marketing team, where everyone is keen to hone their skills and capabilities and expand our business across verticals.
  • We rapidly expand our full funnel services offerings to our clients, both TikTok-centered and in general, providing an integrated and impactful solution


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.


Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.


Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.


Rewarding You Right

That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. ad.description:
Who we are
