By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

The Social Commerce Team is a fast-growing team leading the way in livestream selling, short video content, and affiliate marketing across Southeast Asia. We work with top brands, combining creativity, data, and platform expertise to drive real commercial results. As part of Intrepid’s end-to-end eCommerce ecosystem, we gain broad exposure across operations, collaborate with cross-functional experts, and play a key role in shaping how brands connect with digital shoppers in real time.


The part you will play

Intrepid, a leading eCommerce enabler in Southeast Asia, is seeking a dynamic Head of Video and Production to help shape the future of social commerce in Indonesia. Acting as the right hand to the Head of Social Commerce, this role combines creative strategy, production leadership, and team development to deliver outstanding results for global brands.


The role will play a pivotal role in driving business growth, elevating creative standards, and building best-in-class livestream and video capabilities that scale across platforms such as TikTok, Shopee, and Lazada.


As a Head of Video & Creative Content, you will take charge of 

This role will be assisting the Head of Social Commerce to deliver the business targets and priorities regarding the following responsibilities.


Creative & Strategic Direction

  • Shape the creative vision and content strategy for livestream and video production.
  • Identify emerging trends, formats, and storytelling techniques to keep content fresh and impactful.
  • Align video strategies with broader business and campaign goals.


Building the Video & Livestream Function

  • Develop scalable production capabilities, including studio setup, equipment, and workflows.
  • Establish playbooks, standards, and best practices to raise quality and efficiency across markets.
  • Drive innovation by adopting new tools, features, and creative approaches

 

Production Leadership & Quality

  • Oversee planning, pre-production, and execution of livestream campaigns.
  • Ensure technical excellence in broadcast quality (camera, lighting, sound, graphics).
  • Provide real-time guidance during livestreams to maximize engagement and conversion.


Team Development & Collaboration

  • Lead and mentor a cross-functional production team (manager, strategist, videographer).
  • Set KPIs, monitor performance, and foster a culture of creativity and collaboration
  • Partner with creative and marketing teams to ensure seamless execution.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

Education: Bachelor’s degree in  Media, Communications, Marketing, Business

Experience:

  • 5+ years of experience in video and livestream production, with a strong creative portfolio ideally within eCommerce, Merchandising, Media, or digital marketing.
  • Demonstrated success in  managing high-quality creative campaigns ideally with livestream and video  production.
  • Strong leadership skills with experience managing cross-functional production teams.
  • Technical knowledge of studio setups, livestream equipment, lighting, audio, and editing software is required
  • Strategic thinker with the ability to balance big-picture planning with hands-on execution in a fast-paced environment.


In return, you will be getting

  • You will work with our portfolio of leading international brands, delivering engaging livestreams and video content to the highest standards. This role offers exposure and experience that can open many opportunities in the industry. Many of our livestream hosts have gone on to become key brand ambassadors or built followings of millions while at Intrepid — the world is truly your oyster!
  • We believe in an end to end omni-channel and full funnel approach to ensure seamless and consistent consumer journeys, and intrepid is one of the very few players who offer that full array of services under one roof. Brands love this model as it's streamlined and delivers strong performance, hence we are rapidly growing. This offers you wide exposure and exciting growth opportunities
  • We believe in the combined power of creative genius and a data-driven approach. Whether it is live streaming, video or affiliates, you will have the data and knowledge how to analyze & optimize at your fingertips, so you can add that spark of creative brilliance to create magic. With your talent and our training, we deliver high performance.
  • We are international, we know how to scale, and we are stable. Content is local, but what resonates and best practices apply across countries. Our regional exposure and teams allow us to learn faster and organize ourselves in the best way possible. You are joining a proven international company with a strong track record, but we move fast with a lot of freedom, a collaborative culture and no politics. The best of both worlds.


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.title: Regional Commercial Strategy Specialist (Competency Development)
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

The Brand Management Team is the trusted partner for leading brands across Southeast Asia in strategic planning and driving sustainable online business growth. By analyzing performance, identifying opportunities, and aligning with our clients' commercial objectives, the team develops and executes data-backed strategies that maximize conversion and revenue. With a strong grasp of category dynamics and platform trends, and driving collaboration and coordination across other functions internally, Brand Management plays a key role in shaping long-term brand success in the digital commerce space.


The part you will play

As the Regional Commercial L&D Specialist, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and executing digital learning solutions for a leading regional retail organisation. You’ll lead the creation and rollout of commercial capability-building programs that enable best-in-class omnichannel retail and digital commerce performance across Southeast Asia & China.



Key Responsibilities

Learning Program Ownership: Architect, localize, and deploy learning modules for the Digital Academy, covering topics like ecommerce management, conversion optimization, channel strategy, digital marketing, commercial operations, and analytics.

Content Development:  Lead & build engaging, modular content and assessments (quizzes, activities, case studies) in line with business priorities and quality standards (objectives, accuracy, engagement, design, usability, assessment). Ensure content is SCORM-compliant and optimized for both self-paced digital and blended learning.
Regional Rollout:Manage end-to-end deployment of learning programs across all SEA markets; coordinate launch timelines and ensure content addresses both regional and market-specific needs.

Stakeholder Engagement : Collaborate with business leaders, internal L&D teams,external vendors and cross-functional partners to align learning initiatives with business goals.Collect feedback and measure program effectiveness against defined KPIs (e.g., completion rates, course feedbacks, revisions etc.)


What we are looking for


  • Bachelor’s degree (or higher) in Business or related field.
  • 3+ years in L&D, commercial capability building, or training roles, ideally in retail or ecommerce.
  • Experience designing and delivering learning solutions for regional or multi-market teams.
  • Solid understanding of omnichannel commerce, digital marketing, and commercial operations in Asia.
  • Track record managing learning projects from concept to rollout, with measurable business results.
  • Strong communication and facilitation skills (virtual and in-person).
  • Ability to work cross-functionally and engage stakeholders at all levels.
  • Experience with digital learning platforms, SCORM/LMS, and blended learning approaches is a plus
  • English fluency required; Mandarin fluency a plus.


In return, you will be getting

  • Opportunities to partner enterprise brands: We work with the most ambitious leading brands in ecommerce across South East Asia and the brand management team is the key interface between brands and our different in-house teams. In this role, you will have the most holistic overview of all facets of driving a successful e-commerce business    
  • Career mobility: From Junior KAM to KAM to Senior KAM to Cluster Manager and beyond, this team offers a lot of opportunities for career progression and personal development, with increasing commercial and team management responsibilities
  • Experience in data analytics and planning: Advanced systems and tools support you in running the stores of our clients, so you can focus your time on analyses, planning and initiatives that have the highest impact
  • Exposure to ecommerce 360: Brand Management is a very diverse discipline, from honing your analytical and commercial skills to communication, stakeholder management and negotiation, you will get to do it all and learn from a collaborative and supportive team of experts.


We also offer


Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.


Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.


Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.


Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.title: SaaS/Tech Business Development Manager (SEA)
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful e-commerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

Our business development team is in the driver's seat of growth for Intrepid. We develop precise local and regional insights on what the next big thing for e-commerce is, grow our e-commerce network in the region and work with our internal teams to deliver best-in-class solutions for our new clients. We oversee the end-to-end business development process in our respective markets and make everyday impact on a fast-growing organization.


The part you will play

We are looking for a strategic and high-energy SaaS/Tech Business Development Manager to spearhead the growth of our enterprise e-commerce technology suite across Southeast Asia. You will be at the forefront of driving digital transformation for Tier-1 brands, helping them navigate complex multi-channel ecosystems through our proprietary SaaS solutions.


As a SaaS/Tech Business Development Manager (SEA) , you will take charge of 

  • Market Intelligence & Strategy: Identify market gaps and competitor movements within the SEA e-commerce enabler and SaaS landscape.
  • Solution Architecting: Work closely with brands to understand their technical pain points (ERP integrations, OMS/WMS sync, cross-border complexities) and map them to our product capabilities.
  • Commercial Leadership: Lead the end-to-end sales cycle from prospecting to high-level negotiations with C-suite stakeholders.
  • Product Feedback Loop: Act as the "voice of the market," providing the Product and Tech teams with actionable insights on required features and local market nuances.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Industry Experience: 4–7 years of experience in Business Development or Account Management within the E-commerce SaaS, MarTech, or Enabler space.
  • Product Fluency: A deep understanding of how E-commerce platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, Shopify) integrate with enterprise middleware.
  • Strategic Network: Proven track record of managing enterprise-level clients locally/regionally
  • Competitive Knowledge: Familiarity with the regional tech landscape and the ability to articulate clear value propositions against other market players.


In return, you will be getting

  • Be part of a BD team that always strives to win and never settles for second place in the market.
  • Develop your knowledge in each part of the e-commerce solutions sales cycle, learn about different categories and business models in depth.
  • Tap into our network and develop your own network of senior stakeholders across platforms and leading brands to amplify your impact



We also offer


Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.


Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.


Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.


Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.title: Video Production Associate (motion graphic)
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

Our Merchandising & Creative Team brings brands and products to life through compelling visuals and on-brand storytelling. From graphic design and content creation to product presentation and campaign assets, the team crafts experiences that captivate and convert. With a keen eye for aesthetics and a strong understanding of digital commerce, we transform ideas into visuals that drive engagement, elevate brands, and enhance the online shopping journey.


The part you will play

We are seeking an energetic and creative Video Production Associate who will be responsible for ideating, developing, and executing social commerce video content (TikTok, Shopee Live) that drive brand awareness, engagement, impressions, and revenue. Candidates should be on the pulse of what’s next and trends within social and digital, and have a genuine passion for social commerce.


As a Video Production Associate, you will take charge of:

  • Designing motion graphics and animated elements for short-form videos (TikTok, Reels, Shorts) using AI tools or AI-generated video prompts.
  • Creating static visual assets such as thumbnails, KV adaptations, promotional banners, and livestream visuals.
  • Developing dynamic text animation, product highlights, transitions, and visual effects optimized for retention.
  • Supporting livestream overlays, frames, countdowns, and promotional layouts.
  • Utilizing AI-powered tools to enhance efficiency (auto-captioning, smart masking, generative elements, background removal, etc.).
  • Ensuring brand consistency across both motion and static assets.
  • Maintaining organized design libraries and updated visual assets.
  • Staying updated with motion design, graphic trends, and AI innovations in content production.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • 1–3 years of experience in video production, motion graphics, or multimedia design (fresh graduates with strong portfolios are welcome).
  • Hands-on experience with AI-powered creative tools (e.g., generative video, auto-captioning, background removal, AI prompting workflows)
  • Understanding of short-form content dynamics (TikTok, Reels, Shorts) and what drives audience retention.
  • Ability to create attractive short videos for social commerce platforms
  • Deep understanding of social media’s ecosystem: trends, hashtag, music usage, functionalities, guidelines, and platform updates.


In return, you will be getting

  • We pride ourselves on creating visuals that both inspire and perform. At Intrepid, design is part art and part science — we’ll help you elevate your creative talent through our strong merchandising and e-commerce expertise, complemented by ongoing design and AI training to help you create work that truly makes an impact.
  • You will see your work - for some of the leading brands in the world - featured across marketplaces and social platforms
  • We offer hybrid working to strike the right balance between being 'in the zone' delivering great work undisturbed, and spending time with your colleagues to bond and learn together
  • We provide you with the best designer tools (PC/laptop/MacBook and Adobe suite) you need


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.


Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. The part you will play

As a Key Account Manager, you will be responsible for managing and growing the ecommerce business of one or multiple brands across all ecommerce platforms As the brand’s main point of contact and trusted advisor, you create the ecommerce strategy and annual plans for your brands and take ownership of their business like it is yours. You negotiate with brand and platform stakeholders to maximize the attractiveness of propositions for consumers and exposure for the brand, in order to grow the business. You have a firm grasp of e-commerce fundamentals, digital marketing, campaign development and the growth levers that the different marketplaces offer. You coordinate with our different in-house teams and ensure that collectively you make your brand(s) successful. You are responsible for account NMV and revenue growth and work closely with the business development team to explore how your brands can benefit from additional services.


As a Key Account Manager you will take charge of 

  • Grow account NMV and revenue
  • Build strong relationships with your brand and platform counterparts 
  • Deliver expert recommendations on the best strategy / promotions / growth levers for brands
  • Develop annual growth plans and activation calendars and campaign proposals 
  • Manage cross-functional team to drive brand performance (Content, Store management, Operations, Chat) 
  • Ensure all brand / store KPIs are met
  • Collaborate on onboarding and growth plans for new brands
  • Collaborate with management on NMV goals, planning and forecasting 
  • Work together with Category Manager to ensure account retention and growth


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Min 2-3  years of relevant work experience in Ecommerce, ideally with a platform (Lazada / Shopee), with another enabler, or with a brand or distributor
  • Commercial performance-driven mindset, flexible & collaborative attitude, looking to make an impact and thriving in a fast-paced start-up environment
  • Strong interpersonal, relationship and communication, listening and negotiation skills
  • Ability to develop a brand ecommerce strategy and translate this into annual & monthly activation plans
  • Experience in developing digital / ecommerce campaign plans
  • Analytical skills to analyze data and make performance improvement suggestions
  • Project management experience
  • Good Excel and PowerPoint skills


In return, you will be getting

ad.title: Digital Marketing Executive
ad.description:
About Us
Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, a wide range of Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end to end.


The Role

We are looking for a Performance Marketing role to be based in Thailand, who can drive forward our marketing services as a critical part of Intrepid’s overall business. This person will own the relationships with a variety of our leading Brand partners, manage best-in-class digital marketing and execute campaigns that are aligned with our clients’ objectives and help them seize the full potential of ecommerce-driven digital marketing.


Marketing Services includes paid performance marketing, ecommerce platform ads and social commerce for our clients.


Your responsibilities will include:

  • You will be responsible for client account management and act as the main point of contact for your assigned clients or brands.
  • Plan and develop media plan as per brand objectives
  • Building and maintaining strong relationships with clients, understanding their goals and needs, and acting as a point of contact.
  • Work closely with media execution teams to achieve the campaign goals according to media plan
  • Monitor and optimize overall online marketing activities for the best campaign performance
  • Co-ordinate with other teams, e.g business development and brand manager teams, on campaign concept, commercial mechanics, creative direction etc.
  • Ensure client’s satisfaction on our services, performance and build good relationship with brands
  • Provide marketing key learning to brands with data analytics and performance report
  • Managing onsite ads in Lazada and Shopee

Who we look for - the ideal profile:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Media, Business, or any related fields
  • 2+ years (digital) marketing/e-commerce marketing experience, either working with e-commerce platforms or a marketing role in a media agency/e-commerce enabler/distributor
  • 2+ years of experience in online marketing, digital marketing, project management, performance marketing, E-commerce marketing, Media planning, Optimize Ads.
  • Good to know ecommerce Marketplace marketing – (i.e. Lazada, Shopee) 
  • Experienced in media planning, setting, and managing budgets, optimizing ad performance, and negotiating with 3rd parties
  • Good in English (able to communicate in English and Thai)
  • Able to communicate directly with clients and demonstrate strong client-facing skills
  • Experience in tracking (e-commerce tracking, Google analytics, Google tag manager,  Facebook Pixel tracking, UTM, 3rd Party Ad Serving (Campaign Manager)
  • Strong understanding of major advertising success metrics
  • Strong analytical skills with an excellent sense of data and numbers
  • Able to quickly adapt and thrive in a fast-paced start-up and e-commerce environment

What we offer

  • Excellent and competitive compensation package 
  • Professional and open international working environment – culturally integrating the best of all cultures to take the best of each and ensure we build an energetic, commercial, and fun working atmosphere. 
  • Ample opportunity for personal and professional development, both on the job and through regular training (Ecommerce topics, technical skills, soft skills and leadership training) made available on our proprietary learning platform
  • You will work with many brilliant co-workers who are movers and shakers of the industry, as well as with leading brand and ecosystem partners across all categories to shape their presence across all ecommerce platforms in the years to come, and will have a broad view on the latest developments in the South East Asian e-commerce ecosystem.

ad.title: Junior Performance Marketing Executive (Ads Optimization)
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 

We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

The Digital Marketing Team is the engine behind data-driven growth for our brand partners across Southeast Asia’s eCommerce landscape. Specializing in performance marketing across marketplaces like Shopee, Lazada & TikTok, we focus on the entire 360-degree customer journey and build better digital experiences at each stage of the funnel. From media planning to real-time optimization and analytics on Meta, Google & Programmatic, the team partners closely with clients to unlock the full potential of eCommerce marketing—turning insights into action, and clicks into conversions.


The part you will play

We are looking for a Junior Performance Marketing Executive to be based in Thailand, who can drive forward our marketing services as a critical part of Intrepid’s overall business. This person will own the relationships with a variety of our leading Brand partners, manage best-in-class digital marketing and execute campaigns that are aligned with our client’s objectives and help them seize the full potential of e-commerce-driven digital marketing.


As a Junior Performance Marketing Executive, you will take charge of 

  • Setting up, managing, and optimizing campaigns to drive key KPI metrics across e-comm marketplaces (Shopee and Lazada), SEM (Google Shopping), and social media (Collaborative/CPAS).Assist in setting up and managing digital marketing campaigns across e-commerce marketplaces (e.g. Shopee, Lazada), Google Ads, Social media platforms (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter), and affiliate channels.
  • Support the marketing team in executing campaigns to drive awareness and customer acquisition.
  • Work with internal and client teams to track campaign progress, performance, and key KPIs.
  • Help with daily campaign monitoring and basic optimizations to improve performance.
  • Contribute to testing different creatives, audiences, and platforms to find what works best.
  • Support in preparing campaign performance reports and basic analysis using tools like Excel or Google Sheets.
  • Assist with tracking setup and troubleshooting using tools such as Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, or UTM links (training will be provided).
  • Stay updated with digital marketing trends, platform updates, and competitor activities.

What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related field (or in progress).
  • 1–2 years of experience in digital marketing or e-commerce
  • Basic understanding of online advertising (Facebook Ads, Google Ads, or e-commerce marketplace ads is a plus).
  • Familiarity with social media platforms and how brands use them for marketing.
  • Interest in learning about campaign tracking tools such as Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, Google Tag Manager.
  • Strong attention to detail and a willingness to learn from data and feedback.
  • Able to work in a fast-paced team environment, especially in startup or e-commerce settings.
  • Digital marketing certifications (Facebook Blueprint, Google Ads, Shopee/Lazada training) are a plus, but not required.

In return, you will be getting

  • We are consistently ranked as a top-3 retail media expert across South East Asia, managing ads across all ecommerce channels for many of the leading international brands
  • Our state-of-the-art in-house MarTech automates a lot of manual work and allows you to run and optimize campaigns in more sophisticated ways, delivering superior results, with amazing reporting capabilities to easily oversee all campaigns across all channels
  • You will join an ambitious, entrepreneurial and rapidly growing (and fun!) Marketing team, where everyone is keen to hone their skills and capabilities and expand our business across verticals.
  • We rapidly expand our full funnel services offerings to our clients, both TikTok-centered and in general, providing an integrated and impactful solution

We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.


Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.


Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.


Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

  • Drive regional key account management for strategic clients, ensuring alignment with commercial objectives and consistent performance across markets
  • Drive commercial excellence projects pertaining to the adoption of internal and external tools to elevate Intrepid’s service quality

  • Advanced systems and tools support you in running the stores of our clients, so you can focus your time on analyses, planning and initiatives that have the highest impact

ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

Our Talent & People Team is the heartbeat of our organization - championing a culture where people thrive and potential is unlocked. From attracting top talent and shaping employee experiences to driving development, engagement, and retention, the team plays a strategic role in building and maintaining a high-performing, empowered workforce. We are here to grow with the business and for the people behind it.


The part you will play

We are looking for an experienced People Operation Specialist to you will be an active contributor in a wide range of HR activities. This will involve providing support on day to day HR operations including  onboarding, offboarding, payroll, employee engagement, culture, HR reporting, etc. You will also get a chance to participate in a host of HR projects. This role will be reporting to our  Regional People Operations Lead.


As a People Ops Specialist, you will take charge of

  • Handle onboarding, offboarding and transfer administration for all people movements such as new hires, promotions, transfers, re-designation, resignations, terminations, and the like
  • Support new joiners’ onboarding and leavers’ offboarding process, including collating staff movement announcements, planning and executing teams orientation and other engagement programs such as office welcome tour, interns community program
  • Coordinates office facilities contracts and related operations
  • Monitor, upkeep and ensure security and accuracy of employees' records and documents in HRIS and 201 files
  • Maintain and update employee handbook, guidelines, policies, and process flows.
  • Process employee requests for information and related employment visas, permits, and regulatory applications
  • Comply with the government mandatory benefits such as SSS, Pag-IBIG, PhilHealth and other assistance programs required by Labor Code.
  • Generate timekeeping and deductibles reports for payroll.
  • Generate and analyze HR reports to improve efficiency and effectiveness of people decisions
  • Participate and contribute towards implementation of local and regional HR projects, strategies and initiatives.
  • Execute Employer Branding initiatives to build a powerful B2B brand presence that attracts top of funnel candidates
  • Assist in implementing Performance Management process and Employee Relations
  • Facilitate setup of Employee Engagement activities, including but not limited to Company Team building, and Country Town Halls, games nights, AMAs, events, etc
  • Partake in research and development of Culture building initiatives, as well as learning and development opportunities for employees
  • Assist in streamlining current HR processes and payroll  & benefits procedures
  • Other ad-hoc tasks as assigned such as office management and administrative functions


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • 2-4 years of relevant experience in the same role
  • Business partnering mindset, proactive to stakeholders’ needs
  • Highly motivated, nimble, and takes initiative to take up new challenges
  • Self-starter, agile, and able to work independently
  • Passion to create an inclusive, high performance and fun work culture
  • Resourceful team player who is confident to bring ideas to the table
  • Detailed-oriented with strong people, organizational, and administrative skills
  • Proficient in MS Office 365 and MS office suite, as well as Google Suite
  • Must be degree qualified, preferably with a specialization in Human Resources or Social Sciences, such as Psychology, Sociology, Economics, Organizational Behavior, and the like
  • Knowledge of employment laws, e.g. Labor Code, Statutory Benefits, OSH and the like,  is an advantage
  • Able to start work immediately or with short notice is an advantage


In return, you will be getting

  • Tackling the sophisticated people's challenges in the rapidly evolving e-commerce landscape with data insights and innovative solutions.    
  • You will be joining an all-star People Team that consistently raises the bar by combining the systems and processes of a small multinational with the collaborative, innovative, and agile spirit of a startup in an ever-evolving world.
  • With our team’s rapid growth and the People Team launching new initiatives to enhance both employee experience and performance, you willl benefit from a wide range of opportunities for development. Our structured learning programs covering both functional skills and broader growth are designed to support you at every stage of your journey
  • Our supportive culture and close collaboration between regional and local teams create a close-knit work environment which many in our team love and thrive in


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level.   • To introduce, promote and demonstrate various brand products such as during LIVE Streaming within guidelines provided.

Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

The Brand Management Team is the trusted partner for leading brands across Southeast Asia in strategic planning and driving sustainable online business growth. By analyzing performance, identifying opportunities, and aligning with our clients' commercial objectives, the team develops and executes data-backed strategies that maximize conversion and revenue. With a strong grasp of category dynamics and platform trends, and driving collaboration and coordination across other functions internally, Brand Management plays a key role in shaping long-term brand success in the digital commerce space.


The part you will play

The Regional Commercial Excellence Manager is a central role focusing on driving operational support across commercial, graphic design and chat functions – our core service offerings. We are looking for a dual role of account management with strong PMO skills to develop processes to drive efficiency and quality in service offers, support tool adoption and leverage the right tools, data and systems to improve how we service our brand clients.


As a Regional Commercial Excellence Manager you will take charge of 

  • Drive regional key account management for strategic clients, ensuring alignment with commercial objectives and consistent performance across markets
  • Drive commercial excellence projects pertaining to the adoption of internal and external tools to elevate Intrepid’s service quality
  • Focus on training and development initiatives for Intrepid’s key account managers including supporting training curriculum development, materials development and hosting regular training sessions across the region
  • Drive data-driven and customer-focused initiatives to optimize account management performance
  • Manage the smooth implementation of new tools and processes to support commercial teams
  • Engage in consultation with relevant stakeholders on issues associated with the success of customer experience projects and recommend improvements
  • Identify key competitive trends on ecommerce platforms to ensure that best practices are well identified and adopted by Intrepid Group
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders to identify growth opportunities and enhance client satisfaction
  • Monitor and optimize key account performance using data-driven insights to support revenue growth and service excellence


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Fluent in English
  • Experience with business fundamentals
  • 2-5 years+  of work experience preferably in an ecommerce, marketing or commercial role
  • Strong project management and stakeholder management capabilities
  • An entrepreneurial and can-do spirit, comfortable with being able to work independently


In return, you will be getting

  • We work with the most ambitious leading brands in ecommerce across South East Asia and the brand management team is the key interface between brands and our different in-house teams. In this role, you will have the most holistic overview of all facets of driving a successful e-commerce business    
  • From Junior KAM to KAM to Senior KAM to Cluster Manager and beyond, this team offers a lot of opportunities for career progression and personal development, with increasing commercial and team management responsibilities
  • Advanced systems and tools support you in running the stores of our clients, so you can focus your time on analyses, planning and initiatives that have the highest impact
  • Brand Management is a very diverse discipline, from honing your analytical and commercial skills to communication, stakeholder management and negotiation, you will get to do it all and learn from a collaborative and supportive team of experts


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.title: Finance Admin
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

Our Finance Team is at the core of every major decision we make. We don’t just keep the books — we shape the direction of the business. By delivering on financial insights, strategic analysis, and data-driven recommendations, the team plays a critical role in guiding growth and ensuring long-term success. From planning and forecasting to optimizing performance and supporting key commercial initiatives, Our Finance team is a key partner across every function. With a strong focus on integrity, accuracy, and collaboration, its goal is to ensure the company remains financially strong, agile, and ready for the future.


The Part You Will Play

You will take charge of coordination and administrative support, including creating Purchase Orders based on internal requests with accurate account and cost center mapping, and preparing quotations as required. You will act as the key liaison between the Commercial team (Sales/Account Management) and the Finance department, ensuring smooth workflow alignment and that all sales requests are translated into financial actions without delays or discrepancies.


As a General admin,  you will take charge of 

  • Coordination & Support
    • PO Management: Create Purchase Orders in the system based on internal requests, ensuring accurate account categories and cost center mapping.
    • Quotation Management: Create Purchase Orders in the system based on internal requests.
    • Liaison: Act as the primary point of contact between the Commercial team (Sales/Account Management) and the Finance department.
    • Workflow Alignment: Ensure that sales requests are translated into financial actions (POs/Quotations) without delays or data discrepancies.
    • Manage the registration of new customers and vendors in the system and ensure proper documentation tracking, version control, and easy retrieval
  • Document Control
    • Company Records: Ensure records are accurate, up-to-date, and easily accessible
    • Logistics: Manage courier services, incoming/outgoing mail, and package distribution. Act as the central point of control for document and parcel flow within the office

What we are looking for – The Ideal Profile

  • Good communication skills, with the ability to coordinate across teams
  • Strong attention to detail with excellent organizational skills
  • Able to handle confidential financial information with integrity
  • Proactive, willing to learn, and a strong team player
  • Experienced in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets

In return, you will be getting

  • Join an all-star Finance team which continues to raise the bar, with systems and processes (and company stability) at the level of sophistication of a small multinational, but with a 'start-up' spirit of innovation and continuous improvement in an ever-evolving world
  • In terms of learning opportunities, our organization is second to none. You will get to work on a variety of business models across many different clients as if we are 5 companies in one, and everyone is involved in projects to drive further improvement.
  • Regional teams and country Finance teams collaborate closely to ensure all finance aspects of our business are optimized, giving you a wide exposure and enhanced learning curve in a close-knit and supportive team


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.title: Regional AI Video Content Manager
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

The Social Commerce Team is a fast-growing team leading the way in livestream selling, short video content, and affiliate marketing across Southeast Asia. We work with top brands, combining creativity, data, and platform expertise to drive real commercial results. As part of Intrepid’s end-to-end eCommerce ecosystem, we gain broad exposure across operations, collaborate with cross-functional experts, and play a key role in shaping how brands connect with digital shoppers in real time.


The part you will play

Intrepid Asia is seeking a forward-thinking Regional AI Video Content Manager to lead the transformation of video production through artificial intelligence, agentic AI, and automation.

This role blends creative storytelling with machine learning capabilities to accelerate end-to-end video production across Southeast Asia. You will drive AI adoption within the regional video team, standardize workflows, and enable scalable, high-quality content creation for eCommerce and social commerce brands.


You are not just a video expert. You are a systems thinker who sees AI as a multiplier — improving speed, consistency, insights, and creative performance.


As a Regional AI Video Content Manager, you will take charge of:

AI-Led Video Production Strategy

  • Leverage artificial intelligence tools, agentic AI systems, and automation to accelerate video production workflows
  • Integrate creative storytelling with AI-driven processes to enhance both efficiency and output quality
  • Support the Regional Head of Video Content in implementing AI-powered strategies across Southeast Asian markets


Productivity Optimization & Operational Excellence

  • Identify bottlenecks in current video production processes and redesign workflows using AI and automation to reduce turnaround time and manual effort
  • Increase video production capacity and content output without proportional growth in headcount or cost by embedding AI tools into daily operations
  • Establish clear productivity KPIs (e.g., turnaround time, revision cycles, output volume, cost efficiency) and continuously refine systems to ensure sustainable, measurable gains across regional markets


Tool Identification & Evaluation

  • Identify and evaluate relevant AI tools for end-to-end video production, including:
    • Content ideation and scripting
    • AI-generated video production
    • Editing and post-production automation
    • Localization and adaptation
    • Performance analytics and optimization
  • Run structured testing of new tools and document learnings for regional adoption


Workflow Design & Standardization

  • Establish standardized workflows for AI-led video production across markets
  • Develop guidelines, SOPs, and best practices for AI-generated and AI-assisted video content
  • Ensure consistency in quality, compliance, and brand alignment while scaling output


Regional Implementation & Enablement

  • Partner with local market teams across SEA to implement AI-driven video production frameworks
  • Train and upskill video producers and content teams on emerging AI tools and workflows
  • Drive adoption of automation systems to improve turnaround time and reduce manual inefficiencies


Innovation & Continuous Improvement

  • Stay ahead of emerging AI technologies in video, generative media, automation, and analytics
  • Experiment with new AI models and tools to enhance video quality, personalization, and performance
  • Translate innovation into scalable, repeatable systems that deliver measurable impact


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • 5+ years of experience in video production, creative operations, or content innovation (eCommerce or social commerce preferred)
  • Strong hands-on experience with AI-powered creative tools (e.g., generative AI, AI video tools, automation platforms)
  • Proven ability to design and optimize production workflows at scale
  • Experience working across multiple Southeast Asian markets is a strong advantage
  • Strong understanding of performance-driven content and data-informed creative optimization
  • Excellent communication skills and ability to influence cross-functional and regional stakeholders
  • Analytical mindset with the ability to translate experimentation into scalable frameworks


In return, you will be getting

  • You will work with our portfolio of leading international brands, delivering engaging livestreams and video content to the highest standards. This role offers exposure and experience that can open many opportunities in the industry. Many of our livestream hosts have gone on to become key brand ambassadors or built followings of millions while at Intrepid — the world is truly your oyster!
  • We believe in an end to end omni-channel and full funnel approach to ensure seamless and consistent consumer journeys, and intrepid is one of the very few players who offer that full array of services under one roof. Brands love this model as it's streamlined and delivers strong performance, hence we are rapidly growing. This offers you wide exposure and exciting growth opportunities
  • We believe in the combined power of creative genius and a data-driven approach. Whether it is live streaming, video or affiliates, you will have the data and knowledge how to analyze & optimize at your fingertips, so you can add that spark of creative brilliance to create magic. With your talent and our training, we deliver high performance.
  • We are international, we know how to scale, and we are stable. Content is local, but what resonates and best practices apply across countries. Our regional exposure and teams allow us to learn faster and organize ourselves in the best way possible. You are joining a proven international company with a strong track record, but we move fast with a lot of freedom, a collaborative culture and no politics. The best of both worlds.


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

  • Develop guidelines, SOPs, and best practices for AI-generated and AI-assisted video content
  • Ensure consistency in quality, compliance, and brand alignment while scaling output


Regional Implementation & Enablement

  • Partner with local market teams across SEA to implement AI-driven video production frameworks
  • Train and upskill video producers and content teams on emerging AI tools and workflows
  • Drive adoption of automation systems to improve turnaround time and reduce manual inefficiencies


Innovation & Continuous Improvement

  • Stay ahead of emerging AI technologies in video, generative media, automation, and analytics
  • Experiment with new AI models and tools to enhance video quality, personalization, and performance
  • Translate innovation into scalable, repeatable systems that deliver measurable impact


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • 5+ years of experience in video production, creative operations, or content innovation (eCommerce or social commerce preferred)
  • Strong hands-on experience with AI-powered creative tools (e.g., generative AI, AI video tools, automation platforms)
  • Proven ability to design and optimize production workflows at scale
  • Experience working across multiple Southeast Asian markets is a strong advantage
  • Strong understanding of performance-driven content and data-informed creative optimization
  • Excellent communication skills and ability to influence cross-functional and regional stakeholders
  • Analytical mindset with the ability to translate experimentation into scalable frameworks


In return, you will be getting

  • You will work with our portfolio of leading international brands, delivering engaging livestreams and video content to the highest standards. This role offers exposure and experience that can open many opportunities in the industry. Many of our livestream hosts have gone on to become key brand ambassadors or built followings of millions while at Intrepid — the world is truly your oyster!
  • We believe in an end to end omni-channel and full funnel approach to ensure seamless and consistent consumer journeys, and intrepid is one of the very few players who offer that full array of services under one roof. Brands love this model as it's streamlined and delivers strong performance, hence we are rapidly growing. This offers you wide exposure and exciting growth opportunities
  • We believe in the combined power of creative genius and a data-driven approach. Whether it is live streaming, video or affiliates, you will have the data and knowledge how to analyze & optimize at your fingertips, so you can add that spark of creative brilliance to create magic. With your talent and our training, we deliver high performance.
  • We are international, we know how to scale, and we are stable. Content is local, but what resonates and best practices apply across countries. Our regional exposure and teams allow us to learn faster and organize ourselves in the best way possible. You are joining a proven international company with a strong track record, but we move fast with a lot of freedom, a collaborative culture and no politics. The best of both worlds.


We also offer

Best of Both Worlds

We are a scale up: the sophistication of a small multinational, with the agility of a start-up. This means you get to work on cutting-edge projects, and besides your 'standard' job description, we love to see you show entrepreneurial initiative and want to see your take on how you can take your role and our company to the next level. Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.

Culture that Brings Out the Best

At Intrepid, culture is not just a buzzword, it is what we practice at work every day. We believe in collaboration over competition, transparency over politics, and willingness to learn over ego. You will be part of a team where people genuinely support one another, celebrate wins together, and face challenges head-on as one. We put our all into the work but we balance it with fun, whether that is through team lunches, after-work hangouts, events or shared laughter in the office. This is a place where you can thrive professionally while having a great time.

Grow Without Limits

Learning at Intrepid is constant and dynamic. You will have access to formal training through face-to-face sessions, coaching and our very own Intrepid Academy. On top of that, real-world experience such as leading clients, working with advanced tech, and mastering best-in-class processes will accelerate your growth every step of the way. Surrounded by a talented team that raises the bar daily, in a rapidly growing and ever-expanding business, the opportunities for your development are endless.

Rewarding You Right

We believe great work deserves great rewards at Intrepid. That’s why we offer competitive compensation and generous benefits, including comprehensive insurance and ample leave, to support you both in and out of the workplace. We want you to feel valued, cared for, and empowered to bring your best self to work every day.

ad.title: Senior Graphic Designer (Motion Graphics, Jogja-Based)
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. The team you will be part of

Our Merchandising & Creative Team brings brands and products to life through compelling visuals and on-brand storytelling. From graphic design and content creation to product presentation and campaign assets, the team crafts experiences that captivate and convert. With a keen eye for aesthetics and a strong understanding of digital commerce, we transform ideas into visuals that drive engagement, elevate brands, and enhance the online shopping journey.


The part you will play

The Senior Graphic Designer must direct the creative vision and output for Intrepid Indonesia, establishing high-level brand strategies and safeguarding brand integrity across all communication channels. They are responsible for mentoring and leading the design team to ensure excellence in execution and the successful delivery of complex creative projects.


As a Senior Graphic Designer you will take charge of 

  • Conceptualizing, designing, and animating high-quality motion graphics for promotional videos, social media content, and digital advertisements while adhering to brand standards.
  • Developing and maintaining the brand's visual identity across various platforms, ensuring consistency and uniformity.
  • Generating and implementing high-impact creative assets that drive customer engagement while collaborating with cross-functional teams to integrate creative strategies.
  • Managing multiple projects simultaneously, delivering results within tight deadlines and exceeding client expectations.
  • Applying a strong branding concept and demonstrating proficiency in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, and After Effects.
  • Utilizing Artificial Intelligence (AI) in video creation to enhance and streamline production workflows.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Bachelor’s degree or diploma in Graphic Design or a related field, with 5+ years of specialized experience in motion graphics.
  • Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite, including Photoshop, Illustrator, XD, and After Effects.
  • Proven track record in the production of high-quality visual assets for livestreaming platforms and OBS Studio optimization.
  • Comprehensive understanding of e-commerce platforms and the strategic design requirements of digital marketplaces.
  • Rigorous attention to detail and an unwavering commitment to maintaining global brand integrity.
  • Demonstrated ability to manage complex workflows and deliver results within high-pressure, fast-paced environments.

  • We offer hybrid working to strike the right balance between being 'in the zone' delivering great work undisturbed, and spending time with your colleagues to bond and learn together

With a strong grasp of category dynamics and platform trends, and driving collaboration and coordination across other functions internally, Brand Management plays a key role in shaping long-term brand success in the digital commerce space.


The part you will play

A Senior Key Account Manager is the liaison office between Intrepid, its clients and the platform/s the client is selling on. He/She oversees the Intrepid-client relationship, determines opportunities, and identifies process improvements to grow their online sales revenue and to ensure Intrepid delivers the service level agreement.


As a Senior Key Account Manager, you will take charge of 

  • Implement and execute the joint business plan (JBP) of the brand with a platform
  • Deliver & perform best on the following KPIs for brand/seller partners, through internal & external coordination with concerned departments:
    • Content management & optimization
    • Campaign strategies & execution
    • Chat response representation of the brand/seller
    • Operations capacity and process implementation
    • Progressive revenue trend and overall online sales performance
  • Foster client relationships; work with sales and marketing teams and other support teams available
  • Design marketing strategies and sales growth proposals; handle client communications and prepare client reports; and communicate client agendas to other staff members
  • Ensure clients’ needs are met and their voices are heard while coordinating with others and fulfilling the contractual day-to-day duties
  • Identify clients’ potential business opportunities as well as upselling services
  • Minimize client attrition at all costs


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Knows eCommerce fundamentals

  • Proactive self-starter who understands Intrepid vision & mission and can be the company’s best service ambassador

  • Fluent in English

In this role, you will have the most holistic overview of all facets of driving a successful e-commerce business

ad.description:
