The team you will be part of

Our Merchandising & Creative Team brings brands and products to life through compelling visuals and on-brand storytelling. From graphic design and content creation to product presentation and campaign assets, the team crafts experiences that captivate and convert. With a keen eye for aesthetics and a strong understanding of digital commerce, we transform ideas into visuals that drive engagement, elevate brands, and enhance the online shopping journey.


The part you will play

The Merchandiser Executive will help us deliver exceptional online shopping experiences for our clients. In this role, you will collaborate closely with the Head of Merchandising and cross-functional teams to ensure our clients' stores excel across all platforms. Your responsibilities will include optimizing product pages, driving engagement to increase traffic and conversions, and supporting AI livestream executions. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment and have a creative mindset, this could be the ideal position for you.


As a Merchandiser Executive, you will:

  • Develop merchandising strategies and drive traffic: Create and implement strategies that enhance the shopping experience across e-commerce touchpoints (product pages, shop-in-shops, chat features) while optimizing product visibility through search keywords, compelling content, and high-quality visuals.
  • Increase and improve customer engagement: Optimize store layouts and visual hierarchy, highlight key products through effective banner sequencing, leverage the right mix of high-performing modules, and enhance engagement with clear, compelling copy to create a smooth and intuitive shopping experience.
  • Track performance and analyze competitors: Monitor key metrics such as traffic, engagement, and conversions, while conducting regular competitive benchmarking to refine strategies and ensure campaigns remain distinctive.
  • Audit and optimize platforms: Continuously assess e-commerce platforms to identify areas for improvement and ensure strategies are executed flawlessly.
  • Collaborate with creative teams: Work closely with the Graphic Design & Content teams to create visuals that align with project briefs and strategies.
  • Storyboarding and scriptwriting: Develop engaging, conversion-driven scripts and storyboards for AI powered livestreams and videos across platforms such as TikTok, Shopee, and Lazada, ensuring content aligns with brand guidelines, campaign mechanics, and resonates with the target audience.
  • Stay informed on industry trends: Keep up-to-date with the latest developments in e-commerce, livestreaming, and visual merchandising to maintain a competitive edge.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Merchandising, Visual Communication, or related field
  • 2+ years of experience in ecommerce merchandising, digital marketing, campaign planning, livestream, or related roles
  • Good understanding of ecommerce platforms (e.g., Lazada, Shopee, TikTok) and content management systems
  • Strong sense of visual merchandising and understanding of what makes for a compelling online shopping experience
  • Excellent organizational skills with the ability to prioritize tasks and manage multiple projects simultaneously in a fast-paced environment
  • Analytical mindset with keen attention to detail and the ability to interpret data to drive decision-making
  • Strong command of Excel, including the ability to create and work with complex formulas for data analysis and reporting.
  • Creative flair and passion for visual storytelling, with an eye for design and aesthetics
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills, and can effectively interface with cross-functional teams and articulate strategies and ideas clearly
  • A keen interest in the latest e-commerce, digital marketing, and merchandising trends to stay competitive and innovative


In return, you will be getting

  • We pride ourselves on creating visuals that both inspire and perform. At Intrepid, design is part art and part science — we’ll help you elevate your creative talent through our strong merchandising and e-commerce expertise, complemented by ongoing design and AI training to help you create work that truly makes an impact.
  • You will see your work - for some of the leading brands in the world - featured across marketplaces and social platforms
  • We offer hybrid working to strike the right balance between being 'in the zone' delivering great work undisturbed, and spending time with your colleagues to bond and learn together
  • We provide you with the best designer tools (PC/laptop/MacBook and Adobe suite) you need


We also offer

Good ideas get implemented. You are the master of your own destiny.


Culture that Brings Out the Best

ad.title: Head of Finance
ad.description:
Who we are

Intrepid Asia is a leading Ecommerce and Digital Solutions Provider in South East Asia. We offer end-to-end omni-channel ecommerce management, Livestreaming, Video production & Affiliate Management for Social Commerce plus full funnel Digital Marketing Services and advanced Market Intelligence, all powered by state of the art inhouse Technology to our client base of leading international brands across all key marketplaces and social platforms in all 6 SEA countries. Brands love our regional presence, our excellent data-driven and growth-focused services which are enabled by the strongest team in the industry, and our advanced marketing and tech capabilities. 


We are growing rapidly and as the exclusive partner of Flywheel in SEA,  we offer many exciting opportunities to work with leading brands across multiple categories and key industry players. By joining us, you will work on the cutting edge of digital and social commerce in SEA, and experience what it takes to drive a successful ecommerce business end-to-end.


The team you will be part of

Our Finance Team is at the core of every major decision we make. We don’t just keep the books — we shape the direction of the business. By delivering on financial insights, strategic analysis, and data-driven recommendations, the team plays a critical role in guiding growth and ensuring long-term success. From planning and forecasting to optimizing performance and supporting key commercial initiatives, Our Finance team is a key partner across every function. With a strong focus on integrity, accuracy, and collaboration, its goal is to ensure the company remains financially strong, agile, and ready for the future.


As a Head of Finance, you will take charge of

  • Manage all aspects of financial analysis and business partnering functions for our Philippines businesses. 
  • Responsible for all analytical and value-added areas for the Philippines, including forecasts, management reporting & analysis, budgeting, treasury and tax filings.
  • Work with the finance team to migrate the majority of transactional accounting eg AP, AR, GL, etc to the newly established accounting centre located offshore.
  • Manage the preparation and reconciliation of all Balance sheet accounts.
  • Main contact person and liaison for all statutory, ISO and internal audits
  • Work with the Head Office team to drive process improvements in the finance function through understanding of the existing IT systems and processes and to strengthen internal controls.
  • You will report directly to the Regional CFO with a matrix reporting to the country management.  


Who we look for – the ideal profile:

  • Bachelor Degree holder in Finance or Accounting and/or member of a professional body such as ISCA, ICAEW, ACCA, CPA or equivalent, with at least 6 years’ relevant work experience in all facets of accounting and finance.
  • Possesses good business acumen and strong analytical skills including the ability to rapidly interpret, and concisely explain in a simple non-financial way.
  • Prior experience with Netsuite and a track record of automating processes as well as experience in the Retail industry, is a significant plus.
  • Strong knowledge of country corporate tax laws and company regulations.
  • Possesses exceptional organizational skills, self-motivated and possess the ability to prioritise to get things done.
  • Comfortable in a fast-paced, start-up and Ecommerce environment.
  • Good command of English, both spoken and written.


In return, you will be getting

  • Join an all-star Finance team which continues to raise the bar, with systems and processes (and company stability) at the level of sophistication of a small multinational, but with a 'start-up' spirit of innovation and continuous improvement in an ever-evolving world
  • In terms of learning opportunities, our organization is second to none. You will get to work on a variety of business models across many different clients as if we are 5 companies in one, and everyone is involved in projects to drive further improvement.
  • Regional teams and country Finance teams collaborate closely to ensure all finance aspects of our business are optimized, giving you a wide exposure and enhanced learning curve in a close-knit and supportive team

ad.title: Regional Lead, Brand Marketing Strategy
ad.description:
As a Regional Lead, Brand Marketing Strategy you will take charge of 

1. Brand Strategy & Account Leadership

  • Own and develop strong, differentiated brand marketing strategies for assigned key accounts, grounded in:
    • Business objectives
    • Category dynamics
    • Audience insights
  • Act as the strategic lead on accounts, ensuring clarity and consistency across all marketing initiatives.
  • Lead strategic conversations in pitches and QBRs, bringing a senior point of view and cross-market insights.

2. Full-Funnel Strategy & Translation

  • Translate business strategy into end-to-end full-funnel marketing plans, including:
    • Audience persona definition
    • Funnel design (awareness → consideration → conversion)
    • Channel roles (TikTok, Meta, marketplaces, etc.)
    • Content strategy (what to say, not just what to produce)
  • Ensure alignment and consistency across the full funnel and all channels.

3. Strategic Direction & Execution Alignment

  • Provide clear strategic direction to:
    • Creative teams (briefing, messaging, content approach)
    • Performance teams (activation logic, channel strategy)
  • Work at account level to ensure seamless execution of the strategy.

4. Data-Driven Strategy & Innovation

  • Leverage tools and data sources such as:
    • TikTok MarketScope
    • Category benchmarks
    • Competitive landscape analysis
  • Translate insights into actionable strategic recommendations to drive growth on assigned accounts.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Media, Business, or any related fields
  • 8+ years of experience in full-funnel performance marketing. 
  • Experience in brand strategy, campaign planning, or integrated marketing.
  • Proven experience in social commerce and digital platforms (TikTok, Shopee, Lazada, Meta).
  • Ability to link creativity with performance metrics and business outcomes.
  • Strong storytelling and presentation skills.
  • Strategic thinker with a data-driven mindset.
  • Experience in ecommerce or agency environments is a plus.


In return, you will be getting

  • We are consistently ranked as a top-3 retail media expert across South East Asia, managing adds across all ecommerce channels for many of the leading international brands
  • Our state-of-the-art in-house MarTech automates a lot of manual work and allows you to run and optimize campaigns in more sophisticated ways, delivering superior results, with amazing reporting capabilities to easily oversee all campaigns across all channels
  • You will join an ambitious, entrepreneurial and rapidly growing (and fun!) Marketing team, where everyone is keen to hone their skills and capabilities and expand our business across verticals.
  • We rapidly expand our full funnel services offerings to our clients, both TikTok-centered and in general, providing an integrated and impactful solution

ad.title: Key Account Manager (E-commerce)
ad.description:
The part you will play

As a Key Account Manager, you will be responsible for managing and growing the ecommerce business of one or multiple brands across all ecommerce platforms As the brand’s main point of contact and trusted advisor, you create the ecommerce strategy and annual plans for your brands and take ownership of their business like it is yours. You negotiate with brand and platform stakeholders to maximize the attractiveness of propositions for consumers and exposure for the brand, in order to grow the business. You have a firm grasp of e-commerce fundamentals, digital marketing, campaign development and the growth levers that the different marketplaces offer. You coordinate with our different in-house teams and ensure that collectively you make your brand(s) successful. You are responsible for account NMV and revenue growth and work closely with the business development team to explore how your brands can benefit from additional services.


As a Key Account Manager you will take charge of 

  • Grow account NMV and revenue
  • Build strong relationships with your brand and platform counterparts 
  • Deliver expert recommendations on the best strategy / promotions / growth levers for brands
  • Develop annual growth plans and activation calendars and campaign proposals 
  • Manage cross-functional team to drive brand performance (Content, Store management, Operations, Chat) 
  • Ensure all brand / store KPIs are met
  • Collaborate on onboarding and growth plans for new brands
  • Collaborate with management on NMV goals, planning and forecasting 
  • Work together with Category Manager to ensure account retention and growth


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Min 2-3  years of relevant work experience in Ecommerce, ideally with a platform (Lazada / Shopee), with another enabler, or with a brand or distributor
  • Commercial performance-driven mindset, flexible & collaborative attitude, looking to make an impact and thriving in a fast-paced start-up environment
  • Strong interpersonal, relationship and communication, listening and negotiation skills
  • Ability to develop a brand ecommerce strategy and translate this into annual & monthly activation plans
  • Experience in developing digital / ecommerce campaign plans
  • Analytical skills to analyze data and make performance improvement suggestions
  • Project management experience
  • Good Excel and PowerPoint skills


In return, you will be getting

  • We work with the most ambitious leading brands in ecommerce across South East Asia and the brand management team is the key interface between brands and our different in-house teams. In this role, you will have the most holistic overview of all facets of driving a successful e-commerce business    
  • From Junior KAM to KAM to Senior KAM to Cluster Manager and beyond, this team offers a lot of opportunities for career progression and personal development, with increasing commercial and team management responsibilities
  • Advanced systems and tools support you in running the stores of our clients, so you can focus your time on analyses, planning and initiatives that have the highest impact
  • Brand Management is a very diverse discipline, from honing your analytical and commercial skills to communication, stakeholder management and negotiation, you will get to do it all and learn from a collaborative and supportive team of experts

ad.title: AP Accountant
ad.description:
The AP Accountant will be part of Intrepid's established dedicated Accounts Payable team within the Center of Excellence (COE), providing specialized AP services across Vietnam, Thailand, Indonesia, Singapore, Malaysia, and Philippines operations. This role is critical to achieving best-in-class receivables management with full compliance to collection policies across our multi-country, multi-brand portfolio.


The role, as a part of SSC (Centre of Excellence)

Booking and Month-End Closing (40%)

  • Execute automated AP booking processes based on master data trackers across all business models (Retail Platform, Claimback, Store Management, Marketing)
  • Maintain and update master data for automation, ensuring accurate account mapping for NetSuite uploads
  • Record accruals and expenses in compliance with IFRS and internal accounting policies
  • Collaborate with the Data Automation team to operate and optimize automated booking workflows
  • Manage AP, fulfillment costs, G&A, fixed assets, bank, and marketing expenses for regional entities, including system reconciliation, journal entries, supporting schedules, and cost analysis

Dispute Resolution & Reconciliation (30%)

  • Investigate and resolve bill disputes, credit note requests, and payment discrepancies
  • Coordinate with the Operations team to perform 3-way matching (PO / Item Receipt / Bill)
  • Maintain a dispute log, tracking aging and escalation status of unresolved items
  • Support external audits with complete AP documentation

Payment Operations (20%)

  • Monitor AP aging across both retail and marketing portfolios
  • Execute payments in line with the tiered approval process
  • Maintain the payment tracker, including follow-ups, payment commitments, escalations, and resolution status
  • Coordinate with country finance teams and business teams on overdue balances and payment plans
  • Ensure consistent payment and collection policies across all business units and brands

Compliance & Reporting (10%)

  • Ensure compliance with local regulations and internal policies (Thai tax, cross-border withholding tax, intercompany policies)
  • Flag accounts breaching policy thresholds for management escalation
  • Standardize and maintain up-to-date SOPs for AP processes


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

Education & Experience

  • Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
  • 2 years of AP experience, preferably in shared services or multi-country operations.
  • Experience with NetSuite or similar ERP systems
  • Able to communicate in English

Technical Skills

  • Advanced Excel/Google Sheets proficiency (pivot tables, VLOOKUP, formulas, data validation)
  • Experience with automated booking systems and master data management
  • Understanding of different revenue models (retail margin, consignment commission, store management fees, claimback processing)

Competencies

  • Strong attention to detail and data accuracy
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Effective communication skills in both English and Thai (written and verbal)
  • Ability to manage multiple priorities across different business units and countries
  • Customer service orientation with professional approach to collections
  • Comfortable working with cross-functional teams and external partners (audit firms, business units, country teams)

Personal Attributes

  • Self-motivated with ability to work independently
  • Process-oriented mindset with focus on compliance
  • Adaptable to changing business needs and system improvements
  • Strong sense of ownership and accountability


In return, you will be getting

  • Join an all-star Finance team which continues to raise the bar, with systems and processes (and company stability) at the level of sophistication of a small multinational, but with a 'start-up' spirit of innovation and continuous improvement in an ever-evolving world
  • In terms of learning opportunities, our organization is second to none. You will get to work on a variety of business models across many different clients as if we are 5 companies in one, and everyone is involved in projects to drive further improvement.
  • Regional teams and country Finance teams collaborate closely to ensure all finance aspects of our business are optimized, giving you a wide exposure and enhanced learning curve in a close-knit and supportive team

ad.title: Regional Lead, Brand Marketing Strategy
ad.description:
The team you will be part of

The Digital Marketing Team is the engine behind data-driven growth for our brand partners across Southeast Asia’s eCommerce landscape. Specializing in performance marketing across marketplaces like Shopee, Lazada & TikTok, we focus on the entire 360-degree customer journey and build better digital experiences at each stage of the funnel. From media planning to real-time optimization and analytics on Meta, Google & Programmatic, the team partners closely with clients to unlock the full potential of eCommerce marketing—turning insights into action, and clicks into conversions.


The part you will play

We are looking for a visionary and dynamic Regional Brand Marketing Strategist to join our team. This role operates at the exciting intersection of scale and strategy. You will hold a dual mandate: acting as a "horizontal" capability builder to develop a standardized, high-performing social commerce machine across markets, while also serving as the "vertical" strategic lead for key brand accounts.

You will not just be a thinker, but a capability builder who bridges the gap between overarching business goals, audience insights, full-funnel activation, and compelling content.


As a Regional Lead, Brand Marketing Strategy you will take charge of 

1. Brand Strategy & Account Leadership

  • Own and develop strong, differentiated brand marketing strategies for assigned key accounts, grounded in:
    • Business objectives
    • Category dynamics
    • Audience insights
  • Act as the strategic lead on accounts, ensuring clarity and consistency across all marketing initiatives.
  • Lead strategic conversations in pitches and QBRs, bringing a senior point of view and cross-market insights.

2. Full-Funnel Strategy & Translation

  • Translate business strategy into end-to-end full-funnel marketing plans, including:
    • Audience persona definition
    • Funnel design (awareness → consideration → conversion)
    • Channel roles (TikTok, Meta, marketplaces, etc.)
    • Content strategy (what to say, not just what to produce)
  • Ensure alignment and consistency across the full funnel and all channels.

3. Strategic Direction & Execution Alignment

  • Provide clear strategic direction to:
    • Creative teams (briefing, messaging, content approach)
    • Performance teams (activation logic, channel strategy)
  • Work at account level to ensure seamless execution of the strategy.

4. Data-Driven Strategy & Innovation

  • Leverage tools and data sources such as:
    • TikTok MarketScope
    • Category benchmarks
    • Competitive landscape analysis
  • Translate insights into actionable strategic recommendations to drive growth on assigned accounts.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Media, Business, or any related fields
  • 8+ years of experience in full-funnel performance marketing. 
  • Experience in brand strategy, campaign planning, or integrated marketing.
  • Proven experience in social commerce and digital platforms (TikTok, Shopee, Lazada, Meta).
  • Ability to link creativity with performance metrics and business outcomes.
  • Strong storytelling and presentation skills.
  • Strategic thinker with a data-driven mindset.
  • Experience in ecommerce or agency environments is a plus.


In return, you will be getting

  • We are consistently ranked as a top-3 retail media expert across South East Asia, managing adds across all ecommerce channels for many of the leading international brands
  • Our state-of-the-art in-house MarTech automates a lot of manual work and allows you to run and optimize campaigns in more sophisticated ways, delivering superior results, with amazing reporting capabilities to easily oversee all campaigns across all channels
  • You will join an ambitious, entrepreneurial and rapidly growing (and fun!) Marketing team, where everyone is keen to hone their skills and capabilities and expand our business across verticals.
  • We rapidly expand our full funnel services offerings to our clients, both TikTok-centered and in general, providing an integrated and impactful solution

ad.title: Live Commerce Team Lead
ad.description:
The team you will be part of

The Social Commerce Team is a fast-growing team leading the way in livestream selling, short video content, and affiliate marketing across Southeast Asia. We work with top brands, combining creativity, data, and platform expertise to drive real commercial results. As part of Intrepid’s end-to-end eCommerce ecosystem, we gain broad exposure across operations, collaborate with cross-functional experts, and play a key role in shaping how brands connect with digital shoppers in real time.


The part you will play

Intrepid, a leading eCommerce enabler in Southeast Asia, is looking for a Live Commerce Manager (Team Lead) to lead and scale our livestream business across the E-commerce platform. This role sits within the Social Commerce division and reports directly to the Head of Social Commerce, owning the end-to-end livestream strategy, execution, and performance delivery. You will be responsible for transforming livestream from an operational function into a high-performance revenue engine, driving GMV growth, optimizing production efficiency, and elevating on-screen talent and content quality.


As a Live Commerce Team Lead, you will take charge of 

Live Commerce Strategy & Planning

  • Develop and execute integrated live commerce strategies combining livestreams, short video content, and affiliate programs to maximize traffic, engagement, and GMV.
  • Partner with brand clients to define sales and marketing objectives, ensuring alignment with platform algorithms and audience behavior.
  • Manage end-to-end campaign execution — from ideation, scheduling, host coordination, and production to post-campaign performance analysis.
  • Lead the planning and optimization of livestream and video content calendars to capitalize on key events such as Double Digit Days, Payday Sales, and platform mega campaigns.
  • Strengthen creator and affiliate programs through data-backed recruitment, activation, and performance optimization of KOLs/KOCs.
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with Creative, Performance Marketing, and Operations teams to ensure cohesive storytelling, product readiness, and real-time fulfillment.
  • Monitor campaign analytics (e.g., CTR, Enter Room Rate, GMV, conversion) and provide actionable insights to enhance future campaign outcomes.
  • Maintain strong relationships with platform partners (TikTok, Shopee, Lazada) to stay ahead of new tools, features, and best practices.

Performance Management

  • Track and evaluate performance across all live commerce pillars using dashboards and structured reporting.
  • Create detailed performance reports and insights for internal stakeholders and clients, highlighting successes and opportunities.
  • Identify trends, competitive benchmarks, and growth opportunities to refine Intrepid’s live commerce approach.

Team Leadership

  • Lead and develop the Live Commerce team (Admins, MCs, Operators)
  • Set clear KPI frameworks and performance-driven culture
  • Coach and elevate MCs to improve performance
  • Drive hiring, training, and retention of high-performing livestream talent

Cross-Functional Collaboration

  • Work closely with the Performance Marketing, Content, and Operations teams to integrate livestream campaigns with broader eCommerce strategies.
  • Coordinate with the operations team to ensure real-time updates on inventory and fulfillment during livestreams.
  • Liaise with platform representatives (e.g., TikTok, Shopee, Lazada) to stay updated on new features and guidelines.

What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or a related field.
  • Experience: At least 5-7 years in live commerce, eCommerce, or digital marketing, with proven success in managing livestream campaigns.
  • Strong familiarity with TikTok Shop, Shopee, and Lazada platforms.
  • Demonstrated ability to lead multi-functional teams, manage high-pressure campaign cycles, and deliver results in a fast-paced environment.
  • Strong strategic and commercial mindset. Able to balance creativity, operations, and data-driven decision-making.
  • Excellent client management and cross-functional communication skills; comfortable collaborating with brand, creative, and platform stakeholders.
  • Adept at evaluating performance metrics, identifying insights, and steering the team toward continuous improvement.
  • Strong organizational and multitasking abilities, with attention to detail.
  • Creative problem-solving skills to address real-time challenges during livestreams.
  • Passion for eCommerce and staying updated on the latest industry trends.

ad.title: Assistant Affiliate Manager
ad.description:
The team you will be part of

The Social Commerce Team is a fast-growing team leading the way in livestream selling, short video content, and affiliate marketing across Southeast Asia. We work with top brands, combining creativity, data, and platform expertise to drive real commercial results. As part of Intrepid’s end-to-end eCommerce ecosystem, we gain broad exposure across operations, collaborate with cross-functional experts, and play a key role in shaping how brands connect with digital shoppers in real time.


As an Affiliate Associate/Senior Associate you will take charge of 

Responsibilities:

  • Develop and execute affiliate marketing strategies to drive brand awareness, engagement, and sales on TikTok.
  • Identify and recruit TikTok influencers and content creators to join our affiliate program.
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with affiliate partners, providing support, guidance, and incentives to drive performance.
  • Create and optimize TikTok content in collaboration with affiliates to align with brand messaging and objectives.
  • Monitor and analyze TikTok campaigns, tracking key metrics and performance indicators to optimize results.
  • Stay up-to-date with TikTok trends, algorithms, and best practices to maximize visibility and reach.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including marketing, sales, and product development, to ensure alignment and coherence in brand messaging and strategy.


What we are looking for - the ideal profile

  • Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related field.
  • Proven experience in affiliate marketing, influencer relations, or digital marketing, with a focus on TikTok.
  • Strong understanding of TikTok's platform, features, trends, and algorithms.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build and maintain relationships with influencers and partners.
  • Creative mindset with a keen eye for engaging content and storytelling.
  • Analytical mindset, with the ability to track and analyze campaign performance metrics to drive optimization.
  • Self-motivated and results-driven, with the ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.

ad.title: M & E Manager
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Job Description

  • Oversee the day to day running of all matters relating to the construction of this project with the assistance of M&E staffs, mainly on mechanical & electrical works.
  • Liaison with external parties such as clients, client representatives and authorities, etc.
  • Co-ordinate the works carried out by his/her M&E Engineer and M&E Co-ordinators.
  • Coordinate with consultants, engineers, and other stakeholders to develop detailed M&E plans and specifications.
  • Review safety reports on compliance and non-compliance to regulatory and organizational Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) policies and Environmental Management System (EMS) standards and practices.
  • Monitor progress and performance of M&E works, identifying any deviations or issues and implementing corrective measures as required.
  • Manage sub-con/in progress production planning & build.
  • Monitoring M&E services variation works and costs during construction stage to ensure within budget.

Requirements

  • Minimum a recognized Bachelor’s Degree/Diploma in Mechanical/Electrical/Construction Engineering or other building-related disciplines.
  • At least 5 years of working experience in building and construction projects.
  • Working knowledge in BIM model software.
  • Strong technical knowledge of mechanical and electrical systems, including HVAC, plumbing, electrical distribution, and fire protection.
  • Familiarity with building codes, regulations, and safety standards related to M&E installations.
  • Team player and able to communicate well with the team.
  • Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities, with a keen attention to detail.
  • Location is at Shan Road
  • 5.5 work day

ad.title: M&E Engineer (2Years)
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Job Description

  • Assist in supervising and coordinating M&E services work
  • Attend project meetings; liaise and coordinate with clients, consultants, relevant authorities and sub-contractors on M&E issues.
  • Manage M&E subcontractors’ submission of method statements, drawings, materials, samples, and work progress.
  • Compliance with all necessary standards, code of practice and safety regulations;
  • Handle any other ad-hoc duties and tasks assigned

Job Requirement

  • Min Diploma / Degree in Engineering (Mechanical / Electrical Engineering / Construction / Building related)
  • At least 2 year(s) of working experience in the related field is required for this position.
  • Prefer with construction industry background.
  • Work independently and liaise effectively with with sub-contractors and suppliers
  • Good communication and Interpersonal skills
  • 5.5 work days
  • Location is at Shan Road

ad.title: Public Relations Officer
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Job Description

· Draft and vet all external communication and replies

· Handle daily feedback cases and resolve amicably with the team

· Build and maintain good relationships with feedback providers and agencies

· Monitor public sentiment, address concerns, and manage communication effectively

· Prepare detailed reports on daily activities and work-related matters

· Coordinate meetings, take minutes, and distribute agendas and updates.

· Ensure service providers meet quality standards

· Investigate incidents, analyse root causes, and implement corrective and preventive measures.

· Prepare and present reports on quality performance, customer satisfaction, and compliance.

Job Requirements

· Degree/Diploma in Communication/Business Administration or equivalent with 3 years of relevant work experience.

· Background experience in Facilities Management/Construction or township management is an advantage.

· Office Location: 1 Tampines North Drive 1

· 5.5 work days

ad.title: Senior Technical Officer / Technical Officer (Security System)
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Key Roles and Responsibilities

  • To troubleshoot and maintain/service security systems at clients’ premises
  • Attend to fault calls during office hours and standby duties after office hours in rotating duty roster
  • Liaise closely with client representatives on all service/maintenance related issues.
  • Manage day-to-day client interactions and expectations for optimal results..
  • Familiarize yourself and deliver customer satisfaction base on each client’s business, organization and objectives.
  • Ensure that works carried out are in compliance with the Workplace Safety and Health Act.
  • Perform any other technical tasks as and when required

Requirements

  • Min Higher Nitec & Nitec in Mechatronics/Electrical/Electronic Engineering or relevant with at least 2 years working experience.
  • Knowledge and hands-on experience in security systems such as Integrated Security Management Systems, Card Access Control Systems, Intrusion Detection Systems and CCTV systems is a must.
  • Knowledge in IT/Network/Server is an added advantage.
  • Good interpersonal and problem solving skills.
  • Independent, self-motivated individual whom is able to work under minimum supervision.
  • Required to perform standby duties
  • Driving License – Preferably if candidate possess own vehicle
  • Fresh graduates are welcome to apply
  • Singapore Citizens are preferred
  • Location is at Shan Road
  • 5 work day

ad.title: Cloud and System Engineer
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Key Responsibilities

· Design, deploy, and manage scalable, reliable AWS infrastructure using core services such as EC2, S3, VPC, IAM, CloudWatch, Route 53, RDS, SQS, SES, and more.

· Write and maintain Bash scripts for system automation and operational tasks (e.g., backups, patching, log rotation, routing updates).

· Provide ad-hoc support for on-premise Windows Server and Amazon Linux 2023 systems.

· Develop and maintain Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using tools such as Terraform or AWS CloudFormation.

· Set up monitoring and alerting using native AWS tools (e.g., CloudWatch, CloudTrail).

· Manage system backups and disaster recovery for both AWS and on-prem systems.

· Collaborate with the software development team to support integration and deployment needs.

· Perform server hardening activities to align with best practices and compliance requirements.

· Work with penetration testers to close VAPT findings through remediation and configuration enhancements.

Requirements

· Strong hands-on experience with AWS service, Linux/Windows servers and network infrastructure.

· Solid knowledge of Amazon Linux 2023 and Windows Server administration.

· Proficient in writing Bash scripts for automation and system tasks.

· Experience with IaC tools such as Terraform or AWS CloudFormation.

· Familiar with AWS monitoring tools and best practices for alerts and observability.

· Experience with server hardening and applying security configurations.

· Familiar with VAPT processes and implementing remediation plans.

· Good communication and collaboration skills, especially working with software development teams.

· AWS certification is an advantage but not required.

· Location: Shan Road

ad.title: Sales Executive
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Key Responsibilities

1. Sales & Business Development

  • Promote and market ATTC training programs including BCA courses, CoreTrade, SEC(K), trade testing, and skills upgrading programs.
  • Develop new business opportunities with construction companies, subcontractors, and manpower agencies.
  • Achieve assigned monthly sales targets and course enrolment KPIs.
  • Conduct client visits and presentations to introduce training solutions.

2. Client Relationship Management

  • Build and maintain strong relationships with existing contractors and corporate clients.
  • Provide professional advice to companies on worker certification requirements and training pathways.
  • Follow up with clients on course schedules, worker registration, and renewals.

3. Market Development

  • Identify new market opportunities in the construction, facilities management, and built environment sectors.
  • Work closely with the marketing team to promote courses through events, telemarketing, and digital platforms.
  • Monitor competitor activities and market trends.

4. Administrative & Coordination Support

  • Coordinate with the ATTC admin team on course registration, scheduling, and documentation.
  • Ensure accuracy of client information and enrolment data.
  • Prepare sales reports and updates on pipeline activities.

Requirements

  • O level / Diploma or Degree in Business, Sales, Marketing, or related discipline.
  • Minimum 1–3 years of sales experience, preferably in B2B sales.
  • Knowledge of Singapore construction industry or BCA certification framework will be an advantage.
  • Strong interpersonal and negotiation skills.
  • Self-driven, responsible, and able to work independently.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office and CRM systems.

ad.title: Stores Supervisor
ad.description:
​

Roles & Responsibilities

About the Role

We are looking for a responsible and hands-on Store Supervisor (mechanical background) to oversee the operations of our construction warehouse. The role involves managing equipment and machinery, coordinating with our mechanic, and ensuring smooth warehouse operations to support project sites.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Supervise daily warehouse operations including receiving, issuing, and proper storage of materials, equipment, and machinery.
  • Maintain accurate inventory records and monitor stock movements between warehouse and project sites.
  • Coordinate the deployment and return of construction equipment and machinery.
  • Work closely with the mechanic to monitor equipment condition and arrange servicing or repairs when required.
  • Ensure proper documentation and records for equipment movement, maintenance, and inventory.
  • Maintain a clean, safe, and well-organized warehouse environment.
  • Coordinate with project teams to ensure timely equipment and material support.

Requirements:

  • Minimum 2 years of experience in warehouse/store operations, preferably in the construction industry.
  • Familiar with handling construction equipment, machinery, and tools.
  • Basic understanding of equipment maintenance coordination is an advantage.
  • Responsible, organized, and able to work independently.
  • Good teamwork and communication skills.
  • Forklift license will be an advantage.
​

ad.title: Quantity Surveyor / Snr Quantity Surveyor
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Job Description

  • Prepare and Monitor project cost budget, cash-flow for project, track changes in design/construction work, check variations and adjust budget projections accordingly.
  • Source and Liaise with Site Personnel, Suppliers, Sub-contractors, Consultants and/or Architects for all project-related matters.
  • Responsible for Progress Claims, Variation Orders, Final Accounts and Sub-contractor Progress Claims.
  • Work closely with the project team in the Analysis, Evaluation and Negotiation of quotations, so as to ensure timely award of sub-contractors and suppliers.
  • Ensure timely finalization of main contracts and sub-contracts.
  • Provide Support in any other ad-hoc duties that may be assigned time to time.

Job Requirements

  • Candidate must possess at least a Bachelor’s Degree/ Post-Graduate Diploma/ Professional Degree in Engineering (Civil), Quantity Surveying or Facilities/ Building-related with a minimum of 3 years of relevant work experience.
  • Have a positive working attitude, pro-active and meticulous in his/her work.
  • Posses strong inter-personal communication & negotiation skills; able to work as a team.
  • Able to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines, either independently or in a team environment.
  • Location is at Neythal Road
  • 5 days work week

ad.title: Sales Administrator
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities


Key Responsibilities:
1. Sales Administration Support


  • Assist the sales team in processing training registrations and course bookings.
  • Prepare quotations, invoices, and supporting documents for customers.
  • Maintain and update sales records, candidate lists, and training schedules.

2. Customer & Candidate Coordination

  • Handle incoming enquiries from trainees, companies, and agents.
  • Provide information on available courses, schedules, and requirements.
  • Coordinate with candidates to ensure all documents are submitted before training or tests.
  • Support the sales team in managing customer relationships

3. Data Entry & System Management

  • Perform accurate data entry into internal systems (e.g. AMS / Training Management System)
  • Maintain proper documentation of candidate records and sales reports.
  • Ensure accuracy of training records and registration information.

4. Operational Coordination

  • Work closely with the Admin and Trainer teams to coordinate training schedules and candidate attendance.
  • Assist in preparing training materials, attendance lists, and administrative paperwork.

5. Reporting & Monitoring

  • Assist in compiling sales reports and performance data.
  • Track registration numbers and support the sales team in achieving training targets
  • Provide updates to management when required

Requirements

  • 1–3 years of administrative or sales support experience preferred.
  • Experience in training centres, construction industry, or customer service will be an advantage.
  • Good communication and coordination skills.
  • Strong attention to detail and accuracy in data entry.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook).
  • Responsible and disciplined with work processes.
  • Positive attitude and willingness to support the team.
  • Good teamwork and communication skills.
  • Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
  • Maintain high accuracy in documentation and system records.
  • Provide timely support to the sales team.
  • Ensure smooth coordination between sales, admin, and trainers.
  • Contribute to achieving ATTC training enrollment targets.

ad.title: Quality Control Officer (Data Centre)
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Key Responsibilities

1. Quality Assurance & Process Compliance

  • Review and ensure all FM processes, SOPs, EOPs, workflows, and checklists comply with ISO standards, client requirements, and industry best practices.

  • Validate that operational activities align with approved procedures and the QMS framework.

  • Assist in the preparation, implementation, and improvement of quality assurance policies and guidelines.

2. QMS Support & Continuous Improvement

  • Support the Quality Manager in maintaining ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, and SS 564 documentation and compliance.

  • Participate in QMS reviews, gap analysis, and process enhancement initiatives.

  • Coordinate change management for document revisions, version control, and procedural updates.

3. Audit & Compliance Monitoring

  • Assist in planning and conducting internal audits, compliance assessments, and vendor audits.

  • Track audit findings, NCRs, and corrective/preventive actions (CAPA) to ensure timely closure.

  • Verify vendor service reports, statutory compliance certificates, and maintenance documentation.

4. Data Validation & Performance Monitoring

  • Analyse FM performance metrics such as PPM completion, incident response times, SLA compliance, energy consumption, downtime, and operational trends.

  • Validate accuracy of CMMS/CAFM entries, inspection logs, permit-to-work records, and maintenance data.

  • Prepare QA dashboards and reports for management and clients.

5. Vendor & Contractor Assurance

  • Ensure vendor processes, method statements, competencies, and documentation meet QA expectations before work execution.

  • Conduct random checks to ensure alignment to contract specifications and safety requirements.

  • Review and ensure close-out of service reports, service quality issues, and material compliance.

6. Incident & Risk Governance

  • Support root cause analysis for incidents, faults, and non-conformances.

  • Track incident trends and recommend preventive measures.

  • Maintain accurate records for incident reports, near-miss logs, and risk registers.

7. Documentation & Reporting

  • Maintain QA records, audit logs, compliance matrices, risk logs, and QMS documents.

  • Prepare weekly/monthly QA reports highlighting issues, recurring gaps, audit results, and corrective actions.

  • Ensure documentation readiness for client audits, certification audits, and regulatory inspections.

Requirements

Qualifications

  • Diploma/Degree in Mechanical, Electrical, Facilities Management, Quality, or related engineering disciplines.

  • ISO 9001 Internal Auditor or Lead Auditor certificate is an advantage.

  • Familiarity with TIA-942, SS 564, SS 553, SS 568, and DC/mission-critical standards is beneficial.

Experience

  • 2–4 years of experience in FM, building services, QA/QC, industrial operations, or critical infrastructure.

  • Experience in data centres or mission-critical facilities is preferred.

  • Knowledge of key M&E systems (GRUPS, generator, chillers, switchgear, CRAC/CRAH, BMS) is desirable.

Skills

  • Strong analytical and documentation skills.

  • High attention to detail and accuracy.

  • Able to identify gaps in processes and propose improvements.

  • Effective communicator with technicians, engineers, vendors, and clients.

  • Proficient in MS Office, CAFM/CMMS, and quality reporting tools (Power BI is a plus).

Location
- Ang Mo Kio

ad.title: Technical Manager
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead projects through planning, execution, monitoring, and closure.
  • Work closely with the technical delivery team to ensure in-scope items were delivered.
  • Apply technical knowledge of web development to assess feasibility, evaluate options,and guide delivery teams.
  • Act as the central point between clients, stakeholders, and internal teams,aligning expectations and priorities.
  • Coordinate with developers stationed in overseas branch offices to align deliverables and maintain communication flow.
  • Provide solutions, workarounds, and recommendations when challenges arise.
  • Manage risks, issues, and dependencies with pragmatic approaches.
  • Track progress and communicate updates clearly to both management and clients.
  • Drive projects to achieve objectives within agreed scope, time, and quality standards.

Requirements

  • Demonstrates strong ownership and adaptability across regional operations, with a proven ability to manage diverse technical responsibilities and distributed teams throughout the full software development life cycle.
  • Proven track record of balancing high-velocity software delivery with a keen eye for granular technical details, while utilizing Gantt-based road mapping to ensure long-term project milestones are met on schedule.
  • Proven experience managing technical or software/web development projects.
  • Strong understanding of web technologies, architecture, and development processes (not hands-on coding, but capable of meaningful discussions).
  • Excellent communication skills with the ability to manage both client and internal stakeholder relationships.
  • Strong problem-solving ability with a focus on practical solutions.
  • Familiarity with modern project management tools (eg. ClickUp, Monday, Jira, Notion).
  • Familiarity with Figma for inspecting UI/UX prototypes to ensure a seamless and meticulous handoff between design and engineering teams.
  • Familiarity with Miro or similar white boarding tools to facilitate remote sprint planning and complex system architecture mapping.

Soft Skills

  • Resourceful and adaptable, able to navigate complex situations with limited information.
  • Strategic thinker who balances technical understanding with business priorities.
  • Strong interpersonal skills, capable of building trust and collaboration across teams.
  • Outcome-driven mindset with the ability to maintain focus under pressure.

ad.title: Administrative Assistant
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Job Responsibilities

1.    Training & Test Administration

  • Manage course registrations and candidate enrolment
  • Prepare documentation in compliance with BCA / regulatory requirements
  • Ensure accurate data entry into internal systems (AMS/TMS/LMS)
  • Generate candidate’s summary
  • Coordinate with trainers, salesperson and candidates for daily operations

2. Compliance & Documentation Control

  • Ensure all records are properly filed and audit-ready
  • Maintain strict adherence to SOPs and regulatory protocols
  • Perform documentation checks to avoid errors and non-compliance

3. Operational Coordination

● Liaise with salesperson, trainers and operations team

Requirements

  • Diploma / O Level or equivalent qualification
  • Minimum 1–2 years administrative experience
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word)
  • Comfortable with digital systems and data management
  • Strong attention to detail and accuracy
  • Ability to work in a structured, fast-paced environment
  • Location: 45 Sungei Kadut Loop

Incentive & Reward

Monthly performance-based incentive (not entitlement) will be awarded to committed and high-performing individuals who consistently uphold standards and contribute positively to team performance.

ad.title: Data Center Facility Engineer
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Job Responsibilities:

  • Perform duty to manage data centre (DC) operations, maintenance, troubleshooting, project rollout and facilities related matters.
  • Perform DC monitoring and maintenance on infrastructure systems, critical facilities and associated equipment.
  • Perform preventive and corrective support to scheduled or unscheduled maintenance on DC infrastructure systems, critical facilities equipment and/or services.
  • Ensure all subcontractors deliver a quality and competent service and all contractual obligations are met. Supervise the vendors to all scheduled and adhoc activities related to DC facilities.
  • Perform DC and critical facilities work on environmental and management programs
  • Perform equipment functionality test and data analysis
  • Perform assets management duty, including maintaining of inventory, change and control programs and purchase of parts and supplies
  • Promptly respond and attend to incident and/or emergency situations
  • Provide standby support upon activation for shift duty stand-in and/or other coverage
  • Conduct routine, sanity check and ongoing assessment of DC infrastructure systems and critical facilities operations

Requirements:

  • Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical/Building Services Engineering or equivalent
  • At least 2 years’ experience in facilities operations experience in DC or 24/7 critical environment management.
  • Detailed understanding and experience of the electrical and mechanical systems used in a DC and commercial environment.
  • Experience in vendor management, ability to manage and progress monitoring to ensure objectives are achieve for outsourced support and projects.

ad.title: Technician cum Sales
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Job Description

  • To carry out maintenance and repair to ensure equipment are in good working conditions and quality
  • Maintaining of records and repair activities
  • Basic plumbing installation knowledge
  • Perform other tasks as assigned by the Management
  • Able to do Sales presentation to prospective clients via virtual or face to face
  • Provide after-sales services and maintain good relationships with clients

Job Requirement

  • Candidates without experience but possess the right attitude will be considered
  • Have own vehicle (Motobike preferred)
  • Able to work independently
  • Responsible and able to work in a team
  • Good interpersonal
  • Plumbing knowledge will be an advantage

Additional Information

  • Comprehensive training provided
  • Candidates with no prior experience are welcome to apply
  • Has own transportation a plus
  • Location: 45 Sungei Kadut Loop
  • 5.5 days work week
  • For Pure Dew

ad.title: Shift Technician (Data Centre)
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

The Rotating Shift Technician is responsible for supporting 24×7 data centre operations, ensuring the reliability, safety, and continuity of all Mechanical & Electrical (M&E), critical infrastructure, and facilities systems in accordance with approved procedures, service level agreements (SLAs), and safety requirements.

·      Perform continuous monitoring, routine patrols, and inspection of data centre infrastructure, critical facilities, and associated equipment.

·      Manage day-to-day maintenance coordination, and escalate any critical troubleshooting requirements that needs to be conducted by manufacturers.

·      Conduct routine checks of M&E and critical systems performance.

·      Record and report daily operating conditions, abnormalities, and system status.

·      Supervise and oversee OEMs, subcontractors, and service vendors performing works on electrical, mechanical, fire, and critical facilities systems.

·      Ensure all vendors deliver competent, safe, and quality services in compliance with contractual obligations, site rules, and safety requirements.

·      Coordinate and monitor scheduled and ad-hoc vendor activities, ensuring proper documentation and work completion.

·      Promptly respond to incidents, alarms, and emergency situations.

·      Execute incident escalation in accordance with approved escalation matrices and emergency response procedures.

·      Provide standby and emergency support when activated, including shift stand-in or additional coverage as required.

·     Ensure proper handover and takeover of duties during shift changes.

·      Carry out duties that comply with approved SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures), MOPs (Method of Procedures), and EOPs (Emergency Operating Procedures).

·      Carry out all work strictly in accordance with site processes, operational governance, and safety regulations.

ad.title: Facility Executive
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Job Description

  • In charge of Building Facilities Management Matters
  • Attend Management Meetings
  • Controls of the building management matters
  • Perform routine building maintenance works

Job Requirements

  • Diploma / Degree in Building / Facilities / Engineering
  • Min 4 years relevant experience in managing of estate or commercial buildings
  • FSM Certificate
  • 5.5 days
  • Location: Bukit Batok

ad.title: Office Cleaner
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Job Description

  • Sweep, mop, and vacuum all floor surfaces
  • Clean sinks, countertops, microwaves, and exterior of appliances. Ensure coffee stations are tidy
  • Thoroughly clean and disinfect high-touch areas and restrooms
  • Empty all trash and recycling bins, replacing liners and disposing of waste in designated external areas

Requirements

  • Preferred to have any WSQ Cleaning Course certification
  • Willing to work 6days week
  • No usage of mobile devices (including mobile phone) during working hours

ad.title: Electrical Engineer
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Responsibilities:

  • Lead, manage, supervise and control of Company’s in-house and external Contractors for all electrical & instrumentation maintenance works
  • Establish, continually improve & implement safe, efficient and effective preventive / predictive maintenance programs, procedures to achieve highest equipment reliability & availability objective
  • Manage & maintain reliable and accurate asset maintenance records in order to provide good maintenance history for future reference and troubleshooting purposes
  • Conduct trouble shooting and root cause analysis study of equipment failures, recurring breakdown, and equipment defects and to take effective corrective & preventive measures to sustain and improve equipment performance integrity & reliability
  • Implement quality standards and procedures for preventive and corrective maintenance works.
  • Evaluate facility operations and retrofitting activities.
  • Implement solutions based on incident response procedures and Analyse maintenance data.
  • Assess the performance of third-party service providers in their service delivery.
  • Establish trust and rapport with users through service standards.
  • Submit technical reports and progress reports to management.
  • Develop tender specifications, maintenance contracts and Service Level Agreements (SLA) and propose budget plan.
  • Review safety reports on compliance and non-compliance to regulatory and organisational Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) policies and Environmental Management System (EMS) standards and practices.
  • Conduct WSH accident, near misses and incident investigations.
  • Implement Environmental Sustainability guidelines according to the organisation's green building strategy.
  • Monitor resource availability to support operations, perform on-the-job coaching and track employee productivity.
  • Propose continuous improvement initiatives to improve time, cost and quality management.
  • Propose opportunities to use the latest smart facilities management trends or technologies.

Requirements:

  • Relevant bachelor’s degree/diploma in Electrical Engineering or equivalent
  • Minimum 10 years of post-degree or 15 years of post-diploma experience in related M&E fields or equivalent.
  • Must be from an Engineering background with Degree recognized by the Professional Engineers Board.
  • Good interpersonal communication and documentation/presentation skills.
  • Relevant experience in managing Tertiary Institute Buildings.
  • Office location: Singapore Polytechnic

ad.title: Architectural Coordinator
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Job Description

  • Attend technical meeting/site meetings with consultants, and provide technical solutions.
  • Study drawings and coordinate architectural works with the consultants and sub-contractors to resolve any technical / site issues.
  • Ensure architectural works are carried out according to specifications / drawings.
  • Inform Project Manager/ Construction Manager on any technical / site problems pertaining to architectural works.
  • Supervise the progress of architectural works on site.
  • Coordination of sub-contractor's architectural work and ensuring the work is on schedule.
  • Assist the Project Manager in the preparation of reports and presentation to management, clients and stakeholders.

Requirements

  • Must possess a qualification from the list of universities by BCA and Board of Architects.
  • Minimum 5 years of experience in Architectural coordination works.
  • Conversant with local codes and authority submissions.
  • Must be computer literate and knowledgeable in software such as Revit, AutoCad, Sketch-up and others will be an added advantage.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
  • Strong leadership, coaching skills and organising abilities.
  • Able to work independently
  • 5.5 work days

ad.title: Training and Development Officer (Drone)
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Job Description

  • Deliver engaging theoretical and practical training aligned with CAAS standards.
  • Lead flight demonstrations and practical assessments at training sites.
  • Provide clear instruction on drone safety, flight planning, airspace classification, meteorology, and emergency procedures.
  • Adapt training methods to suit individual learning styles and skill levels.
  • Evaluate trainee performance and provide detailed feedback and guidance.
  • Assist in updating training materials and ensuring course content remains current with evolving drone regulations and technology.
  • Maintain accurate student records, reports, and certification tracking.
  • Assist Head of Training to ensure successful yearly renewal of UATO & UABTO statuses
  • Explore and if capable, take on other training roles within the company.

Requirements

  • Certified drone piloting licence - UAPL cert with no limitations category is preferable.
  • Experience delivering structured drone training or relevant training is useful.
  • Understanding of aviation law, safety protocols and regulations is useful.
  • Strong communication, facilitation, and interpersonal skills.
  • Comfortable working outdoors in varied conditions for practical sessions.
  • Willing to work selected week nights and alternate weekends for training classes.
  • Location: Shan Road

ad.title: Auditor
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Responsibilities

- Conduct routine and ad-hoc audits on cleanliness, maintenance, and enforcement works across

assigned sites

- Assess contractors’ performance based on MSO standards, SOPs, and KPIs

- Document audit findings accurately with supporting evidence (photos, reports, checklists)

- Highlight non-compliances, lapses, and recurring issues for follow-up actions

- Prepare and submit detailed audit reports within stipulated timelines

- Track and monitor rectification works to ensure issues are resolved satisfactorily

- Liaise with stakeholders (contractors, supervisors, and MSO officers) on audit findings

- Identify trends and recommend improvements to enhance operational efficiency

- Ensure audits are conducted objectively and in accordance with established guidelines

Job Requirement

  • Good communication and Interpersonal skills
  • 5.5 work days

ad.title: Project Manager (C&S)
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Responsibilities

  • Coordinate internal resources and third parties/vendors for the flawless execution of projects.
  • To lead the site construction team in ensuring smooth execution of work
  • Ensure that all projects are delivered on-time, within scope and within budget
  • Developing project scopes and objectives, involving all relevant stakeholders and ensuring technical feasibility
  • Ensure resource availability and allocation
  • Develop a detailed project plan to track progress
  • Use appropriate verification techniques to manage changes in project scope, schedule and costs
  • Measure project performance using appropriate systems, tools and techniques
  • Report and escalate to management as needed
  • Manage the relationship with the client and all stakeholders
  • Perform risk management to minimize project risks
  • Establish and maintain relationships with third parties/vendors
  • Create and maintain comprehensive project documentation

Requirements

  • Degree in Construction / Engineering
  • Minimum of 4 years' proven and relevant working experience
  • Good Interpersonal Skills
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills
  • Solid organizational skills including attention to detail and multi-tasking skills
  • Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Office
  • 5.5 work days

ad.title: Project Engineer (C&S)
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Job Description

  • To be involved in the planning and execution of civil and structural works.
  • Assist the Project manager and Construction Manager in monitoring and managing the day-to-day operation of the projects.
  • To prepare method of statement, construction sequencing, sketches, and other technical submissions.
  • To monitor the execution of the site works and further review and develop the method and/or sequence of the works to ensure safety and efficiency.
  • To collaborate with peers, and to liaise with trade contractors, clients and consultants and ensure timely delivery of quality services.
  • To prepare Inspection and Test Plan, and conduct inspection and check on works performed.
  • Check the drawings discrepancies and conduct field verification, and submit technical clarification to the clients and consultants.
  • Ensure updated drawings including shop drawings are used by the site team in a timely manner.
  • Prepare site record and submit to office in a timely manner.
  • Assist the Project Manager in the preparation of reports and presentation to management, clients and stakeholders.

Job Requirements

  • Degree in Civil or Structural Engineering from a recognized university or its equivalent recognized by the Professional Engineer Board, Singapore.
  • Minimum 3 years of experience in Building projects and/or Geotechnical projects.
  • Conversant with local codes and authority submission procedures.
  • Familiar with precast concrete will be an added advantage.
  • Proactive, responsible and keen to work in a team.
  • Excellent interpersonal, good verbal and written communication skills.
  • Committed and responsible towards job
  • Able to take ownership, proactive firm
  • Strong leadership, coaching skills and organizing abilities.
  • Able to work independently.
  • 5.5 work days

ad.title: Software Technical Lead
ad.description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Responsibilities

  • Lead the design and development of cloud-based web applications using open source technologies on AWS.
  • Provide technical leadership to the development team, guiding solution design, code quality, and best practices.
  • Work closely with offshore team for planning, prioritisation, and daily coordination.
  • Own the estimation, planning, delegation, and tracking of development tasks.
  • Review code, coach developers, and ensure adherence to architectural standards.
  • Oversee cross-browser and cross-platform compatibility considerations.
  • Manage and operate production and staging environments, including troubleshooting, incident analysis, and performance improvements.
  • Drive continuous improvement in system reliability, scalability, and maintainability.
  • Support ad hoc maintenance activities when required.
  • Lead and contribute to documentation covering architecture, APIs, deployment and operational processes.
  • Moderate project management.

Requirements

  • At least eight years of web application development experience, with strong hands-on skills in PHP Laravel, JavaScript
  • At least three years of AWS experience.
  • Good to have experience with Livewire and Alpine JS.
  • Good to have experience implementing AI functionalities.
  • Good to have experience with Autodesk integration.
  • Proven experience in designing APIs, microservices, and FE & BE separation.
  • Strong understanding of cyber security fundamentals and OWASP Top 10.
  • Experience leading a team, conducting reviews, mentoring developers, and managing deliverables.
  • Good communicator, able to work independently and coordinate across teams.
  • Strong analytical and problem solving skills with good judgement in technical decision making.
  • A team player with initiative, resourcefulness, and attention to detail.
  • A positive, hands-on leadership mindset.

Key required skills

  • Backend development in PHP (Laravel).
  • Frontend development using JavaScript.
  • SQL databases such as PostgreSQL and MySQL.
  • AWS services across compute, storage, networking, and deployment.

ad.title: M&E Engineer (3 years)

  • Prefer with construction industry background.
  • Work independently and liaise effectively with with sub-contractors and suppliers
  • Good communication and Interpersonal skills
  • 5.5 work days
  • Location is at Shan Road

ad.title: Human Resource Executive

  • 5 days work week

ad.title: Electrical Technical Officer

Responsibilities:

  • Lead, manage, supervise and control of Company’s in-house and external Contractors for all electrical & instrumentation maintenance works

  • Establish, continually improve & implement safe, efficient and effective preventive / predictive maintenance programs, procedures to achieve highest equipment reliability & availability objective

  • Manage & maintain reliable and accurate asset maintenance records in order to provide good maintenance history for future reference and troubleshooting purposes

  • Conduct trouble shooting and root cause analysis study of equipment failures, recurring breakdown, and equipment defects and to take effective corrective & preventive measures to sustain and improve equipment performance integrity & reliability

  • Implement quality standards and procedures for preventive and corrective maintenance works.

  • Evaluate facility operations and retrofitting activities.

  • Implement solutions based on incident response procedures and Analyse maintenance data.

  • Assess the performance of third-party service providers in their service delivery.

  • Submit technical reports and progress reports to management.

  • Develop tender specifications, maintenance contracts and Service Level Agreements (SLA) and propose budget plan.
