ad.title: Senior Financial Planning & Analysis Manager
ad.description:
About the Organization

Our Client is a prominent enterprise specializing in real estate development and diverse business operations, guided by principles of integrity, compassion, and transparency. Collaborating with a sister company based in Hong Kong, they rank among Asia’s leading property groups, with a presence spanning Singapore, Malaysia, Australia, Japan, China (including Mainland and Hong Kong), and the United States.

Established in 1960, this organization has become Singapore’s largest private property developer, delivering over 780 projects across various real estate sectors, including more than 55,000 private residences. The company oversees three publicly listed entities: Far East Orchard Limited, Far East Hospitality Trust, and Yeo Hiap Seng Limited.

Recognized globally, the organization has received 14 FIABCI World Prix d’Excellence awards, the highest accolade in international real estate. In 2022, it was ranked among the top 50 employers in Singapore by The Straits Times. The company emphasizes holistic employee well-being, fostering a community that values talent development, innovation, and celebration of achievements.

Employee Benefits & Culture

  • Comprehensive health and wellness programs supporting physical, mental, and spiritual health for staff and their families
  • Additional leave options such as birthday leave, care leave, and flexible time arrangements
  • Exclusive discounts at dining outlets and special rates at hotels domestically and internationally
  • Opportunities to engage in community service activities and contribute meaningfully to society

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop insights into market trends and business performance to support strategic decision-making and financial modeling for proposals
  • Review monthly financial results, analyze key business drivers, and prepare commentary on variances against forecasts and budgets
  • Lead the annual budgeting cycle, incorporating economic indicators and market data to generate accurate forecasts
  • Collaborate with various business units to craft strategies aimed at enhancing growth and profitability

Candidate Profile

  • Excellent communication, interpersonal, and analytical skills

ad.title: Hospitality Services Associate – Guest Room & Facility Maintenance
ad.description:
About Our Client

Our Client is a prominent organization committed to excellence in real estate development and business operations, guided by principles of integrity, compassion, and professionalism. Operating across multiple regions including Singapore, Malaysia, Australia, Japan, China, and the USA, they are recognized as one of Asia’s leading property developers. Since its inception in 1960, the organization has successfully completed over 780 projects, including 55,000 private residences in Singapore alone. It encompasses several publicly listed entities and has received numerous international accolades for its outstanding contributions to the industry.

Dedicated to fostering a supportive and growth-oriented environment, Our Client emphasizes the holistic well-being of its team members. They promote a culture of innovation, recognition, and community engagement, offering a variety of benefits designed to support physical, mental, and spiritual health. These include flexible leave options, wellness programs, staff discounts at dining and accommodation facilities, and opportunities to participate in community service initiatives.

Key Responsibilities

  • Perform thorough cleaning and preparation of guest rooms, serviced apartments, and shared spaces, including bed-making, dusting, vacuuming, sanitizing, and replenishing supplies.
  • Maintain the cleanliness and orderliness of hallways, carpets, elevators, furniture, kitchens, and other communal areas to ensure a welcoming environment.
  • Manage housekeeping supplies and organize carts to ensure efficiency and readiness for daily tasks.
  • Respond promptly and courteously to guest requests, such as delivering amenities, collecting laundry, and managing linen services.
  • Report maintenance issues, safety concerns, or lost items following established procedures to ensure swift resolution.
  • Handle master keys securely during check-in and check-out processes to uphold security protocols.
  • Participate in deep-cleaning activities like curtain replacements, high dusting, stainless steel polishing, and carpet cleaning, as well as special projects such as stock-taking or setting up show flats.
  • Adhere to grooming, safety, and hygiene standards consistently, and undertake additional duties as assigned by supervisors.

Candidate Profile

  • Flexible to work in rotating shifts, including weekends and public holidays.
  • Team-oriented with a positive outlook and the ability to perform under pressure in a dynamic environment.
  • Previous experience in housekeeping or hospitality roles is advantageous but not mandatory.

Perks & Benefits

  • Enjoy a comprehensive benefits package that supports your overall health and well-being, including wellness programs and flexible leave options.
  • Access exclusive discounts at local dining venues and accommodations, both domestically and internationally.
  • Participate in community engagement activities that promote personal growth and social contribution.
  • Work in a supportive environment that values your development and recognizes your contributions.

ad.title: Revenue Analytics Specialist for Hospitality Portfolio
ad.description:
Position Overview

Our Client is seeking a detail-oriented professional to join their revenue management team, focusing on serviced residences and hotel properties within Singapore. Reporting directly to the Area Director of Revenue Management, you will play a key role in analyzing data and generating insights to support strategic decision-making.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and maintain business intelligence dashboards that track booking velocity, demand indicators, customer segments, and industry benchmarks.
  • Perform variance analysis on critical performance metrics such as average daily rate (ADR), revenue per available room (RevPAR), occupancy rates, and channel performance.
  • Examine patterns in length of stay, customer segmentation, and demand fluctuations to identify potential risks and growth opportunities.
  • Construct scenario models to evaluate the effects of group bookings, seasonal promotions, and market shifts.
  • Identify and communicate emerging risks or unusual trends to the leadership team proactively.
  • Build accurate forecasting models tailored to the serviced residences and hotel portfolio, supporting budgeting and planning processes.
  • Contribute insights to financial forecasts, budget preparations, and strategic planning initiatives.
  • Identify repetitive manual reporting tasks and implement automation solutions to improve efficiency.
  • Standardize reporting formats across properties to ensure consistency and clarity.
  • Collaborate with IT and other departments to enhance business intelligence tools and dashboards, aligning them with evolving business needs.
  • Support management meetings and reports with detailed analysis, translating data into clear, actionable recommendations.
  • Work closely with Sales and Marketing teams to evaluate the impact of promotional activities, contracts, and campaigns.
  • Assist in process improvements to streamline reporting and data analysis workflows.

Goals & Impact

  • Enhance the depth and quality of revenue reporting through advanced analytics and predictive insights.
  • Provide timely, strategic insights to help leadership anticipate market trends and adjust strategies accordingly.
  • Reduce manual effort by automating routine tasks and standardizing reporting procedures.
  • Support the team in making data-driven decisions that maximize revenue potential.
  • Contribute to continuous process improvements to increase operational efficiency.

Candidate Profile

  • Degree holder in Business, Finance, Hospitality, Information Technology, or related fields.
  • No prior experience necessary; fresh graduates are encouraged to apply.
  • Strong analytical and numerical skills with the ability to interpret complex data sets.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, including pivot tables, lookup functions, scenario analysis, and automation techniques.
  • Experience with business intelligence and visualization tools such as Power BI or Tableau is advantageous.
  • Knowledge of hotel management systems (HMS, PMS, CRS, RMS) is a plus.
  • Understanding of revenue management principles, including segmentation, channel performance, displacement analysis, and forecasting methods.
  • Excellent communication skills, capable of presenting insights in a clear and concise manner.
  • Detail-oriented, proactive, and capable of identifying trends and anomalies independently.

ad.title: Senior Financial Accountant – Real Estate & Hospitality Sector
ad.description:
About the Role

Our Client is seeking a dedicated Senior Financial Accountant to oversee comprehensive accounting operations within their dynamic organization. This position involves managing financial reporting, ensuring compliance with regulatory standards, and supporting strategic financial planning.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead the end-to-end accounting functions, including statutory reporting and submissions to the Monetary Authority of Singapore.
  • Prepare and review journal entries such as accruals, prepayments, and intercompany adjustments, while managing accounts payable and receivable processes.
  • Maintain the integrity and accuracy of the general ledger and financial data, ensuring timely month-end and year-end closings.
  • Reconcile bank statements, balance sheets, and sub-ledgers regularly to ensure consistency.
  • Generate and analyze monthly financial reports, highlighting variances against budgets and key performance indicators.
  • Coordinate with external auditors to facilitate smooth audits and ensure compliance with accounting standards and legal requirements.
  • Handle quarterly GST filings, quarterly and annual tax submissions, and liaise with tax consultants on related matters.
  • Manage cash flow forecasts and assist in preparing annual budgets and financial projections.
  • Prepare and submit quarterly and yearly reports to the Monetary Authority of Singapore for asset management activities.
  • Support the organization’s strategic financial initiatives through detailed analysis and reporting.

Candidate Profile

  • Possess a degree in Accounting, Finance, or hold an ACCA qualification.
  • Bring at least 4 to 5 years of relevant experience, including a minimum of 2 years in external audit roles.
  • Demonstrate a proactive, detail-oriented approach with a strong commitment to deadlines and objectives.
  • Exhibit excellent analytical skills, with the ability to interpret complex financial data effectively.
  • Showcase strong leadership qualities and the ability to manage and guide finance teams or external providers.
  • Possess excellent communication skills in English, both written and spoken, with a professional demeanor.
  • Be proficient in Microsoft PowerPoint and Excel, with a good understanding of financial software tools.
  • Experience in the hospitality or real estate investment trust (REIT) sectors will be considered an advantage.

What We Offer

Our Client values the well-being and growth of their team members by providing a comprehensive benefits package that supports physical, mental, and emotional health. Employees enjoy additional leave days, performance-based incentives, medical coverage, and insurance plans. Unique perks include special leave on birthdays, wellness initiatives, staff discounts at various outlets, and preferential rates at hotels both locally and internationally. The organization encourages community engagement through diverse volunteer activities, fostering a sense of purpose and contribution.

ad.title: Hotel Front Office Supervisor - Guest Services & Operations Leadership
ad.description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Monitor housekeeping reports, address discrepancies, and implement corrective measures as needed.
  • Collaborate with security teams to manage incident reports, guest conduct issues, and safety concerns.

  • Lead training initiatives for front desk staff, including planning, organizing, and conducting on-the-job coaching sessions.

Candidate Profile

ad.title: Regional AI Video Content Lead for E-Commerce Innovation
ad.description:
About Our Client

Our Client is a prominent provider of digital and e-commerce solutions across Southeast Asia. They specialize in comprehensive omnichannel management, live streaming, video content creation, affiliate marketing for social commerce, and full-spectrum digital marketing services. Powered by cutting-edge in-house technology, they serve top international brands across key marketplaces and social platforms in six SEA countries. Their regional presence, data-driven strategies, and innovative marketing capabilities make them a preferred partner for brands seeking growth and market penetration.

Team Overview

Their Social Commerce division is rapidly expanding, leading initiatives in live selling, short-form video content, and affiliate marketing throughout Southeast Asia. Collaborating with major brands, the team combines creativity, data insights, and platform expertise to generate tangible commercial results. Working within their integrated eCommerce ecosystem provides exposure to diverse operations, cross-functional collaboration, and a chance to influence how brands engage with digital consumers in real time.

Position Summary

Seeking a visionary Regional AI Video Content Strategist to spearhead the evolution of video production through artificial intelligence, automation, and agentic AI systems. This role merges creative storytelling with advanced machine learning techniques to streamline and enhance video content creation across Southeast Asia. You will champion AI integration within the regional video team, establish standardized workflows, and enable scalable, high-quality outputs for social commerce and eCommerce brands.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and implement AI-driven video production strategies: Utilize AI tools, automation, and agentic systems to optimize workflows and accelerate content creation processes.
  • Enhance operational efficiency: Identify process bottlenecks, redesign workflows with AI solutions, and reduce turnaround times while maintaining high standards.
  • Drive workflow standardization: Create guidelines, SOPs, and best practices for AI-assisted video production to ensure consistency and compliance across markets.
  • Evaluate and select AI tools: Research, test, and recommend solutions for content ideation, scripting, automation, localization, and analytics, documenting insights for regional adoption.
  • Collaborate with regional teams: Partner with local market units to implement AI workflows, train content creators, and promote automation adoption to boost productivity.
  • Innovate continuously: Stay ahead of emerging AI technologies, experiment with new models, and translate innovations into scalable systems that improve video quality and personalization.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Experience: Over five years in video production, creative operations, or content innovation, preferably within eCommerce or social commerce sectors.
  • Technical Skills: Hands-on expertise with AI-powered creative tools, generative AI, automation platforms, and video editing automation.
  • Workflow Design: Proven ability to develop and refine scalable production processes across multiple markets.
  • Regional Experience: Familiarity with Southeast Asian markets is highly advantageous.
  • Analytical Mindset: Skilled in translating data and experimentation results into actionable, scalable frameworks.
  • Communication: Strong interpersonal skills to influence stakeholders across regions and functions.

What You Will Gain

Join a portfolio of leading international brands, creating engaging live streams and video content that meet the highest standards. This role offers valuable industry exposure and opportunities for career advancement. Many professionals in similar roles have progressed to become influential brand ambassadors or built large online followings, opening doors to diverse future paths.

Our client adopts a comprehensive omni-channel approach, ensuring seamless customer journeys. Their integrated service model is highly valued by brands for its efficiency and performance, fueling rapid growth and expanding your professional horizons.

Our Culture & Development

We foster a collaborative environment where innovation, transparency, and continuous learning are prioritized. Employees are encouraged to take initiative, share ideas, and contribute to the company's evolution. The workplace balances high performance with a vibrant social culture, including team events, casual gatherings, and shared celebrations.

Professional growth is supported through formal training programs, mentorship, and real-world project leadership. Working alongside talented colleagues, you'll have ample opportunities to develop new skills and advance your career in a dynamic, fast-paced setting.

Compensation & Benefits

Our client offers a competitive salary package complemented by comprehensive benefits, including health coverage and generous leave policies. They value their team members and aim to create a supportive environment where everyone can thrive both professionally and personally.

ad.description:

  • Experience: Demonstrated background in quality assurance, customer experience, or digital content creation, with familiarity in live commerce environments being a plus.
  • Location: Based in Yogyakarta or open to relocation, with availability for periodic team meetings and strategic workshops.
  • Analytical Skills: Proficiency in interpreting live data such as viewership, click-through rates, and engagement patterns to guide coaching efforts.
  • Attention to Detail: Sharp observational skills to detect nuances in speech, body language, and adherence to SOPs.
  • Communication Skills: Ability to deliver clear, objective, and constructive feedback to hosts effectively.

ad.title: Livestream Operations Supervisor – E-commerce & Digital Media
ad.description:
About Our Client

Our Client is a prominent provider of digital and ecommerce solutions across Southeast Asia. They deliver comprehensive omnichannel management, live streaming, video content creation, affiliate marketing for social commerce, and full-spectrum digital marketing services. Powered by innovative in-house technology, they serve top international brands across key marketplaces and social platforms in six SEA countries. Their regional presence, data-driven strategies, and advanced marketing capabilities make them a preferred partner for brands seeking growth and market penetration.

As a rapidly expanding organization and exclusive partner of Flywheel in the region, they offer numerous opportunities to collaborate with leading brands across various sectors. Joining their team means engaging with the forefront of digital commerce and social media marketing, gaining valuable experience in managing end-to-end ecommerce operations.

Team Overview

The Social Commerce division is a dynamic and fast-growing unit specializing in live selling, short-form video content, and affiliate marketing within Southeast Asia. The team works with renowned brands, blending creativity, data insights, and platform expertise to generate measurable business results. Being part of their comprehensive ecommerce ecosystem provides exposure to diverse operational functions, cross-team collaboration, and influence over how brands connect with online consumers in real time.

Your Role and Responsibilities

The Livestream Production Lead will be responsible for managing the technical and operational facets of live streaming and studio activities for our client’s Malaysia operations. This role demands hands-on technical skills in setting up and troubleshooting live broadcasts in a fast-paced ecommerce environment. You will oversee production teams, ensure studio readiness, and continuously enhance livestream quality across multiple platforms.

In addition to technical oversight, you will coordinate livestream campaigns aligned with platform promotions and brand goals, focusing on key metrics such as viewer engagement, traffic, and conversions. Your leadership will be vital in maintaining high standards and optimizing production workflows.

Key Duties Include

  • Technical Oversight of Livestreams: Lead the setup and execution of live sessions on platforms like TikTok Shop and Shopee Live, ensuring professional camera work, lighting, and audio management.
  • Workflow Management: Handle scene switching, overlay integration, and sound balancing using tools such as OBS or vMix, monitoring sessions in real time to troubleshoot issues promptly.
  • Studio & Equipment Maintenance: Keep the studio organized, ensure all equipment is functional, and oversee inventory including cameras, lighting, and audio gear. Plan upgrades and conduct routine checks to prevent disruptions.
  • Quality Enhancement: Identify recurring technical problems and implement solutions to improve broadcast stability. Develop SOPs for livestream setup and troubleshooting, documenting best practices for team reference.
  • Team Leadership & Development: Supervise and mentor production assistants, assign tasks, and coordinate schedules for multiple campaigns. Provide training on equipment and operational procedures to ensure consistent standards.
  • Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with social media managers, hosts, and marketing teams to align livestream content with campaign objectives. Support promotional events and contribute insights for continuous improvement.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Experience: Minimum of three years in livestream production, studio operations, or digital video within ecommerce or social media environments.
  • Technical Skills: Proficient with streaming software such as OBS or vMix, with practical knowledge of camera operation, lighting, and audio engineering.
  • Platform Familiarity: Hands-on experience with social commerce platforms like TikTok Shop and Shopee Live.
  • Leadership Abilities: Prior experience supervising technical teams or production staff is advantageous.
  • Problem-Solving: Strong troubleshooting skills and the ability to resolve issues swiftly during live broadcasts.
  • Personal Attributes: Adaptable, organized, detail-oriented, and proactive. Excellent communication skills and a collaborative mindset are essential.
  • Language: Fluency in English is required.

What’s in It for You

Joining this organization means working with a diverse portfolio of international brands, delivering engaging live content that meets high standards. The role offers valuable industry exposure and opportunities for career advancement. Many team members have grown into influential brand ambassadors or built large online followings, opening doors to further success.

The company adopts a holistic approach to digital marketing, integrating live streaming, video content, and affiliate strategies to create seamless consumer journeys. Their regional presence allows for rapid learning, best practice sharing, and scalable growth. The work environment emphasizes innovation, collaboration, and a culture free of politics, where your ideas can make a real impact.

Additional Benefits

As part of their team, you will experience a blend of the agility of a startup with the resources of a multinational organization. They encourage entrepreneurial thinking and value initiative, empowering you to shape your role and contribute to the company's evolution. The culture promotes transparency, mutual support, and continuous learning through formal training, mentorship, and hands-on project involvement. Opportunities for professional development are abundant, supported by a talented team committed to excellence.

Competitive compensation packages, comprehensive health coverage, and generous leave policies are provided to ensure your well-being and work-life balance. They believe in recognizing and rewarding dedication, making sure you feel appreciated and motivated to excel every day.

Monitor market trends to identify new partnership prospects and stay ahead of industry shifts.

Ideal Candidate Profile

Proven track record of establishing and managing partnerships with creators, MCNs, and affiliate networks. Deep understanding of social commerce platforms and influencer operations.

Celebrate successes together, face challenges as a team, and enjoy a vibrant work environment that balances professionalism with fun activities like team outings and social events.

  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment, especially during peak campaign periods.
  • Proactive, curious, and eager to expand skills beyond immediate responsibilities.

Preferred Experience

  • Background in beauty, FMCG, or digital retail sectors.

Employees are encouraged to share ideas, support one another, and celebrate successes together. The work environment balances professionalism with fun activities such as team outings, social events, and informal gatherings, creating a space where you can thrive both personally and professionally.

ad.title: Digital Marketing Specialist – Performance Campaigns & E-commerce Growth

As part of a comprehensive eCommerce ecosystem, team members gain diverse operational exposure, work cross-functionally, and influence how brands engage with online shoppers in real time.

Position Summary

We are seeking a proactive Junior Live Commerce Coordinator to support the planning, execution, and optimization of live streaming events. This role involves coordinating technical setups, managing content, engaging audiences, and analyzing performance metrics to enhance future broadcasts. You will work closely with brand partners, technical teams, and stakeholders to ensure seamless live sessions that captivate viewers and meet strategic objectives.

Key Responsibilities

  • Event Planning & Coordination: Manage the end-to-end organization of live streaming sessions, aligning schedules and resources to ensure smooth execution. Collaborate with brands to understand event goals and integrate them into production plans.
  • Technical Oversight: Oversee all technical elements such as audio, video, lighting, and equipment setup, ensuring optimal performance. Troubleshoot issues during live broadcasts and coordinate with technical teams to resolve them swiftly.
  • Platform Setup & Management: Assist in configuring streaming platforms, including software and hardware, to guarantee high-quality broadcasts. Work with technical staff to implement necessary streaming solutions.
  • Stakeholder Communication: Maintain clear communication channels with vendors, partners, and internal teams before, during, and after live events to ensure alignment and smooth coordination.
  • Audience Engagement & Content Support: Contribute to creating engaging content and interactive features like polls and Q&A sessions. Monitor live chat interactions, respond to viewer inquiries, and foster a lively community atmosphere.
  • Performance Analysis & Reporting: Collect and review data on event performance, audience engagement, and feedback. Use insights to refine future live streams and prepare comprehensive reports for stakeholders.
  • Post-Event Activities: Support editing and publishing recorded streams across relevant platforms. Assist in compiling post-event summaries and insights to inform ongoing strategies.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Educational Background: Degree in Communications, Media, or related fields is preferred.
  • Experience: Prior involvement in live event coordination or content production is advantageous.
  • Technical Skills: Familiarity with streaming platforms such as YouTube, Facebook Live, or Twitch, along with streaming tools like OBS or Streamlabs, is a plus.
  • Organizational Abilities: Strong multitasking, problem-solving, and time management skills are essential.
  • Communication: Effective interpersonal skills to liaise with various stakeholders and team members.
  • Additional Knowledge: Basic understanding of video editing and production tools is beneficial.

What You Will Gain

Joining our client’s team means working alongside renowned international brands, delivering high-quality live content, and gaining valuable industry experience. Many past team members have advanced to prominent roles or built substantial online followings, opening doors to diverse opportunities. The role offers broad exposure to integrated digital marketing strategies, enabling you to develop a versatile skill set in a fast-paced environment.

ad.title: Junior Operations Coordinator – E-commerce & Logistics Support
ad.description:
About Our Client

Our Client is a prominent provider of digital and e-commerce solutions across Southeast Asia. Team Overview

The Operations Department ensures seamless backend processes—overseeing warehouse activities, inventory management, and order fulfillment with accuracy and efficiency. Their focus on meticulous procedures and coordination guarantees that customer and client commitments are consistently met, maintaining a smooth end-to-end shopping experience.

Your Role and Responsibilities

  • Assist in tracking and managing the entire order lifecycle, from initial receipt in the Seller Center to final delivery at the customer’s location.
  • Review and document current supply chain workflows, utilizing project management tools to map product, service, and information flows.
  • Handle product returns and exchanges, updating inventory records and restocking items as needed.
  • Coordinate with internal teams and external partners to perform monthly stock reconciliations, ensuring inventory accuracy and resolving discrepancies for smooth reporting and settlements.
  • Support shipping and receiving activities, including order preparation, verification, and processing incoming deliveries.
  • Analyze customer data to identify opportunities for enhancing relationships and service quality.
  • Assess potential risks that could impact operational efficiency and implement strategies to mitigate them.
  • Monitor weekly performance metrics, analyze ongoing improvement projects, and prepare relevant reports.
  • Identify and address lapses in logistics services to ensure timely delivery to customers.
  • Optimize resource utilization within operational activities to meet business objectives.
  • Contribute to the development of sales proposals and tender documentation to support business growth.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Minimum of six months’ experience in warehouse or logistics operations.
  • Solid understanding of warehouse management, e-commerce logistics, and supply chain processes.
  • Ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced environment under pressure.
  • Proficiency in MS Office applications, especially Excel and Outlook, at an intermediate level.
  • Strong organizational skills paired with an analytical mindset.
  • Excellent time management capabilities to prioritize tasks effectively.

What We Offer

Working in the e-commerce sector offers a vibrant and fast-moving environment, characterized by rapid product turnover, tight delivery schedules, and high demand during promotional campaigns. It’s an energetic field that rewards agility, problem-solving, and resilience. Our client collaborates with renowned international brands across diverse categories such as consumer goods, fashion, and electronics, each with unique operational needs. Their multi-warehouse and omnichannel fulfillment solutions create a dynamic workspace filled with learning opportunities and career advancement potential.

Many processes are automated through sophisticated in-house systems, with numerous warehouses integrated via APIs, reducing manual workload and emphasizing precision and numerical accuracy. As part of an international team, you will work closely with local operations managers and regional experts, fostering a rich environment for learning and innovation.

Unique Benefits and Culture

Our client operates with the agility of a startup combined with the resources of a multinational organization. Employees are encouraged to take initiative, contribute ideas, and influence the company's growth trajectory. The workplace culture emphasizes collaboration, transparency, and continuous learning, creating a supportive environment where team members celebrate successes and tackle challenges together. Regular team-building activities, social events, and informal gatherings foster camaraderie and a positive atmosphere.

Professional development is a priority, with access to structured training programs, mentorship, and hands-on experience with cutting-edge technology. Working alongside talented colleagues, you will have ample opportunities to expand your skills and advance your career in a thriving industry.

Compensation and Support

Recognizing the value of your contributions, our client offers competitive pay packages complemented by comprehensive benefits, including health coverage and generous leave policies. They aim to create a workplace where employees feel appreciated, supported, and motivated to excel every day.

ad.title: Senior Digital Performance Marketing Specialist - E-commerce Focus
ad.description:

  • Develop and execute A/B testing frameworks to foster continuous growth and campaign improvement.
  • Manage analytics tools and performance dashboards, offering strategic recommendations based on data analysis.

  • Proficient in media planning, budget management, and ad performance optimization.

  • Capable of adapting swiftly in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment.

What We Offer

Our client leverages advanced in-house technology to streamline campaign management and deliver superior results. Enjoy a flexible work setting that combines the agility of a startup with the resources of a larger organization. Development & Benefits

ad.title: Regional E-Commerce Training & Development Specialist
ad.description:
About Our Client

Team Overview

The Brand Management team acts as a strategic partner for major brands in Southeast Asia, focusing on planning and executing initiatives that foster sustainable online growth. By analyzing performance metrics, uncovering new opportunities, and aligning strategies with clients’ commercial goals, the team develops data-informed plans to optimize conversions and revenue. Their deep understanding of category trends and platform dynamics, combined with effective cross-functional collaboration, positions them as key drivers of long-term brand success in the digital marketplace.

Your Role

As the Regional Learning & Development Specialist focused on commercial capabilities, you will craft and implement digital training programs for a leading retail organization across Southeast Asia and China. Your primary focus will be on designing and launching initiatives that enhance omnichannel retail and digital commerce skills, enabling top-tier performance in the region.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design and manage learning modules: Develop, adapt, and deploy educational content for the Digital Academy, covering areas such as ecommerce operations, channel strategies, digital marketing, analytics, and commercial management. Ensure materials are engaging, accurate, and aligned with business objectives.
  • Content creation and assessment: Lead the development of interactive, modular learning resources, including quizzes, case studies, and activities, ensuring they meet quality standards and are compatible with SCORM and blended learning formats.
  • Regional program deployment: Oversee the end-to-end rollout of training initiatives across multiple SEA markets, coordinating timelines and customizing content to regional and local needs.
  • Stakeholder collaboration: Work closely with internal teams, external vendors, and business leaders to ensure learning programs support strategic goals. Gather feedback and evaluate program success through KPIs such as completion rates and participant feedback.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Educational background: Bachelor’s degree or higher in Business, Education, or related fields.
  • Experience: At least three years in learning and development, commercial training, or capability building, preferably within retail or ecommerce sectors.
  • Regional expertise: Proven experience designing and delivering training programs across multiple markets in Asia.
  • Knowledge base: Strong understanding of omnichannel retail, digital marketing strategies, and commercial operations within the Asian context.
  • Project management: Demonstrated ability to lead learning projects from conception through to execution, with measurable impact on business results.
  • Communication skills: Excellent facilitation and presentation abilities, both virtually and face-to-face. Capable of engaging stakeholders at all levels.
  • Technical familiarity: Experience with LMS platforms, SCORM compliance, and blended learning approaches is advantageous. Fluency in English is essential; Mandarin skills are a plus.

What You Will Gain

  • Engagement with top-tier brands: Collaborate with leading ecommerce brands in the region, gaining comprehensive insights into digital business strategies and operations.
  • Career advancement opportunities: Progress from entry-level roles to senior positions, with increased responsibilities in team leadership and strategic planning.
  • Data-driven environment: Utilize advanced analytics tools to inform decision-making, planning, and initiatives that deliver tangible results.
  • Holistic ecommerce exposure: Develop a broad skill set encompassing analytics, stakeholder management, negotiation, and strategic thinking within a dynamic, multidisciplinary team.

Why Join Us

Our client operates at the intersection of innovation and agility, combining the sophistication of a multinational with the nimbleness of a startup. This environment encourages entrepreneurial thinking, allowing you to take ownership of your projects and contribute ideas that can be implemented directly. The culture emphasizes collaboration, transparency, and continuous learning, fostering a supportive atmosphere where team members celebrate successes and tackle challenges together. Enjoy a balanced work environment that values professional growth and personal well-being, with opportunities for ongoing training, mentorship, and exposure to cutting-edge technology.

Additional Benefits

We prioritize recognizing and rewarding your contributions through competitive pay structures and comprehensive benefits packages. These include extensive health coverage, generous leave policies, and support systems designed to help you thrive both professionally and personally. Our goal is to create a workplace where you feel appreciated, motivated, and empowered to excel every day.

  • Collaborate on onboarding new brands and develop tailored growth plans for each.
  • Work closely with the business development team to identify opportunities for additional services and revenue streams.
  • Partner with category managers to ensure client retention and continuous growth.
  • Analyze data to inform performance improvements and strategic adjustments.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Possess 2-3 years of relevant experience in ecommerce, preferably with platforms like Lazada or Shopee, or with brands/distributors in the digital space.
  • Demonstrate a results-oriented mindset with a flexible, team-oriented approach, thriving in fast-paced environments.
  • Exhibit strong communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.
  • Capable of translating ecommerce strategies into actionable plans on a monthly and yearly basis.
  • Have experience in designing and executing digital marketing campaigns and promotional activities.
  • Possess analytical skills to interpret performance data and recommend improvements.
  • Proficient in project management and familiar with tools like Excel and PowerPoint.

What’s in It for You

Joining Our Client means working alongside some of the most ambitious brands in the ecommerce landscape across Southeast Asia. You will gain comprehensive insight into all aspects of building a successful online business, with opportunities for career advancement from entry-level to senior roles, including team leadership positions. Advanced systems and tools will support your daily operations, allowing you to focus on strategic analysis and impactful initiatives.

The role offers exposure to a diverse set of skills—from analytical and commercial acumen to stakeholder engagement and negotiation—within a collaborative environment that values continuous learning. You will be part of a team that encourages entrepreneurial thinking, where your ideas can be implemented to shape the company's growth trajectory.

Our Culture and Development Philosophy

At Our Client, fostering a positive and supportive work environment is a core principle. The culture emphasizes teamwork over competition, transparency over politics, and a growth mindset over ego. Employees are encouraged to support one another, celebrate successes collectively, and face challenges as a unified team. Work-life balance is prioritized, with team-building activities, social events, and shared experiences that promote camaraderie and enjoyment.

Continuous learning is embedded in the company’s ethos. Employees have access to formal training sessions, coaching programs, and internal development initiatives designed to accelerate professional growth. Real-world project involvement, exposure to innovative technology, and process optimization are integral to career progression, ensuring your development is ongoing and dynamic.

Compensation and Benefits

Our Client recognizes the importance of rewarding dedication and excellence. They offer competitive salary packages complemented by comprehensive benefits, including extensive health coverage and generous leave policies. The organization aims to create an environment where employees feel valued, supported, and motivated to perform at their best every day.

ad.title: Senior Digital Marketing Specialist – E-commerce & Performance Campaigns
ad.description:
About Our Client

Our Client is a prominent provider of digital solutions and e-commerce management services across Southeast Asia. They deliver comprehensive omnichannel strategies, innovative digital marketing offerings, and advanced market insights, all supported by proprietary technology. Their client portfolio includes top international brands operating across major marketplaces and social media platforms in six SEA countries. The organization is renowned for its regional reach, data-driven growth strategies, and a highly skilled team equipped with cutting-edge marketing and technological expertise. Rapid expansion has positioned them as a key partner in the region, offering exciting opportunities to collaborate with leading brands across diverse sectors. Joining their team means engaging with the forefront of digital commerce in SEA and gaining firsthand experience in managing successful end-to-end e-commerce operations.

Position Overview

Seeking a dynamic Performance Marketing Specialist based in Thailand to spearhead digital marketing initiatives as a vital component of our client's business. This role involves managing relationships with prominent brand partners, executing top-tier digital campaigns, and aligning marketing efforts with client objectives to maximize ecommerce potential. The scope includes paid advertising, social commerce, and platform-specific ad management for clients.

Key Responsibilities

  • Serve as the primary contact for assigned clients, overseeing account management and ensuring their needs are met effectively.
  • Design and implement media strategies aligned with brand goals and market trends.
  • Build and nurture strong client relationships by understanding their business objectives and providing strategic guidance.
  • Collaborate with media execution teams to ensure campaign success and optimal performance.
  • Monitor, analyze, and refine online marketing activities to enhance campaign results continually.
  • Coordinate with cross-functional teams such as business development and brand management to develop campaign concepts, creative assets, and commercial mechanics.
  • Deliver comprehensive performance reports and insights to clients, highlighting key learnings and opportunities for growth.
  • Manage advertising campaigns on platforms like Lazada and Shopee, ensuring effective ad placements and budget utilization.
  • Maintain high levels of client satisfaction through proactive communication and service excellence.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Possesses a bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Media, or related fields.
  • Has at least two years of experience in digital or e-commerce marketing, preferably with hands-on platform management or agency experience.
  • Demonstrates expertise in online advertising, media planning, and performance optimization.
  • Familiar with marketplace marketing on platforms such as Lazada and Shopee.
  • Skilled in managing advertising budgets, negotiating with third-party vendors, and optimizing ad campaigns.
  • Fluent in English and Thai, with excellent communication skills for client interactions.
  • Proficient in tracking tools like Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Facebook Pixel, and third-party ad servers.
  • Has a solid understanding of key advertising metrics and performance indicators.
  • Possesses strong analytical abilities, with a knack for interpreting data and deriving actionable insights.
  • Thrives in fast-paced, startup-like environments and adapts quickly to change.

What We Offer

  • Competitive salary package designed to reward your expertise and contributions.
  • A collaborative international work environment that values cultural diversity and innovation.
  • Numerous opportunities for skill enhancement through ongoing training sessions covering e-commerce, technical skills, soft skills, and leadership development.
  • Work alongside industry-leading professionals and collaborate with top-tier brands and partners across various sectors.
  • Gain a comprehensive perspective on the latest trends and developments shaping the Southeast Asian e-commerce landscape.

ad.title: Junior Digital Marketing Specialist – E-commerce & Social Media Campaigns
ad.description:
About Our Client

Our Client is a prominent provider of digital and ecommerce solutions in Southeast Asia, delivering comprehensive omnichannel management, live streaming, video content creation, and affiliate marketing for social commerce. They also offer full-spectrum digital marketing services and advanced market insights, all supported by cutting-edge in-house technology. The organization is known for its regional presence, data-driven strategies, growth-oriented approach, and a highly skilled team equipped with innovative marketing and technological capabilities.

Team Overview

The Digital Marketing division acts as the growth engine for brand partners operating within Southeast Asia’s vibrant ecommerce scene. Specializing in performance advertising on platforms such as Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok, the team manages the entire customer journey—enhancing digital experiences at every touchpoint. From strategic media planning to real-time campaign adjustments and analytics on platforms like Meta, Google, and programmatic channels, they work closely with clients to maximize marketing effectiveness, translating insights into tangible results and conversions.

Your Role

We are seeking a motivated Junior Performance Marketing Executive based in Thailand to contribute to our client's marketing initiatives. This role involves managing relationships with key brand partners and executing digital campaigns that align with their business goals, helping them unlock the full potential of ecommerce marketing. You will be responsible for setting up, optimizing, and monitoring campaigns across various digital channels, including marketplaces, search engines, and social media platforms.

  • Coordinate and oversee campaign setup and ongoing management on platforms such as Shopee, Lazada, Google Shopping, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and Twitter.
  • Assist in developing strategies to boost brand awareness and customer acquisition through targeted digital initiatives.
  • Monitor campaign performance daily, making basic adjustments to improve key performance indicators.
  • Support testing of different creatives, audience segments, and platform features to identify the most effective combinations.
  • Contribute to the preparation of performance reports and conduct preliminary data analysis using tools like Excel or Google Sheets.
  • Help with tracking setup and troubleshooting using analytics tools such as Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, and UTM parameters (training provided).
  • Stay informed about the latest trends, platform updates, and competitive activities in digital marketing.
  • Collaborate with internal teams and clients to ensure campaign goals are met and performance metrics are tracked accurately.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Currently pursuing or holding a bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related fields.
  • 1 to 2 years of experience in digital marketing or ecommerce environments.
  • Basic knowledge of online advertising platforms such as Facebook Ads, Google Ads, or marketplace advertising is advantageous.
  • Familiarity with social media channels and their use in brand marketing strategies.
  • Interest in mastering campaign tracking tools like Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, and Google Tag Manager.
  • Strong attention to detail and a proactive attitude towards learning from data insights.
  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, collaborative team setting, especially within startup or ecommerce contexts.
  • Digital marketing certifications (e.g., Facebook Blueprint, Google Ads, Shopee/Lazada training) are a plus but not mandatory.

What We Offer

Our client is recognized as a top-tier expert in retail media across Southeast Asia, managing advertising campaigns for numerous leading global brands across various ecommerce channels. They leverage advanced proprietary marketing technology that automates many manual tasks, enabling more sophisticated campaign management and superior reporting capabilities. Joining this team means becoming part of a dynamic, entrepreneurial environment where continuous skill development is encouraged, and innovative ideas are welcomed and implemented.

The organization combines the agility of a startup with the resources of a small multinational, providing opportunities to work on innovative projects and take ownership of your role. Employees are encouraged to bring forward ideas that can enhance the company's growth, fostering a culture of initiative and leadership.

Work Culture & Growth Opportunities

At our client, collaboration and transparency are core values. The team supports one another, celebrates successes together, and approaches challenges with a united front. The work environment balances professionalism with fun, offering team lunches, social events, and casual gatherings to promote camaraderie. Employees are empowered to develop their skills through formal training, coaching, and real-world project experience, with ample opportunities for career advancement in a rapidly expanding organization.

Compensation & Benefits

Recognizing the importance of employee well-being, our client provides competitive pay packages along with comprehensive health coverage and generous leave policies. They aim to create a supportive atmosphere where team members feel valued, motivated, and equipped to perform at their best every day.

ad.title: Human Resources Operations Specialist – Dynamic E-commerce Environment
ad.description:
About Our Client

Our Client is a prominent provider of digital and e-commerce solutions across Southeast Asia. They deliver comprehensive omnichannel management, live streaming, video content creation, affiliate marketing for social commerce, and full-spectrum digital marketing services. Their advanced in-house technology supports a diverse portfolio of international brands operating across key marketplaces and social media platforms in six SEA countries. Known for their regional reach, data-driven strategies, and innovative marketing capabilities, they attract top-tier clients seeking growth-focused solutions.

Join a Forward-Thinking Team

The Talent & People team is central to our client’s success, fostering a culture where employees can flourish and unlock their full potential. From talent acquisition and onboarding to engagement initiatives and retention strategies, this team plays a vital role in cultivating a high-performing, motivated workforce. Their mission is to support both business growth and employee development in a collaborative environment.

Your Role and Responsibilities

  • Manage all aspects of employee lifecycle processes, including onboarding, offboarding, transfers, promotions, and terminations, ensuring smooth transitions and accurate documentation.
  • Coordinate new hire orientation sessions and facilitate exit procedures, including communication of staff movements and engagement activities such as office tours and community programs for interns.
  • Oversee the administration of office facilities contracts and related operational tasks to ensure seamless daily operations.
  • Maintain the integrity and security of employee records within HR information systems and physical files, updating policies and procedures regularly.
  • Assist with employee inquiries regarding employment status, visas, permits, and compliance with government-mandated benefits like SSS, Pag-IBIG, and PhilHealth.
  • Generate payroll-related reports, including attendance and deduction summaries, and analyze HR data to inform strategic decisions.
  • Support regional HR initiatives, including employer branding campaigns aimed at attracting high-caliber candidates and enhancing the company's reputation as an employer of choice.
  • Contribute to performance management processes and employee relations activities to foster a positive workplace environment.
  • Organize and facilitate employee engagement events such as team-building activities, town halls, and social gatherings to strengthen team cohesion.
  • Participate in the development of cultural initiatives and learning programs that promote continuous growth and a vibrant workplace culture.
  • Assist in refining HR workflows, payroll procedures, and benefits administration to improve efficiency and compliance.
  • Handle miscellaneous administrative duties, including office management and support tasks as needed.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Possesses 2 to 4 years of relevant experience in HR operations or a similar capacity.
  • Demonstrates a proactive approach with strong stakeholder engagement skills and a business-oriented mindset.
  • Self-motivated, adaptable, and capable of working independently in a fast-paced environment.
  • Enthusiastic about fostering an inclusive, high-energy, and enjoyable workplace culture.
  • Resourceful team player with excellent organizational and communication skills.
  • Proficient in MS Office 365, Google Workspace, and HRIS systems.
  • Holds a degree in Human Resources, Social Sciences, or related fields such as Psychology, Sociology, or Economics.
  • Knowledge of employment laws, statutory benefits, and workplace safety regulations is advantageous.
  • Available to start immediately or on short notice is preferred.

What’s in It for You

Engage with complex HR challenges within a vibrant e-commerce setting, leveraging data insights and innovative strategies. You will be part of a dedicated People Team that combines the agility of a startup with the structure of a multinational organization, constantly pushing boundaries to improve employee experience and operational excellence. As the team expands and new initiatives are launched, you'll find ample opportunities for professional growth through structured training, mentorship, and hands-on project involvement.

Our collaborative culture emphasizes transparency, mutual support, and shared success. You’ll enjoy a lively work environment that balances productivity with fun, including team outings, social events, and casual gatherings. This is a place where your contributions truly matter, and your career can flourish without limits.

Why Choose Us

Our client operates at the intersection of innovation and agility, offering the chance to work on impactful projects with a talented team. They value entrepreneurial spirit and encourage team members to take ownership of their roles, fostering a sense of empowerment and creativity. The organization’s culture promotes open communication, continuous learning, and a supportive atmosphere where everyone’s voice is heard.

Employees benefit from competitive compensation packages, comprehensive health coverage, generous leave policies, and a focus on work-life balance. Join a dynamic environment where your efforts are recognized and rewarded, and where you can make a meaningful difference in the digital commerce landscape.

ad.title: Regional AI-Driven Video Content Strategist for E-Commerce & Social Media
ad.description:
About Our Client

Our Client is a prominent provider of digital and e-commerce solutions across Southeast Asia. They deliver comprehensive omnichannel management, live streaming, video content creation, affiliate marketing for social commerce, and full-spectrum digital marketing services. Powered by innovative in-house technology, they serve leading international brands across key marketplaces and social platforms in six SEA countries. Their regional presence, data-driven strategies, and advanced marketing capabilities make them a preferred partner for brands seeking growth and innovation.

Team Overview

Their Social Commerce division is rapidly expanding, specializing in live selling, short-form video content, and affiliate marketing throughout Southeast Asia. Collaborating with top-tier brands, the team combines creativity, data insights, and platform expertise to generate tangible business results. As part of their integrated eCommerce ecosystem, team members gain diverse operational exposure, work with cross-functional experts, and influence how brands engage with digital consumers in real time.

Position Summary

Our Client is seeking an innovative Regional AI Video Content Lead to spearhead the evolution of video production through artificial intelligence, automation, and intelligent systems. This role merges creative storytelling with machine learning to streamline and enhance video content creation across Southeast Asia. You will champion AI integration within the regional video team, establish standardized workflows, and enable scalable, high-quality output for eCommerce and social commerce brands.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and execute AI-powered video production strategies: Utilize advanced AI tools, autonomous AI systems, and automation to optimize workflows and accelerate content creation.
  • Enhance creative processes with AI integration: Combine storytelling techniques with AI-driven automation to improve efficiency and output quality.
  • Support regional leadership in AI strategy deployment: Assist in implementing AI initiatives across Southeast Asian markets, ensuring alignment with regional goals.
  • Streamline production workflows: Identify inefficiencies, redesign processes with automation, and reduce turnaround times while maintaining high standards.
  • Expand content capacity: Increase output without proportional increases in resources by embedding AI tools into daily operations.
  • Set and monitor productivity benchmarks: Define KPIs such as turnaround speed, revision cycles, and cost metrics, refining systems for continuous improvement.
  • Evaluate and select AI tools: Research and test solutions for content ideation, scripting, video generation, editing automation, localization, and analytics, documenting insights for regional adoption.
  • Design standardized workflows: Create SOPs and best practices for AI-assisted video production, ensuring consistency and brand integrity across markets.
  • Collaborate with regional teams: Partner with local units to implement AI frameworks, train content creators, and promote automation adoption.
  • Drive innovation and continuous learning: Stay ahead of emerging AI technologies, experiment with new models, and translate innovations into scalable solutions that deliver measurable results.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Experience: Over five years in video production, creative operations, or content innovation, preferably within eCommerce or social commerce sectors.
  • Technical Skills: Hands-on expertise with AI-powered creative tools, generative AI, automation platforms, and video editing automation.
  • Workflow Optimization: Proven track record of designing and refining scalable production processes.
  • Regional Experience: Familiarity with multiple Southeast Asian markets is highly advantageous.
  • Content Strategy: Deep understanding of performance-driven content and data-informed creative optimization.
  • Communication & Influence: Strong interpersonal skills to engage with cross-functional and regional stakeholders effectively.
  • Analytical Mindset: Ability to interpret experimentation data and develop scalable frameworks for content innovation.

What You Will Gain

Engage with a diverse portfolio of international brands, producing compelling live streams and video content that meet the highest standards. This role offers valuable industry exposure and growth opportunities, with many former team members advancing to prominent brand ambassador roles or building large online followings. You will be part of a comprehensive omnichannel approach that ensures seamless customer journeys, leveraging a full suite of services under one umbrella. This integrated model is highly effective and continues to drive rapid expansion.

Our client champions a blend of creative talent and data analytics, empowering you to analyze and optimize content performance with ease. You will work within a global organization that values scalability, stability, and local relevance, fostering a collaborative environment free of politics. The company’s flexible, fast-paced culture encourages entrepreneurial thinking and innovation, giving you the freedom to shape your career trajectory.

Additional Benefits

As part of this team, you will experience a dynamic work environment that combines the agility of a startup with the resources of a multinational. You will have opportunities to lead innovative projects, contribute ideas, and see your initiatives implemented. The organization emphasizes a supportive culture built on transparency, teamwork, and continuous learning, with regular social events and team-building activities to foster camaraderie.

Professional development is a priority, with access to formal training, coaching, and hands-on experience working with cutting-edge technology. The company offers competitive pay structures and comprehensive benefits packages, including health coverage and generous leave policies, to support your well-being and work-life balance.
