This leadership position involves overseeing comprehensive financial analysis, managing reporting processes, and supporting business growth initiatives across the region.

Key Responsibilities

  • Coordinate and execute financial planning, budgeting, and forecasting activities tailored to regional business needs.
  • Serve as the primary liaison for statutory audits, internal reviews, and compliance checks, ensuring adherence to local and international standards.
  • Oversee the migration of transactional accounting functions such as accounts payable, receivable, and general ledger to an offshore accounting hub.
  • Prepare, review, and reconcile balance sheet accounts to maintain financial accuracy and integrity.
  • Collaborate with the corporate finance team to identify process enhancements, leveraging IT systems to streamline operations and reinforce internal controls.
  • Manage tax filings and ensure compliance with local tax laws and corporate regulations.
  • Report directly to the Regional CFO, with a matrix reporting line to local management teams, providing strategic financial insights to support decision-making.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Possesses a bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field, with professional certifications such as CPA, ACCA, ICAEW, or equivalent.
  • Brings at least six years of comprehensive experience in accounting and financial management, preferably within the retail or ecommerce sectors.
  • Demonstrates strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret complex data and communicate insights clearly to non-financial stakeholders.
  • Experience with Netsuite or similar ERP systems, especially in automating financial processes, is highly advantageous.
  • Deep understanding of local corporate tax laws and regulatory frameworks across Southeast Asia.
  • Highly organized, proactive, and capable of prioritizing tasks effectively in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.
  • Excellent command of English, both spoken and written, with strong interpersonal skills.

What’s in It for You

Join a dynamic finance team committed to excellence, innovation, and continuous growth. You will work within a sophisticated operational environment that combines the stability of a multinational organization with the agility of a startup culture. Our client offers extensive learning opportunities across diverse business models, allowing you to develop a broad skill set and deepen your expertise. Collaborate closely with regional and local teams, gaining valuable exposure and contributing to impactful financial strategies in a supportive setting.

ad.title: Senior Regional Brand Marketing Strategist
ad.description:
Overview of the Role

Our Client is seeking an experienced professional to lead regional brand marketing initiatives, focusing on developing and executing comprehensive strategies for key accounts. This role involves steering brand positioning, account management, and cross-channel marketing efforts to achieve business goals.

Core Responsibilities

  • Develop and implement distinctive brand strategies tailored to specific accounts, aligning with overarching business objectives, market trends, and audience insights.
  • Lead strategic discussions during client presentations and review meetings, offering senior-level insights and cross-market perspectives to ensure consistency and clarity across all marketing activities.
  • Design and execute full-funnel marketing plans that translate strategic goals into actionable campaigns, covering audience segmentation, funnel stages (awareness, consideration, conversion), and channel roles such as social media platforms and marketplaces.
  • Coordinate messaging and content strategies to ensure messaging coherence and effectiveness throughout the customer journey.
  • Provide strategic guidance to creative and performance teams on campaign messaging, content development, and channel activation to ensure seamless execution.
  • Utilize data analytics and market intelligence tools like category benchmarks and competitive analysis to inform strategic decisions and identify growth opportunities.
  • Translate insights into innovative strategies that foster account growth and optimize marketing performance.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Possesses a bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Media, or related fields.
  • Brings over 8 years of experience in comprehensive performance marketing, including brand strategy and integrated campaigns.
  • Has a proven track record working with social commerce and digital advertising platforms such as TikTok, Shopee, Lazada, and Meta.
  • Skilled at connecting creative concepts with measurable business results and performance metrics.
  • Excellent storytelling and presentation abilities, with a strategic, data-oriented approach to decision-making.
  • Experience in e-commerce environments or agency settings is advantageous.

What We Offer

Our Client is recognized as a leading retail media expert across Southeast Asia, managing advertising campaigns for top international brands across various e-commerce channels. Our advanced marketing technology automates many manual tasks, enabling sophisticated campaign management and optimization, complemented by comprehensive reporting tools for easy oversight.

Join a dynamic, entrepreneurial marketing team that values skill development and business growth. We are expanding our full-funnel service offerings, delivering integrated solutions centered around TikTok and other platforms, to provide impactful marketing strategies for our clients.

ad.title: Senior E-commerce Account Strategist for Growing Digital Retail Brands
ad.description:
Role Overview

Our Client is seeking a dedicated E-commerce Account Strategist to oversee and expand the online sales channels for one or multiple brands across various digital marketplaces. Serving as the primary liaison and strategic partner for your assigned brands, you will craft comprehensive online growth plans and take ownership of their commercial success, treating each brand as your own business.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and implement strategic plans to boost brand visibility and sales performance across e-commerce platforms.
  • Build and nurture strong relationships with platform representatives and brand stakeholders to optimize promotional opportunities and consumer engagement.
  • Coordinate with internal teams—including content, operations, and customer support—to ensure alignment and drive overall brand success.
  • Identify and leverage growth opportunities by analyzing marketplace trends and performance data.
  • Manage account revenue streams and work closely with business development to explore additional service offerings that can benefit your brands.
  • Design annual growth strategies, promotional calendars, and campaign proposals to meet and exceed targets.
  • Collaborate on onboarding new brands and develop tailored growth initiatives for each.
  • Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) to ensure brand and store objectives are achieved.
  • Partner with category managers to maintain account retention and identify expansion opportunities.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Possesses 2-3 years of relevant experience in e-commerce, preferably with marketplace platforms such as Lazada or Shopee, or with brand/distribution channels.
  • Has a results-oriented approach with a flexible, team-oriented mindset suited for a dynamic startup environment.
  • Excels in building relationships, negotiating, and communicating effectively with diverse stakeholders.
  • Capable of translating brand strategies into actionable online campaigns and plans on a monthly and yearly basis.
  • Skilled in analyzing performance data to identify improvement opportunities and optimize campaigns.
  • Experienced in managing projects and coordinating cross-functional teams to meet objectives.
  • Proficient in Excel, PowerPoint, and digital marketing tools.

What We Offer

Join a team that collaborates with some of the most innovative brands in Southeast Asia’s e-commerce landscape. You will gain comprehensive insights into all aspects of online retail growth, from strategic planning to execution. The career path offers opportunities for advancement from junior to senior levels, with increasing responsibilities in team leadership and commercial management. Advanced tools and systems support your efforts, allowing you to focus on impactful analysis, strategic planning, and innovative initiatives. Working in this field will enhance your skills across analytics, stakeholder engagement, and negotiation within a vibrant, supportive environment.

ad.title: Senior Accounts Payable Specialist – Multinational Finance Operations
ad.description:
Position Overview

Our Client is seeking a detail-oriented Senior Accounts Payable Specialist to join their dedicated finance team within the Center of Excellence. This role involves managing AP functions across multiple Southeast Asian markets, including Vietnam, Thailand, Indonesia, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. The position plays a vital part in ensuring efficient receivables processing and strict adherence to collection policies across diverse brands and regions.

Key Responsibilities

  • Oversee automated AP entry procedures by utilizing master data trackers, supporting various business models such as retail platforms, claim processing, store management, and marketing initiatives.
  • Maintain and refine master data records to facilitate seamless automation and accurate account mapping for ERP system uploads.
  • Record expenses and accruals in accordance with international financial reporting standards and internal policies.
  • Partner with the Data Automation team to enhance and streamline automated booking workflows.
  • Manage regional expenses including AP, fulfillment costs, general & administrative expenses, fixed assets, banking, and marketing costs, ensuring proper reconciliation, journal entries, and supporting documentation.

Dispute Management & Reconciliation

  • Investigate and resolve billing disputes, credit note requests, and payment inconsistencies efficiently.
  • Coordinate with operations to perform three-way matching of purchase orders, receipt of goods, and invoices.
  • Maintain a comprehensive log of disputes, tracking aging and escalation points for unresolved issues.
  • Support external audits by providing complete and accurate AP documentation.

Payment Processing & Follow-up

  • Monitor outstanding AP balances across retail and marketing portfolios, ensuring timely payments.
  • Execute payments following established approval hierarchies and procedures.
  • Maintain a detailed payment tracker, including follow-ups, commitments, and escalation actions.
  • Collaborate with finance and business teams across countries to address overdue accounts and arrange payment plans.
  • Ensure uniformity in payment and collection policies across all operational units and brands.

Compliance & Reporting

  • Guarantee adherence to local tax regulations, cross-border withholding taxes, and intercompany policies.
  • Identify accounts exceeding policy thresholds and escalate as needed.
  • Develop and regularly update standard operating procedures for AP processes to maintain consistency and compliance.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline.
  • Minimum of two years’ experience in accounts payable, preferably within shared service centers or multi-national environments.
  • Proficiency with ERP systems such as NetSuite or similar platforms.
  • Advanced skills in spreadsheet applications, including pivot tables, formulas, and data validation.
  • Understanding of various revenue models like retail margins, consignment commissions, and claimback processes.
  • Strong attention to detail, with excellent analytical and problem-solving capabilities.
  • Effective communication skills in English and Thai, both written and spoken.
  • Ability to prioritize tasks across multiple regions and business units.
  • Customer-focused mindset with a professional approach to collections and dispute resolution.
  • Comfortable working collaboratively with cross-functional teams and external auditors.

What We Offer

  • Join a dynamic finance team committed to continuous growth and innovation, operating with the agility of a startup while maintaining the stability of a global organization.
  • Engage in diverse projects across various business models, gaining broad exposure and valuable experience.
  • Work closely with regional and local finance teams to optimize financial processes and drive improvements.
  • Benefit from a culture that encourages learning, development, and proactive problem-solving in a supportive environment.

ad.title: Senior Regional Brand Marketing Strategist – Digital Commerce & Performance Campaigns
ad.description:
About Our Client’s Digital Marketing Team

The Digital Marketing division drives data-informed growth initiatives for brand partners operating within Southeast Asia’s vibrant eCommerce sector. Specializing in performance advertising across platforms such as Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok, the team manages the entire customer journey—from initial awareness to final conversion—crafting engaging digital experiences at every touchpoint. Their scope includes media planning, real-time campaign optimization, and analytics on channels like Meta, Google, and Programmatic platforms. Collaborating closely with clients, the team aims to maximize eCommerce marketing effectiveness by transforming insights into strategic actions that boost engagement and sales.

Your Role and Responsibilities

We are seeking an innovative and strategic Regional Brand Marketing Lead to join our dynamic team. This position operates at the nexus of strategic planning and operational execution, requiring a dual focus: developing a unified, high-performance social commerce framework across multiple markets and leading key brand accounts with a strategic perspective. You will serve as both a visionary thinker and a capability builder, connecting overarching business goals with audience insights, full-funnel marketing tactics, and compelling content creation.

As the Regional Lead for Brand Strategy, your key responsibilities include:

  • Developing and guiding brand strategies: Craft distinctive marketing approaches for major accounts, rooted in business goals, market trends, and audience data. Ensure consistency and clarity across all marketing efforts, leading strategic discussions during pitches and quarterly reviews with a senior perspective and cross-market insights.
  • Designing comprehensive marketing plans: Convert business objectives into detailed, full-funnel campaigns that encompass audience segmentation, funnel stages (awareness, consideration, conversion), and channel roles such as TikTok, Meta, and marketplaces. Develop content strategies that focus on messaging rather than just content creation, maintaining alignment across all channels and stages.
  • Providing strategic guidance and ensuring execution: Offer clear directives to creative and performance teams, including messaging, content approach, and activation strategies. Oversee account-level activities to guarantee seamless implementation of strategic plans.
  • Utilizing data and market insights: Leverage tools like TikTok MarketScope, category benchmarks, and competitive analysis to inform strategic decisions. Translate insights into actionable recommendations that foster growth and optimize campaign performance.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Media, or related fields
  • Over eight years of experience in full-funnel performance marketing, with a focus on brand strategy and integrated campaigns
  • Proven expertise in social commerce and digital advertising platforms such as TikTok, Shopee, Lazada, and Meta
  • Ability to connect creative concepts with measurable business results and performance metrics
  • Exceptional storytelling and presentation skills
  • A strategic mindset complemented by a strong analytical approach
  • Experience working within eCommerce or agency environments is advantageous

What You Will Gain

Join a leading team recognized for excellence in retail media across Southeast Asia, managing advertising campaigns for top international brands across various eCommerce channels. Benefit from advanced marketing technology that automates routine tasks, enabling sophisticated campaign management and detailed reporting for optimal oversight. Be part of a passionate, entrepreneurial group committed to skill development and business expansion across multiple verticals. Our expanding suite of full-funnel services offers integrated solutions tailored to client needs, with a focus on innovative, impactful marketing strategies.

ad.title: Senior Live Commerce Strategist & Team Lead for Digital Retail Growth
ad.description:
Join Our Client’s Dynamic Live Commerce Leadership Team

Our Client, a rapidly expanding player in Southeast Asia’s digital retail scene, is seeking an experienced Live Commerce Manager to spearhead and expand their livestream shopping initiatives across major eCommerce platforms. This leadership role involves overseeing the entire live streaming operation, transforming it into a significant revenue driver, and enhancing content quality and presenter performance.

  • Develop and implement comprehensive live commerce strategies that integrate live broadcasts, short-form videos, and affiliate marketing to boost user engagement and sales volume.
  • Collaborate with brand partners to establish clear sales and promotional goals aligned with platform algorithms and audience preferences.
  • Manage the full campaign lifecycle from concept creation, scheduling, host coordination, to post-event analysis, ensuring seamless execution.
  • Optimize content calendars around key shopping events like mega sales, special promotional days, and platform-wide campaigns to maximize impact.
  • Strengthen creator and affiliate networks through strategic recruitment, activation, and ongoing performance management of key opinion leaders and content creators.
  • Coordinate with creative, marketing, and operational teams to ensure consistent storytelling, product readiness, and real-time order fulfillment during live sessions.
  • Track and analyze campaign metrics such as click-through rates, viewer retention, sales figures, and conversion rates, providing insights for continuous improvement.
  • Maintain active relationships with platform partners like TikTok, Shopee, and Lazada to stay informed about new features, tools, and best practices.

Performance Oversight & Data-Driven Improvement

  • Monitor key performance indicators across all live commerce activities using dashboards and detailed reports, highlighting successes and areas for growth.
  • Generate comprehensive performance summaries for internal teams and clients, emphasizing insights and strategic recommendations.
  • Identify industry trends and competitive benchmarks to refine and evolve the live commerce approach continually.

Leadership & Team Development

  • Lead and nurture the live commerce team, including moderators, hosts, and operational staff, fostering a results-oriented environment.
  • Set clear performance goals and KPIs, providing coaching to enhance team capabilities and content quality.
  • Drive talent acquisition and retention efforts to build a high-performing livestream team.

Cross-Functional Collaboration & Operational Alignment

  • Work closely with marketing, content, and logistics teams to synchronize campaign efforts with broader business strategies.
  • Coordinate with platform representatives to stay updated on new features, policies, and best practices, ensuring compliance and innovation.
  • Ensure real-time inventory and order management during live sessions to deliver a smooth customer experience.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Possesses a bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related fields.
  • Has 5-7 years of experience in live commerce, digital marketing, or eCommerce, with a proven track record of managing successful livestream campaigns.
  • Deep familiarity with major platforms such as TikTok Shop, Shopee, and Lazada.
  • Demonstrates leadership skills in managing diverse teams and high-pressure project cycles.
  • Combines strategic thinking with a strong commercial acumen, balancing creativity with operational efficiency.
  • Excellent communication skills for engaging with clients, partners, and cross-functional teams.
  • Data-savvy, capable of interpreting analytics to inform decision-making and optimize campaign results.
  • Organized, detail-oriented, and capable of multitasking effectively in a fast-paced environment.
  • Creative problem-solver, adept at handling live challenges with agility and professionalism.
  • Passionate about eCommerce trends and committed to continuous learning and innovation.

ad.title: Digital Marketing & Influencer Partnership Specialist
ad.description:
Join Our Dynamic Social Commerce Team

Our client is seeking a proactive professional to be part of a rapidly expanding team at the forefront of live-stream sales, short-form video content, and affiliate collaborations across Southeast Asia. This role offers a unique opportunity to work with leading brands, blending innovative creativity with data-driven strategies to achieve tangible business outcomes. As a member of a comprehensive eCommerce ecosystem, you'll gain diverse operational exposure, collaborate with specialists across departments, and influence how brands engage with online consumers in real time.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design and implement affiliate marketing plans aimed at boosting brand visibility, user engagement, and revenue growth on TikTok.
  • Identify, approach, and onboard TikTok influencers and content creators to expand the affiliate network.
  • Foster strong, ongoing relationships with affiliate partners by offering support, strategic guidance, and performance incentives.
  • Work closely with affiliates to develop and refine TikTok content that aligns with brand messaging and campaign goals.
  • Track campaign performance through key metrics, analyzing data to enhance future strategies and maximize results.
  • Stay informed about the latest TikTok trends, platform updates, and best practices to ensure optimal content visibility and engagement.
  • Coordinate with marketing, sales, and product teams to ensure consistent messaging and strategic alignment across initiatives.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Holds a bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related discipline.
  • Demonstrates proven experience in digital marketing, influencer outreach, or affiliate programs, particularly with TikTok.
  • Possesses a deep understanding of TikTok’s platform features, trending content, and algorithmic nuances.
  • Excels in communication and relationship-building, capable of engaging with influencers and partners effectively.
  • Brings a creative approach to content development and storytelling that captures audience interest.
  • Has a strong analytical mindset, skilled at interpreting campaign data to inform strategic decisions.
  • Self-driven, results-oriented, and comfortable working independently or within a collaborative, fast-paced environment.

What We Offer

  • Opportunities for professional growth within a vibrant, innovative team environment.
  • Exposure to a broad spectrum of operational functions within a leading eCommerce ecosystem.
  • Supportive work culture that values creativity, initiative, and continuous learning.
  • Competitive compensation package complemented by flexible work arrangements.

ad.title: Senior M&E Project Manager – Construction & Engineering Leadership
ad.description:
Position Overview

Our Client is seeking an experienced professional to oversee daily operations related to the construction of a major project, focusing primarily on mechanical and electrical aspects. The role involves coordinating with various stakeholders to ensure smooth project execution and adherence to safety and quality standards.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead the management of all construction activities, with support from M&E teams specializing in mechanical and electrical systems.
  • Act as the primary liaison with clients, project representatives, and regulatory authorities to facilitate effective communication and compliance.
  • Coordinate efforts among M&E engineers and coordinators to develop comprehensive plans and technical specifications.
  • Review safety documentation to ensure compliance with organizational policies and environmental standards.
  • Track project progress, identify potential issues, and implement corrective actions to maintain schedule and quality.
  • Oversee the planning and execution of sub-contractors and ongoing production activities.
  • Manage variations in M&E services and control costs to stay within budget constraints during construction.

Candidate Profile

  • Possess a recognized degree or diploma in Mechanical, Electrical, or Construction Engineering, or related fields.
  • Bring a minimum of five years’ experience in managing building and construction projects.
  • Have practical knowledge of BIM modeling software and its application in project planning.
  • Demonstrate strong expertise in mechanical and electrical systems, including HVAC, plumbing, electrical distribution, and fire safety systems.
  • Be familiar with relevant building codes, safety regulations, and environmental standards governing M&E installations.
  • Exhibit excellent teamwork and communication skills to collaborate effectively with diverse project members.
  • Showcase strong analytical skills, with a focus on problem-solving and precise decision-making.

Additional Details

  • Location: Shan Road
  • Work Schedule: 5.5 days per week
  • Enjoy comprehensive benefits designed to support your professional growth and well-being, including flexible work arrangements and ongoing training opportunities.

ad.title: Mechanical and Electrical Project Coordinator
ad.description:
Position Overview

Our Client is seeking a dedicated professional to oversee and coordinate M&E services within construction projects. The role involves active participation in project meetings and effective communication with clients, consultants, authorities, and subcontractors to ensure smooth project execution.

Key Responsibilities

  • Supervise the submission and review of method statements, drawings, materials, and samples from M&E subcontractors.
  • Coordinate with various stakeholders, including clients, consultants, and authorities, to address M&E-related issues.
  • Ensure all work complies with relevant safety standards, codes of practice, and regulatory requirements.
  • Monitor work progress and facilitate timely updates and reporting.
  • Assist in managing ad-hoc tasks and project-related duties as needed.

Candidate Profile

  • Possess a diploma or degree in Mechanical, Electrical, Construction, or Building Engineering.
  • Minimum of two years' experience in a related field, preferably within the construction sector.
  • Ability to work independently and coordinate effectively with subcontractors and suppliers.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills to foster collaboration among project teams.
  • Availability to work five and a half days per week.

Location

This position is based at Shan Road.

Additional Benefits

  • Enjoy a supportive work environment with opportunities for professional growth.
  • Competitive remuneration package aligned with industry standards.
  • Gain exposure to diverse projects and expand your technical expertise.
  • Work with a dynamic team committed to excellence in project delivery.

ad.title: Client Relations and Communications Specialist
ad.description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and review all external correspondence, ensuring clarity and professionalism in responses.
  • Manage daily feedback cases, working collaboratively to resolve issues promptly and amicably.
  • Foster strong relationships with feedback providers and partner agencies to enhance communication flow.
  • Keep a pulse on public opinion, proactively addressing concerns and managing messaging strategies.
  • Compile comprehensive reports on daily operational activities and relevant work metrics.
  • Organize meetings, record minutes, and circulate agendas along with key updates.
  • Oversee service providers to ensure adherence to established quality benchmarks.
  • Conduct investigations into incidents, identify root causes, and implement corrective actions to prevent recurrence.

Candidate Profile

  • Possess a diploma or degree in Communications, Business Administration, or a related field, with at least three years of relevant experience.
  • Experience in facilities management, construction, or community development sectors is a plus.
  • Workplace location: 1 Tampines North Drive 1.
  • Standard workweek: approximately 5.5 days, with potential for flexible scheduling.

ad.title: Security Systems Technician – Client Site Support & Maintenance
ad.description:
Position Overview

Our Client is seeking a dedicated Security Systems Specialist to provide on-site technical support and maintenance services. The role involves troubleshooting, servicing, and ensuring the optimal operation of security infrastructure at client locations.

Key Responsibilities

  • Respond promptly to technical fault reports during working hours and participate in rotational standby duties outside of regular hours.
  • Coordinate closely with client representatives to address service and maintenance needs effectively.
  • Manage daily interactions with clients, setting clear expectations to ensure satisfaction and smooth operations.
  • Implement solutions aligned with each client’s unique business goals and operational requirements.
  • Ensure all work complies with relevant safety and health regulations, including the Workplace Safety and Health Act.
  • Perform additional technical tasks as assigned to support system integrity and performance.

Candidate Profile

  • Possess a Higher Nitec or Nitec qualification in Mechatronics, Electrical, Electronic Engineering, or related fields, with a minimum of two years of relevant experience.
  • Hands-on expertise with security solutions such as Integrated Security Management Systems, Access Control Systems, Intrusion Detection, and CCTV technologies is essential.
  • Additional knowledge of IT networks, servers, or related systems is advantageous.
  • Demonstrate strong problem-solving abilities and excellent interpersonal skills.
  • Self-driven and capable of working independently with minimal supervision.
  • Availability for standby duties as required.
  • Having a valid driver’s license and personal vehicle is preferred.
  • Fresh graduates with relevant qualifications are encouraged to apply.
  • Applicants should be Singapore Citizens; location is at Shan Road.

ad.title: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer – AWS & Systems Automation Specialist
ad.description:
About the Role

Our Client is seeking a skilled Cloud Infrastructure Engineer to oversee the design, deployment, and management of robust cloud environments. This position involves working with a variety of AWS services and supporting both cloud and on-premises systems to ensure seamless operations.

Key Responsibilities

  • Implement and maintain scalable cloud architectures utilizing core AWS components such as EC2, S3, VPC, IAM, CloudWatch, Route 53, RDS, SQS, and SES.
  • Develop automation scripts in Bash to streamline routine tasks like backups, system updates, log management, and network configurations.
  • Assist with troubleshooting and support for on-site Windows Server and Amazon Linux 2023 environments.
  • Create and manage Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using tools like Terraform or CloudFormation to ensure consistent environment provisioning.
  • Configure monitoring solutions and set up alerting mechanisms leveraging AWS native tools such as CloudWatch and CloudTrail.
  • Coordinate backup strategies and disaster recovery plans for both cloud-based and local systems.
  • Partner with development teams to facilitate smooth integration and deployment workflows.
  • Implement security best practices through server hardening and compliance measures.
  • Work alongside security professionals to address vulnerabilities identified during penetration testing, applying necessary fixes and adjustments.

Candidate Profile

  • Hands-on experience managing AWS services, Linux, and Windows server environments, along with network infrastructure.
  • Deep understanding of Amazon Linux 2023 and Windows Server administration tasks.
  • Proficiency in scripting with Bash to automate system operations and maintenance activities.
  • Experience with Infrastructure as Code tools such as Terraform or CloudFormation for environment setup and management.
  • Knowledge of AWS monitoring and alerting tools, with an emphasis on best practices for system observability.
  • Expertise in applying security configurations and hardening servers to meet security standards.
  • Familiarity with vulnerability assessment procedures and remediation strategies.
  • Excellent communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.
  • Relevant AWS certifications are a plus but not mandatory.

Location

Position based on Shan Road.

ad.title: Business Development Executive – Construction & Training Solutions
ad.description:
Position Overview

Our Client is seeking a proactive Business Development Specialist to drive growth in the training and construction sectors. This role involves expanding client portfolios, promoting specialized courses, and fostering long-term relationships with industry partners.

Core Responsibilities

  • Identify and pursue new business prospects within the construction, facilities management, and related industries, focusing on companies, subcontractors, and staffing agencies.
  • Design and implement strategies to meet monthly sales goals and increase course enrollments, including BCA certification programs, trade testing, and skills enhancement courses.
  • Engage with potential clients through visits and presentations, showcasing tailored training solutions to meet their workforce development needs.
  • Establish and nurture strong relationships with existing clients, offering expert guidance on certification requirements and training pathways for workers.
  • Maintain ongoing communication with clients regarding course schedules, registration processes, and renewal procedures.
  • Explore emerging markets within the construction and built environment sectors, identifying new opportunities for growth.
  • Collaborate with marketing teams to promote courses via events, telemarketing, and digital outreach, while keeping abreast of industry trends and competitor activities.
  • Coordinate with administrative staff to ensure smooth registration, scheduling, and accurate record-keeping of client data.
  • Prepare and present sales reports, tracking pipeline activities and progress toward targets.

Candidate Profile

  • Educational background in Business, Marketing, Sales, or related fields, with a diploma or degree preferred.
  • At least 1 to 3 years of experience in B2B sales, ideally within the construction or training sectors.
  • Familiarity with Singapore’s construction industry or BCA certification processes is advantageous.
  • Excellent interpersonal skills and a talent for negotiation and relationship building.
  • Self-motivated, responsible, and capable of working independently to achieve objectives.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications and CRM tools to manage client information and sales activities effectively.

What We Offer

  • A dynamic work environment that encourages professional growth and development.
  • Opportunities to engage with diverse industry stakeholders and expand your professional network.
  • Supportive team culture that values initiative and innovative thinking.
  • Competitive compensation package aligned with experience and performance.
  • Flexible work arrangements to promote work-life balance.

ad.title: Construction Warehouse Supervisor with Mechanical Expertise
ad.description:
About the Position

Our Client is seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Warehouse Supervisor with a mechanical background to oversee daily operations at a construction storage facility. This role involves managing equipment, coordinating with maintenance personnel, and ensuring efficient warehouse workflows to support ongoing projects.

Key Duties and Responsibilities

  • Oversee the receipt, storage, and distribution of materials, tools, and machinery, ensuring all processes are executed accurately.
  • Keep precise records of inventory levels and track movements of supplies between the warehouse and project sites.
  • Coordinate the dispatch and return of construction equipment, ensuring timely availability for project needs.
  • Work collaboratively with maintenance staff to monitor equipment conditions and schedule repairs or servicing as necessary.
  • Ensure all equipment transfers, maintenance activities, and stock updates are properly documented and recorded.
  • Maintain a clean, organized, and safe warehouse environment to promote operational efficiency.
  • Partner with project teams to guarantee prompt support with materials and machinery, avoiding delays.

Candidate Profile

  • At least two years of experience managing warehouse or store operations within the construction sector.
  • Knowledge of handling construction-related machinery, tools, and equipment.
  • Basic familiarity with coordinating equipment maintenance is a plus.
  • Strong organizational skills, responsibility, and the ability to work autonomously.
  • Excellent communication and teamwork capabilities.
  • Possession of a forklift operation license is advantageous.

Additional Benefits

Our Client offers a supportive work environment with opportunities for professional growth, along with comprehensive health and safety programs designed to ensure employee well-being. The role provides a chance to develop hands-on experience in construction logistics and equipment management within a dynamic team setting.

ad.title: Project Cost Control Specialist (Construction & Civil Engineering)
ad.description:
Overview of Responsibilities

  • Develop, oversee, and update project financial plans, including budgets and cash flow forecasts, ensuring alignment with project progress and scope changes.
  • Coordinate with on-site teams, suppliers, subcontractors, consultants, and architects to address project-related issues and facilitate smooth communication.
  • Manage financial documentation such as progress claims, variation orders, final accounts, and subcontractor payment requests.
  • Collaborate with the project team to analyze quotations, evaluate proposals, and negotiate terms to secure timely awards for subcontractors and vendors.
  • Ensure the prompt finalization of main and sub-contract agreements to keep the project on schedule.
  • Assist with miscellaneous tasks and ad-hoc duties as required to support project delivery.

Candidate Profile

  • Possess a Bachelor's degree or higher qualification in Civil Engineering, Quantity Surveying, Facilities Management, or related fields, with at least three years of relevant experience.
  • Demonstrate a proactive approach, attention to detail, and a positive work ethic.
  • Exhibit excellent communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to work effectively within a team environment.
  • Capable of managing workload under pressure and meeting strict deadlines independently or collaboratively.
  • Location of work is at Neythal Road, with a standard five-day workweek.

Additional Benefits

  • Enjoy a supportive work environment that encourages professional growth and development.
  • Benefit from a comprehensive health and wellness package designed to support your overall well-being.
  • Participate in a collaborative team culture that values innovation and initiative.
  • Work in a dynamic setting with opportunities for career advancement within the organization.

ad.title: Training Program Coordinator - Sales & Administrative Support
ad.description:
Overview of Responsibilities

  • Assist the sales team with administrative tasks related to training registrations and course scheduling, including preparing quotations, invoices, and supporting documentation for clients.
  • Manage incoming inquiries from trainees, partner organizations, and agents, providing details about available courses, schedules, and prerequisites.
  • Coordinate with candidates to ensure all necessary documentation is submitted prior to training sessions or assessments.
  • Support the maintenance of accurate records by entering data into internal systems such as training management platforms and customer relationship tools.

Candidate Profile & Requirements

ad.title: Facilities Quality & Compliance Specialist
ad.description:
Position Overview

Our Client is seeking a dedicated Facilities Quality & Compliance Specialist to oversee and enhance operational standards within critical infrastructure environments. This role involves ensuring adherence to industry regulations, maintaining robust quality management systems, and supporting continuous process improvements across facilities management activities.

Core Responsibilities

  • Assist in developing, reviewing, and updating operational procedures, checklists, and workflows to ensure they meet ISO standards, client specifications, and industry best practices.
  • Support the maintenance and enhancement of the company's Quality Management System (QMS), including documentation for ISO certifications such as 9001, 14001, and 45001, as well as SS standards.
  • Participate in internal and vendor audits, tracking findings, and ensuring timely resolution of non-conformances and corrective actions.
  • Analyze operational data, including incident reports, maintenance logs, and performance metrics, to identify trends and areas for improvement.
  • Verify that vendor and contractor activities, including method statements and safety procedures, align with contractual and quality expectations prior to work commencement.
  • Contribute to incident investigations by identifying root causes, tracking corrective measures, and documenting risk assessments.
  • Maintain comprehensive records of audits, compliance checks, and risk assessments, preparing reports for management review and regulatory audits.
  • Coordinate document control activities, including version management and procedural updates, to ensure all records are current and accessible.
  • Support the preparation of management dashboards and reports that summarize operational performance, audit outcomes, and compliance status.

Qualifications & Experience

  • Diploma or degree in Mechanical, Electrical, Facilities Management, Quality Assurance, or related engineering fields.
  • Certification as an ISO 9001 Internal Auditor or Lead Auditor is advantageous.
  • Knowledge of industry standards such as TIA-942, SS 564, SS 553, SS 568, and data center standards is a plus.
  • Between 2 to 4 years of experience in facilities management, quality assurance, or operations within critical infrastructure or building services sectors.
  • Experience working in data centers or mission-critical environments is preferred.
  • Familiarity with major M&E systems like generators, chillers, switchgear, BMS, and CRAC units is beneficial.

Key Skills

  • Strong attention to detail with excellent analytical and documentation capabilities.
  • Ability to identify process gaps and recommend effective improvements.
  • Effective communication skills to liaise with technicians, engineers, vendors, and clients.
  • Proficiency in MS Office applications, CAFM/CMMS platforms, and quality reporting tools such as Power BI is desirable.

Location

Based in Ang Mo Kio, with opportunities for collaborative engagement across various facilities.

Additional Benefits

  • Competitive remuneration package aligned with industry standards.
  • Opportunities for professional development and industry certifications.
  • Supportive work environment fostering continuous learning and growth.
  • Comprehensive health and wellness programs designed to promote work-life balance.

ad.title: Senior Technical Project Manager – Web Development & Cross-Functional Leadership
ad.description:

  • Regularly track progress, providing clear updates to leadership and clients to facilitate informed decision-making.
  • Drive initiatives to meet objectives within established scope, deadlines, and quality benchmarks.

Candidate Profile & Requirements

  • Demonstrates a strong sense of ownership and flexibility across regional operations, managing diverse technical tasks and distributed teams throughout the software development lifecycle.
  • Proven success in delivering high-velocity software projects while maintaining attention to detailed technical aspects, utilizing planning tools to meet long-term milestones.
  • Experience leading technical or web development projects, with a solid understanding of web architecture and development processes—hands-on coding is not required, but meaningful technical discussions are essential.
  • Excellent communication skills, capable of managing relationships with clients and internal stakeholders effectively.
  • Strong problem-solving skills focused on delivering practical, actionable solutions.
  • Familiarity with contemporary project management platforms such as ClickUp, Monday.com, Jira, or Notion.
  • Experience inspecting UI/UX prototypes using design tools like Figma to ensure smooth collaboration between design and engineering teams.
  • Comfort with whiteboarding tools such as Miro or similar platforms to facilitate remote sprint planning and complex system architecture design.
  • Resourceful and adaptable, able to navigate complex situations with limited information and strategic thinking that balances technical and business priorities.
  • Exceptional interpersonal skills, fostering trust and collaboration across diverse teams.
  • Outcome-oriented with the ability to stay focused and effective under pressure.

  • Ensure compliance with technical specifications, industry standards, and regulatory requirements, while maintaining project schedules and comprehensive documentation to meet all milestones.
  • Develop comprehensive project plans, including detailed budgets and timelines, and oversee the delivery of high-quality workmanship aligned with project specifications and safety standards.
  • Represent the organization during routine maintenance meetings with clients and their representatives, fostering effective communication and collaboration.
  • Conduct periodic reviews of ongoing projects to identify potential risks, verify work progress, prepare detailed reports, and oversee project completion evaluations.

Qualifications & Skills

  • A minimum of five years of relevant experience managing engineering or A&A projects, with a proven track record in project coordination and delivery.
  • Possession of a recognized degree in Building, Mechanical, Electrical Engineering, Construction Management, Facilities Management, Quantity Surveying, or an equivalent discipline.
  • Deep understanding of M&E systems, building infrastructure, and maintenance best practices, with the ability to interpret technical drawings and schematics accurately.
  • Exceptional leadership qualities, along with strong communication and stakeholder engagement skills.
  • Experience with Building Information Modeling (BIM), AutoCAD, or Revit MEP is considered an advantage.

Additional Benefits

  • Opportunity to work on diverse projects within a dynamic environment, fostering professional growth and development.
  • Competitive compensation package complemented by comprehensive health and wellness programs.
  • Supportive work culture that values innovation, teamwork, and continuous learning.
  • Flexible work arrangements designed to promote work-life balance.

ad.title: Security Systems Maintenance Engineer
ad.description:
Key Responsibilities and Duties

  • Provide troubleshooting and routine servicing for security systems at client sites to ensure optimal operation.
  • Assist the Maintenance Supervisor in managing the security equipment inventory and spare parts inventory.
  • Coordinate with clients, facility management teams, and contractors to facilitate maintenance activities on-site.
  • Maintain close communication with clients and facility teams regarding service and maintenance issues to ensure high standards of support.
  • Ensure all maintenance work complies with relevant safety regulations, including the Workplace Safety and Health Act.
  • Support installation projects, system upgrades, and equipment replacements as needed.
  • Handle emergency fault calls during and outside of regular working hours to minimize downtime.

Qualifications and Skills

  • Diploma or Higher Nitec/Nitec in Engineering, Information Technology, or related fields, or equivalent practical experience.
  • Hands-on experience with security systems such as integrated management platforms, access control, intrusion detection, CCTV, and electronic key management systems.
  • Additional expertise in hardware setup, network configuration, and integration with third-party systems is advantageous.
  • Must demonstrate teamwork, independence, and a proactive approach to problem-solving.
  • Possession of a valid driver’s license (car or motorbike) is preferred, especially if owning a personal vehicle.
  • Singaporean citizens are preferred candidates.
  • Work location is at 3 Shan Road or at client premises, with a five-day workweek.
  • Availability for rotational standby duties is required.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • Experienced maintenance engineers with relevant technical backgrounds.
  • Fresh graduates interested in building a career in security system maintenance are encouraged to apply as technicians.

Additional Perks and Benefits

  • Opportunity to work in a dynamic environment with diverse clients.
  • Comprehensive training and development programs to enhance technical skills.
  • Supportive team culture that encourages initiative and professional growth.
  • Competitive remuneration package aligned with industry standards.
  • Flexible work arrangements to promote work-life balance.

ad.title: Financial Operations Specialist
ad.description:
Position Overview

Our Client is seeking a detail-oriented Financial Operations Specialist to manage core accounting functions and support financial reporting processes.

Key Responsibilities

  • Ensure timely and precise entry of daily financial data, including accounts payable invoices and journal entries for the general ledger.
  • Develop and maintain schedules for fixed assets, ensuring accuracy and completeness.
  • Generate comprehensive monthly inventory summaries and keep inventory records up to date.
  • Coordinate with internal departments and external partners to address and resolve any accounting inconsistencies.
  • Perform additional tasks as assigned by the supervisor to support the finance team.

Qualifications & Skills

  • Diploma or degree in Accounting or a related field.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Word, with the ability to work independently and meet tight deadlines.
  • Strong attention to detail and organizational skills to ensure accuracy in all financial documentation.

What We Offer

Join a dynamic team where your contributions are valued, and enjoy a supportive work environment that encourages professional growth and development.

ad.title: Maintenance Technician – Mechanical, Electrical & Hydraulic Systems
ad.description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Diagnose and resolve issues related to mechanical, electrical, and hydraulic systems, including pumps, motors, valves, and actuators, ensuring swift corrective measures.
  • Conduct routine upkeep of machinery by performing scheduled tasks such as oil changes, filter replacements, lubrication, and greasing to maintain optimal performance.
  • Inspect equipment regularly for signs of leaks, wear, or damage, and carry out testing procedures to verify operational integrity.
  • Overhaul hydraulic parts like pumps, cylinders, and motors to restore them to proper working condition.
  • Adhere to safety protocols by implementing lockout/tag-out procedures and following workplace safety standards to prevent accidents.
  • Keep detailed records of maintenance activities, service history, and job progress to ensure accurate documentation.

Qualifications & Skills

  • Educational background in Mechanical or Electrical Engineering, or a related technical field, such as NITEC or diploma certifications.
  • Work experience spanning 1 to over 3 years in maintaining hydraulic systems, diesel-powered machinery, or heavy equipment.
  • Technical proficiency with both hand and power tools, along with the ability to interpret hydraulic and electrical circuit diagrams.
  • Physical capability to operate in various environments, including workshops, shipyards, or on-site locations, often under challenging conditions.

Location

Our Client is situated at 80 Lim Chu Kang Lane 1.
